name: Elizabeth BeShears
subject: Gov. Abbott needs our support in this fight.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Federation for Children
body:
we are at a crucial moment in the fight for education freedom in Texas

| | | ****
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsnkuulmukkpmu5lp1fo9a3lcqk74esbp7duhkm0_rp22sh2s8i66p76c1gm2o31chh2bs)
---
| | Hi Friend, we are at a crucial moment in the fight for education freedom in Texas, and **we need your voice to make a difference! ** **_FIRST,_** Governor Greg Abbott championed and called for expanding school choice to millions of Texas families. **_THEN,_** the state House presented a watered-down version of the bill due to a few school choice opponents. And Governor Abbot threatened to veto it.
**_NOW,_** Governor Abbott has said he will call a special session to ensure they do right by Texas families and pass meaningful school choice expansion.
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9btmroi8k9drhhqa85q9rtmten3hss9fii7pqt0_rp22sh2s8i66p76c1gm2o31chh2bs)
---
The American Federation for Children is working tirelessly to ensure that school choice is expanded to every student in Texas, and **[they need your support.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0t7paujn2llc2emp2htnidrpus38e9lfoul7gfg_rp22sh2s8i66p76c1gm2o31chh2bs)** This fight for school choice in Texas is not just about Texas—it's about every American who believes in education freedom. National teachers unions are already getting involved and will stop at nothing to prevent the passage of education savings accounts. **We must band together and rally support for Texans**. If we want to see school choice become a reality nationwide and parents to regain control over their children's education, we need your voice today.
---
[**STAND WITH TEXAS: SIGN NOW**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0mp0pvt22ii6ccfhi9hje2fn7hp76fp9d8in788_rp22sh2s8i66p76c1gm2o31chh2bs)
---
| | Thank you, Elizabeth BeShearsDirector of State Communications StrategyAmerican Federation for Children

body:

| | | ****

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Believe in America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Did you see the debate?

| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv0h8rjo6k1gvpogpn38b7h8tq35qvmqbbhna4p0_rp22sh2s8i66p76c1gm2o35c9h2bs)
Fellow American,

When I stepped off the stage, I could feel electricity in the air. _This campaign has built tremendous momentum and we aren't letting up for a minute._

For those of you who have been with me since the beginning, you know how big tonight's victory is. We started this campaign back in late February polling at 0.0%. My vision is for an America more unified by our founding ideals than torn apart by our perceived differences.

|
**God** is real.
There are **two** genders.
Human flourishing requires **fossil fuels**.
**Reverse racism** is racism.
An open border is **no border**.
**Parents** determine the education of their children.
The **nuclear family** is the greatest form of governance known to mankind.
**Capitalism** lifts people up from poverty.
There are three branches of the U.S. government, **not four**.
The **U.S. Constitution** is the strongest guarantor of freedoms in history.
| [** JOIN OUR MOVEMENT **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2relh6sr77tn10ift6k612rv6o6rptqnduk3ab8_rp22sh2s8i66p76c1gm2o35c9h2bs)
---

My Republican opponents offered a lot of great points tonight but here's why my campaign is different:
* I'm going to revolutionize the way our government is run. _The people who we elect to run the government are NOT the ones who actually run the government_. It's the managerial class in the Deep State. You cannot reform these agencies. The only answer is to **SHUT THEM DOWN** , and I am the only presidential candidate who has the plan on how to actually do it.
* We have got to change the conversation. Stop talking about Biden & start talking about what we actually stand for as Republicans. Spouting off poll-tested platitudes about Biden makes us sound like partisan hacks. And that's exactly why it's going to take an outsider from a new generation to get the job done.
* I don't want a national divorce, and other candidates are pushing us toward the brink of that division. I'm running to lead us to a national revival. If we can revive that, then nobody in the world - not a nation, not a corporation, not a virus - will defeat us.

**[Fellow American, I hope you are ready to join me and fight for the future of America. There are 20 weeks until the first primary election. Chip in $20 today and together, let's make America our first priority.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zh581e50pjrs1ob4l20otvp5n45h12rlkiurbts8_rp22sh2s8i66p76c1gm2o35c9h2bs)**

_Fellow American - are you ready for the revolution?_

America First,

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrivcus3at4fqi1ufbq6huu2iqgl7mh499pqj1o0_rp22sh2s8i66p76c1gm2o35c9h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** JOIN OUR MOVEMENT ->**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcqq5sq0inpq94cr7f15na6dq31e23sp3qhdsjlg_rp22sh2s8i66p76c1gm2o35c9h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zm8irroohof5vo1o26b63g22881rf3i1k5lpvbfo_rp22sh2s8i66p76c1gm2o35c9h2bs)

---

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbse6uh4t9cje9v7nbas3km6il52t1vek7dqllr8_rp22sh2s8i66p76c1gm2o35c9h2bs)
---|---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024
---

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes.

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmmb340nubmfu85iakvbis1q2tt9dso60k5mifc0_rp22sh2s8i66p76c1gm2o35c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8or0c1gj8d5hmjpqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4chimepb0cjh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z89l0gmo2oidcbdajg2ejodl3uj76sg4umm59ero_rp22sh2s8i66p76c1gm2o35c9h2bs)_

subject: Hirsh Singh's first FOX Interview - 143 Days till First Presidential Election in IOWA
body:
| |
---
|
---
**Hirsh Singh's first FOX Interview - 143 Days till First Presidential Election in IOWA**
| 8-25-2023
---
| **Atlantic City, NJ** My fellow American,Today is the 29th day since we launched our Campaign for President of the United States and things are going very well! Our launch video where I stated I was the only candidate running for President who did not take the experimental COVID-19 vaccine received more than 3.3 million views ([CLICK HERE TO CHECK OUT LAUNCH VIDEO](https://109099.io.directiq13.com/hit?sid=zl7vw8tlky0w3i15n7&linkid=0&link=d291f088a6744cffaf6868ca3b47914a)) within the first 48 hours.
---
| [**CHIP IN TODAY!**](https://109099.io.directiq13.com/hit?sid=zl7vw8tlky0w3i15n7&linkid=1&link=4e9d11cf7deb4341a51f42a23f8d49b2)
---
Our campaign just received our first FOX Interview. ([CLICK HERE TO CHECK OUT FOX INTERVIEW HERE](https://109099.io.directiq13.com/hit?sid=zl7vw8tlky0w3i15n7&linkid=2&link=7ecb8790be0e4f6681e697d22d9bf1bf)) This campaign is “**For The People** ” and as a MAGA Conservative since day one, I am here to expose the disingenuous system-supported candidates who are loyal to special interests and not the American people. Americans need another MAGA Conservative in the Presidential arena to ensure the establishment Candidates don’t become a MOB against President Trump and shut down the America First Movement. [I explain this in my interview on Real America’s Voice here](https://109099.io.directiq13.com/hit?sid=zl7vw8tlky0w3i15n7&linkid=3&link=b780a2264c63451d9024efd241dcde23): On X, formerly known as Twitter, we have been exposing Vivek Ramaswamy, an individual who is not even a Republican per Ohio State’s Franklin County Board of Elections, has never voted in a Republican Primary, and was never a Republican! [I exposed this on my interview with Grant Stinchfield here.](https://109099.io.directiq13.com/hit?sid=zl7vw8tlky0w3i15n7&linkid=4&link=607487c747e345019f310e3cade623eb)Picture below proves it.
|
---
We also found out he gave a maximum contribution of $2,700 in 2016 to a very big Never Trumper and Democrat Candidate for Congress Dena Grayson:
|
---
[A news report in INQUISITR reported in 2019](https://109099.io.directiq13.com/hit?sid=zl7vw8tlky0w3i15n7&linkid=5&link=020ce286192a4e4fb8119bd9b2d65d80) that the mystery woman who sat behind President Trump’s former lawyer Michael Cohen and made animated facial expressions as Cohen testified before the House Oversight Committee against President Trump was Dena Grayson. She has been described by Inquisitr as an internet personality best known for criticizing and ridiculing President Trump and amassing followers for this reason. In a video that is linked from Inquisitr’s website, [you can see Grayson making faces and even lip-synching an answer provided by Cohen simultaneously](https://109099.io.directiq13.com/hit?sid=zl7vw8tlky0w3i15n7&linkid=6&link=a5d0b2f9fa4740a7ba925b2d7d766dd7) with him, indicating that she was an insider in the Never-Trumper world. [Grayson’s own tweets and now deleted posts](https://109099.io.directiq13.com/hit?sid=zl7vw8tlky0w3i15n7&linkid=7&link=4e959bc493594bc1a522e900dcfbf507) on medium.com confirm that she is part of the Never-Trumper world. Republican voters who have been shown this information alongside evidence of Vivek Ramswamy’s donation to her are stunned by the fact that they were led to believe that Vivek Ramaswamy represented their values. This connection to the far-left world would explain why Vivek Ramaswamy was not part of the TEA Party Revolution which opposed the Wall Street bailouts and the passage of Obamacare. In contrast, I joined the Young Americans for Liberty as early as 2007, took part in the TEA Party Revolution and vigorously opposed the Wall Street bailouts and Obamacare. While I was part of the TEA Party Revolution, Vivek Ramaswamy got a scholarship from the Paul and Daisy Soros Foundation to fund his degree at Yale. Despite Vivek Ramaswamy’s claim that he has no connection to George Soros, Paul Soros who died in 2013 was George Soros’s brother.
| [**CHIP IN AND GET ME TO THE DEBATE STAGE**](https://109099.io.directiq13.com/hit?sid=zl7vw8tlky0w3i15n7&linkid=8&link=f8163cc3ae4c4315858dfc24577be319)
---
Mr. Ramaswamy had a successful debate performance, but it seems all the other establishment candidates on the debate stage were unable to find this very basic level information on him. They really are not qualified to be candidates for President because they have been on the wrong side of almost every issue that matters to the Republican base:
|
---
|
---
We NEED a MAGA Conservative on the debate stage, and I am focused on getting onto the second GOP debate stage on September 27th and [I NEED YOUR HELP to get there](https://109099.io.directiq13.com/hit?sid=zl7vw8tlky0w3i15n7&linkid=9&link=bf4fa3db57fe4d6dad8d73f1d467bba4). Please [Chip In today](https://109099.io.directiq13.com/hit?sid=zl7vw8tlky0w3i15n7&linkid=10&link=2037c4c7952643e2be3544eb916f27dd) what you can and Push this Message to every person you know to give what they can. America needs to replace the outdated politicians of a bygone era with the next generation of American Conservative Leadership. **On Day 1,_I WILL_**

name: Committee To Elect Stephen McDow
subject: Reminder: A Frederick Post Column From Stephen
body:
A servants heart!
| | |
---
---
|
---
| | Greetings Friends!
Great few weeks of August. I attended the Frederick Fair and met really great voters. Team McDow did lots of door knocking and meeting with people from different aspects of the community.
Remember to support our efforts to bring commons sense solutions to our district, state, and country.

Check out my Frederick Post column.
Follow: [www.mcdowforcongress.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fJHwedUvVitY0KpAbxm_ed3gV07T4jg0VqRGKrch91BiokScrKFSpVerAdOqU64QFIGumRAy7WgF8DGWRd4IOsruYBhFuuWxspC_jBo8eZqyRCshAYQIJMvg7pAPT5DWiXgl7__dkLrT5Df39giJGOdmO-tlb0Wg&c=eUamWfBtn5azIV9jA4pKPaSH5ax93m8WzQT_mDTVBwtWA2GX2AONdQ==&ch=plogTkEFvXB3NWxR2yfx22sOu5r-6uvD0XgVGV1qo84xD5Yx6oWF3Q==).

Best,
Stephen

| Before I decided to run for Congress in Maryland's 6th District, I asked myself if it was for vanity or serving people. After prayer and discussion with my family, I know it's because I have a servant's heart.
My body of work symbolizes my commitment to service. I understand that Main Street and small businesses need leaders to listen, not government leaders who tell communities what they want instead of asking what they need, while using people as talking points during elections.

### _Friday, August 25, 2023_
Donald Trump makes his return to twitter (X) with a bang, posting his mugshot fresh out of Fulton County Jail in Atlanta, Football is back and we're making a few picks for this weekend. should you take ur advice, probably not. plus we debate, is Anthony Richardson the guy in Indianapolis. Are our freedoms under attack in the education system? Aaron White of the Freedom Foundation joins the podcast to discuss Education in the U.S. [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/vhyyhgqqhckncczqnkktfnmcdhnjgddcvgtzdvkppkfprj_omjllkkjkzjqdtlqjfwtzff.html)

Gun control is always a hot button issue between the right and the left. Some believe we should be turning our firearms in to the government, but how does this stop gun violence? It doesn't. [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/grlmrtjjrfkdffpjdkkhcdnfsrdltssfythpsykggkcgwm_omjllkkjkzjqdtlqjfwtzff.html)

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: I hope to earn your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9967e6bea7a631b8eac0c0d4302af071a3bcb3cb06bc994b529b8cad28a85222a88a76fc5b4e63f93256f7806e0b5268f6950099f844eb60d6def0b0e74ed1e21fc5213de0cc06a331937f30078468d3

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=ce8117b8689e851b545d1780edec0db4d991b7849c69b77e9b3ef285d25a88dd5e3e12fd6578462639b7d0ed7a9faf266becd00fbbe81df9

Peter,

I appreciate every single donor that’s given to my campaign.

In the Harris-Biden economy, I know how hard it is to make ends meet. That’s why it means so much to me when resources are donated to help push my campaign forward for our Great American Comeback.

There is nothing more important to me than earning your support. That’s why, when you do decide to join my team, I want to give you a small token of my appreciation:

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=ce8117b8689e851b545d1780edec0db4d991b7849c69b77e9b3ef285d25a88dd5e3e12fd6578462639b7d0ed7a9faf266becd00fbbe81df9
With a donation of $47 or more, I want to send you an official Team DeSantis membership card to show off your place on this campaign.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=ce8117b8689e851b545d1780edec0db4d991b7849c69b77e9b3ef285d25a88dd5e3e12fd6578462639b7d0ed7a9faf266becd00fbbe81df9

This card opens the door to all of the shows of appreciation I give to every one of my donors. Not only does this card signify your generosity and dedication to fighting for freedom, but it also carries with it a number of additional team benefits, such as:

Donor-exclusive merch releases, discounts, and promotions

Invitations to tele-townhalls

VIP media alerts and first access to campaign updates

Access to password-protected campaign content

Personalized videos for you to share your membership status with your social network

Exclusive meet & greet opportunities

A Team DeSantis email signature and digital badge

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=ce8117b8689e851b545d1780edec0db4d991b7849c69b77e9b3ef285d25a88dd5e3e12fd6578462639b7d0ed7a9faf266becd00fbbe81df9
DONATE $47: GET YOUR NEW MEMBER PACKAGE

I want you fighting with me, and I am working every day to earn your support. You’ll be hearing from me a lot, and seeing me everywhere.

In Freedom,

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=ce8117b8689e851b545d1780edec0db4d991b7849c69b77e9b3ef285d25a88dd5e3e12fd6578462639b7d0ed7a9faf266becd00fbbe81df9

Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=ce8117b8689e851b545d1780edec0db4d991b7849c69b77e9b3ef285d25a88dd5e3e12fd6578462639b7d0ed7a9faf266becd00fbbe81df9
BE A PART OF MY CAMPAIGN

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=aec427184a4bec676410c44194de9f8dd5a43716bd6e6fda81c583adefbb9a4941df1245b9ce74ea9cf555b5fb8b792726e4dcac353fd0d2
Sign up here!

Meet Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=ce8117b8689e851b545d1780edec0db4d991b7849c69b77e9b3ef285d25a88dd5e3e12fd6578462639b7d0ed7a9faf266becd00fbbe81df9

A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:

- Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates
- Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities
- Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT
- Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable
- Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency
- Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation
- Turning Florida into a model for election integrity
- Protecting the unborn
- Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state
- Expanding education freedom
- Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities
- Lowering prescription drug costs
- Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable
- Creating a universal school choice program
- Delivering record-breaking tax relief
- Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership
- Supporting law enforcement and our veterans
- Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders
- Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court
- ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn’t stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.”

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:

- Record tax relief
- ESG prohibitions
- Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP
- The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.
- Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency
- Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI
- Improvements to our state’s infrastructure
- Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists
- The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis
- Reforms for paycheck protection, holding accountable wayward school unions
- Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award-winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President

clean_body: To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window. Peter, I appreciate every single donor that’s given to my campaign. In the Harris-Biden economy, I know how hard it is to make ends meet. That’s why it means so much to me when resources are donated to help push my campaign forward for our Great American Comeback. There is nothing more important to me than earning your support. That’s why, when you do decide to join my team, I want to give you a small token of my appreciation: With a donation of $47 or more, I want to send you an official Team DeSantis membership card to show off your place on this campaign. This card opens the door to all of the shows of appreciation I give to every one of my donors. Not only does this card signify your generosity and dedication to fighting for freedom, but it also carries with it a number of additional team benefits, such as: Donor-exclusive merch releases, discounts, and promotions Invitations to tele-townhalls VIP media alerts and first access to campaign updates Access to password-protected campaign content Personalized videos for you to share your membership status with your social network Exclusive meet & greet opportunities A Team DeSantis email signature and digital badge DONATE $47: GET YOUR NEW MEMBER PACKAGE I want you fighting with me, and I am working every day to earn your support. You’ll be hearing from me a lot, and seeing me everywhere. In Freedom, Ron DeSantis BE A PART OF MY CAMPAIGN Volunteer! We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today! Sign up here! Meet Ron DeSantis A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: - Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates - Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities - Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT - Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable - Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency - Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation - Turning Florida into a model for election integrity - Protecting the unborn - Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state - Expanding education freedom - Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities - Lowering prescription drug costs - Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable - Creating a universal school choice program - Delivering record-breaking tax relief - Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership - Supporting law enforcement and our veterans - Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders - Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court - ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn’t stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.” Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: - Record tax relief - ESG prohibitions - Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP - The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. - Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency - Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI - Improvements to our state’s infrastructure - Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists - The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis - Reforms for paycheck protection, holding accountable wayward school unions - Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award-winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. name: Nikki Haley
subject: Together, we won
body:
Last chance to get your campaign button.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze9sn5e2cjdo5mebbv8n6jasvcmreomskgkgbafo_rp22sh2s8i66p76c1gmeor6c1h2bs)
---

Friend,

If you didn't get to watch the debate, I want to make sure you know my story.

I've been underestimated in every race I've run. But I've never lost a race, and I'm not starting now. **[That's why I'm asking you to chip in today and help me win this fight.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdo48bfe3tr98ci8di05i8k1t3gcrb4q29eef4sg_rp22sh2s8i66p76c1gmeor6c1h2bs "That’s why I’m asking you to chip in today and help me win this fight. ")**

When I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state, no one said I had a shot. A week before the primary, I was polling at 15 percent.

_**But together, we won.**_

When I ran for governor, people asked, "Nikki who?" I was polling in fourth place with just a few months until Election Day. I was the least funded, and least known GOP candidate in the race.

_**But together, we won.**_

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcsb9ivlhnumthf303qk5mj08941lhfucb42n2s0_rp22sh2s8i66p76c1gmeor6c1h2bs)
---

Then we cut taxes, created thousands of jobs, and revitalized our economy. Business journals started calling South Carolina the Beast of the Southeast - which I loved!

When I was nominated for Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. _Then I went to work._ I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

I've been underestimated before. I've been shaking up the status quo my entire life.

**[I'm running for President because our country is on a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction, and we need a leader who has proven time and again that she can rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and focus on serving the people, not the _political class._](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkb91jdd3glv33esn9gvg1vmbvdul8b23lrmoffg_rp22sh2s8i66p76c1gmeor6c1h2bs "I’m running for President because our country is on a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction, and we need a leader who has proven time and again that she can rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and focus on serving the people, not the political class.")**

I'm the daughter of legal immigrants, a proud military wife, the mom of two amazing children, and a grateful citizen who knows our best days are yet to come, if we unite and fight to save our country.

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpskhevj0uactcn3mp07terq9tqr8orh979nl50o_rp22sh2s8i66p76c1gmeor6c1h2bs)
---

But, saving our country will require us to elect a candidate who not only can defeat Biden and Harris, but one who can lead our country into a brighter future.

When I look to the future, I see America strong once more.

We'll end inflation and build an economy that works for all, just like we did in South Carolina.

In the America I see, every child gets a world-class education - because every parent gets to pick their child's school.

In the America I see, police know we have their backs - criminals know we have their number - and our streets will be safe again!

In the America I see, we stop the surge of drugs and illegal immigration. That means having a real border and mandatory e-verify, like we got done in South Carolina.

In the America I see, everyone has full confidence in our elections. Voter ID will be the law of the land - like I did as governor of South Carolina!

The America I see is freer and better for all.

We'll end corporate welfare and bailouts for big business - and we'll end the earmarks and pork-barrel spending that fuel big government.

And when it comes to our politicians, we'll light a fire under them...Their job is not to say things on TV. Their job is to do things in DC - like solve problems instead of ignoring or creating them!

In the America I see, the permanent politician will finally retire...

We'll have term limits for Congress and we'll have mental competency tests for politicians over the age of 75!

Most of all, I see a strong America because I see a proud America.

The future of America is too important to hold back now.

**[I'm running for President of the United States. I'm fighting for a strong and proud America...And I want you by my side.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zq5o5n2bsoq515rsk3n7fbem1nna917p6ei5jbi8_rp22sh2s8i66p76c1gmeor6c1h2bs "I’m running for President of the United States. I’m fighting for a strong and proud America...And I want you by my side. ")

[Will you pitch in a donation of any amount today and help me win this fight for our country's future?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv5bvejugt0bbu2akaks0rfqokooqsjhebje58a8_rp22sh2s8i66p76c1gmeor6c1h2bs "Will you pitch in a donation of any amount today and help me win this fight for our country’s future? ")**

My very best,

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1mo3hq2rr2pg1agm6q8falr004h4a53qquuuf1o_rp22sh2s8i66p76c1gmeor6c1h2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

name: ICYMI News
subject: Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America
body:
If you've been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you've almost certainly walked by one without knowing.

| **Reverse 'money machines' popping up across America** Machines like the ones in this picture are popping up all across America. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqam9bq6fitpeiobpmsj75c0mcp265jnae6p3298_rp22sh2s8i66p76c1gmeor6chh2bs) If you've been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you've almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a **'Reverse ATM'** They've been installed at places like Citizen's Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... They've even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? We've recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There's nobody in America who's more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, **[Dr. Prins explained these strange'reverse ATMs.'](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7t287sih4ccag81k9qp73l3t1t2dasc62bc79e8_rp22sh2s8i66p76c1gmeor6chh2bs)** And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation's financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what's to come. BUT, folks who understand the 'Reverse ATM' phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. To help folks prepare, she's recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and **how much time you have to prepare.** **[Click here now to see Dr. Prins' free presentation.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqcac0sof89i5fgshlouebtjqs6r936n25cmkilg_rp22sh2s8i66p76c1gmeor6chh2bs)**

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: My father was just ARRESTED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
They're trying to intimidate the American people...

| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2za9davs76dl8bfqme8k215kiunaq3a6ddoa2hom0_rp22sh2s8i66p76c1gm1pb4c5h2bs)
---
Friend,
This is truly a sad day for America.
First, Crooked Joe and his accomplices indicted my father as an innocent man _four_ times to try and eliminate their chief political rival.
And now, they’ve officially ARRESTED him and turned it into a made-for-TV spectacle.
Why? Because they want to ensure that every screen in America today reminds you of what these witch hunts are really all about: _fear. _
The fear that if you call out the broken establishment, cast off the political ruling class, and stand up for the forgotten men and women of our country, then you too could be indicted, arrested, or even imprisoned.
_This is how far they will go to try and**INTIMIDATE** you out of voting for the one candidate who will always put our country – and YOU – first. _
It’s truly sickening to see what has become of the freest nation on earth.
But while these witch-hunt crazed radicals believe they’re scaring voters away from our movement, the reality is they’ve only made us that much STRONGER.
They’ve revealed to the American people the TRUE extent of their Third World tyranny.
_And by this time tomorrow, our movement will be TWICE as strong and more UNITED than ever before!_
**Which is why I want to show my father a list of ALL the patriots who stood by his side while he was being unjustly arrested and made a contribution to SAVE America.**
**[Please make a contribution of ANY amount – _truly, even just $1_ – to peacefully DEFEND our movement from the never-ending witch hunts and have YOUR NAME added to the list of supporters that I’m going to share with my father.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvi8b0rm3d47jfa2hbccb19vfnbe9l6vugpb9lg8_rp22sh2s8i66p76c1gm1pb4c5h2bs)**

name: Young [R-CA]
subject: I'm here to tell you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
Will you join me?

| |
---
| | | Hi, Friend, it’s Young Kim. I want to take a moment to share my story with you.

I was born in South Korea, and when my family immigrated to the United States in search of a better life, I didn’t speak a word of English.

But, through hard work and determination, I learned English, went to school, started a family, built a small business from the ground up, and then became one of the first Korean-American women in Congress.

The Left wants to convince you that people like me, Christian, immigrant, woman, don’t exist. But that’s not true.
_**I’m here to tell you that I not only believe in the American Dream, but I am living proof that it is alive and well in America.**_

---
| | [DEFEND THE AMERICAN DREAM](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c21431%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4PliN1naXJEOikTox%2fskRA&sysid=1)
---

So I’ve made it my mission to DEFEND the American Dream for generations to come. I will do whatever it takes to give our children and grandchildren the opportunities they deserve.

But I can’t do it alone, Friend.

The Left will continue to lie, smear my name, and attack me in order to push their WOKE agenda into every corner of our nation. So I’m calling on your help today.

**[Will you join me in DEFENDING the American Dream? It would mean so much to me if you were by my side in this fight for freedom.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c21432%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PpFJJw8KBrqwCnlL835lCg&sysid=1 "Will you join me in
DEFENDING the American Dream? It would mean so much to me if you were by my side
in this fight for freedom. ")**

---
| | [DEFEND THE AMERICAN DREAM](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c21431%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4PliN1naXJEOikTox%2fskRA&sysid=1)
---

I know I can count on you to help keep the dream alive in our nation.

_Thank you for being on my team and reading this email,_

Young Kim
_R-CA_

---
| |
* * *

---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c21433%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2dDF8CkZD%2fiNmzGJXNutlQ&sysid=1)
---

Friend,

**FIRST** , I was named 1 of 18 Republicans under attack by the White House because Biden won my district in 2020.

**THEN** , far-Left groups pledged **MILLIONS** to defeat me.

The attacks against me are only going to get worse now that I have an opponent.

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: In what order do the end-times events take place?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjM4LTRlYjc4NzAxNjhhMDQ0ZTdhMDBiZjk1ZGI0Y2ZmZWNlIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS5wdHYub3JnL3BlcmZlY3QtZW5kaW5nLWdlbmVyb3VzLWdpZnQ_c291cmNlX2NvZGU9V0VCJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249cGVyZmVjdF9lbmRpbmcmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfU1BPNDIzNzAifQ/xX2Xd1B7s37WhkzkMv5FCg)
---
Hello Friend,Have you been watching what is going on in our world? Do you need help to encourage you in your faith and fortify your hope in these dark days?When anxiety over inflation, wars, and uncertainty strikes, you need hope immediately. That's why God has given you His Word. He doesn't want you to have to wait for the peace that comes from knowing He's in control of the future.God's Word says that he knows how the end will happen.. Jesus rules victoriously over evil, and you'll spend an eternity in glory - free from pain and suffering - in His presence. That is such good news!While we wait for that ending, perhaps you or someone you love might have questions about what is happening now in our world and how it fits in with what God says is coming. Those are legitimate questions, and God's Word has answers!I've written a book that outlines the end of your story. That ending is powerful and perfect. You won't be disappointed, and believe me, you won't want to change a thing. The name of my book is _Perfect Ending: Why Your Eternal Future Matters Today_.This book will help you face your tomorrows, not in fear, but in absolute confidence, to prepare you for the soon and certain return of Christ. As you read, you'll:
---
* Gain valuable insight into how future biblical events affect you in the here and now.
* Find the answers to the 10 most frequently asked questions about heaven.
* Discover how some of our government's policies are paving the way for the Antichrist.
* Come to understand the crucial, but often confusing and overwhelming subject of Bible prophecy.
* Understand the precise sequence and importance of prophetic events like the rapture, tribulation, and millennium.

---
_Perfect Ending_ will be mailed to you as a way of saying thanks for whatever donation you are able to give to the ministry of Pathway to Victory. And as an added bonus, we will include our informative Bible Prophecy Chart to help you visualize end-times events.
---
| | [](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjM4LTRlYjc4NzAxNjhhMDQ0ZTdhMDBiZjk1ZGI0Y2ZmZWNlIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS5wdHYub3JnL3BlcmZlY3QtZW5kaW5nLWdlbmVyb3VzLWdpZnQ_c291cmNlX2NvZGU9V0VCJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249cGVyZmVjdF9lbmRpbmcmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfU1BPNDIzNzAifQ/ETRIwUTkTaP74L56hUZOtA)
---
Both of these resources are yours when you give here: **[https://secure.ptv.org/perfect-ending-generous-gift](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjM4LTRlYjc4NzAxNjhhMDQ0ZTdhMDBiZjk1ZGI0Y2ZmZWNlIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS5wdHYub3JnL3BlcmZlY3QtZW5kaW5nLWdlbmVyb3VzLWdpZnQ_c291cmNlX2NvZGU9V0VCJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249cGVyZmVjdF9lbmRpbmcmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfU1BPNDIzNzAifQ/vZyu1-eXLQVOK4f_6euh3Q)** Each day is one day closer to the day when Christ returns. Let's be watching and waiting - and learning all we can from God's Word about our role in the days ahead.Eagerly awaiting His return, Dr. Robert JeffressSenior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas

name: Nikki Haley
subject: what’s next
body:
If you watched the debate, you know we’re ready...

| |
---
| | |
---
| | |
Friend,

If you watched the debate, you know we're ready...Ready to move past the stale ideas and faded names of the past...and we are more than ready for a new generation to lead us into the future!

I'm writing to you today with a vision of that future - **[and how we can achieve that vision, together.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7ece3ku23uolmjdk74haieb84dere6urkvml520_rp22sh2s8i66p76c1im8oj5cth2bs "and how we can achieve that vision, together.")**

I see a strong America - _full of opportunity, that lifts up everyone._

I see a proud America - _confident in who we are, and what we stand for._

And I see America leading the world - _in freedom and peace._

**I 'm running for President to make this vision a reality.** _**[It would mean the world to know you're on my side. If you have $1 or more to spare, I'm hoping you will pitch in a generous contribution to my campaign today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt4f7mk740ookcdagkncd4fjui3nkpqaig6j1tno_rp22sh2s8i66p76c1im8oj5cth2bs "It would mean the world to know you’re on my side. If you have $1 or more to spare, I’m hoping you will pitch in a generous contribution to my campaign today.")**_

The America I see will win the fight for the 21st Century. _And, we won 't win the fight for the 21st Century if we keep trusting politicians from the 20th Century._

The America I see has the courage and confidence to **defend our values** and **defeat our enemies.**

In this America, the Armed Forces of the United States will be stronger and more innovative and capable than ever.

In this America, we'll start pumping more oil and gas - and stop buying dirty oil from Venezuela.

We'll stand with our allies - from Israel to Ukraine - and stand up to our enemies - in Iran and Russia.

And in the America I see, Communist China won't just lose...

Like the Soviet Union before it, the tyranny of its system will land the Communist Chinese government on the ash-heap of history!

Realizing this vision won't be easy. **[It will take an unparalleled level of commitment from all of us.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkkj8p1ta4838i23kl6310mkc68a2517n54ed4t0_rp22sh2s8i66p76c1im8oj5cth2bs "It will take an unparalleled level of commitment from all of us.")**

It requires faith and a willingness to move past the status quo. It will require each and every one of you to know - you can't complain about what you get in a general election if you don't play in this primary.

We need someone who can shake up Washington and the political class.

I've done it before, and I'll do it again. I need your help to get there.

**[Please consider chipping in a special donation of $20.24 or more to my campaign today to help us continue to build a surge of momentum and save our country.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1kjmt9q9uucj1a0h62oslpr4dobaobqsapl39mg_rp22sh2s8i66p76c1im8oj5cth2bs "Please consider chipping in a special donation of $20.24 or more to my campaign today to help us continue to build a surge of momentum and save our country.")**
|
_Thank you in advance._

My very best,
---

I see a proud America - confident in who we are, and what we stand for. And I see America leading the world - in freedom and peace. I 'm running for President to make this vision a reality. "It would mean the world to know you’re on my side. If you have $1 or more to spare, I’m hoping you will pitch in a generous contribution to my campaign today." The America I see will win the fight for the 21st Century. And, we won 't win the fight for the 21st Century if we keep trusting politicians from the 20th Century. The America I see has the courage and confidence to defend our values and defeat our enemies. In this America, the Armed Forces of the United States will be stronger and more innovative and capable than ever. In this America, we'll start pumping more oil and gas - and stop buying dirty oil from Venezuela. We'll stand with our allies - from Israel to Ukraine - and stand up to our enemies - in Iran and Russia. And in the America I see, Communist China won't just lose... Like the Soviet Union before it, the tyranny of its system will land the Communist Chinese government on the ash-heap of history! Realizing this vision won't be easy. "It will take an unparalleled level of commitment from all of us." It requires faith and a willingness to move past the status quo. It will require each and every one of you to know - you can't complain about what you get in a general election if you don't play in this primary. body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | August 26, 2023

Donald Trump is
fearing for his life after being asked this haunting question

The former President has
been asked many things throughout his political career. But
nothing as jaw-dropping as this.

And Donald Trump is fearing for
his life after being asked this haunting question.
? Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Breaking: This report could
change everything for Trump

Democrats are
constantly trying to back Donald Trump into a corner. But one
revelation might break him free.
? Continue Reading

Jen Psaki fell flat on her
face in front of millions

Politicians and their
lackeys aren't perfect and make mistakes every now and then. But
Psaki really dropped the ball on this one.
? Continue Reading

This latest warning from
the CDC could bring Dr. Fauci out of retirement

Anthony Fauci stepped
down from public service in the medical field last year. But he
may have a reason to come back.
? Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

body:
As of the crack of dawn...

| |
---
| | | As of the crack of dawn, over 500,000 Liberals have added their names to what could be the most DAMAGING move to happen in our nation's history...

**ADMITTING D.C. INTO THE UNION!**

Friend - this is no fire drill. **This is the REAL DEAL.**

If successful, the Liberal Mob will sew another star onto our flag and uproot our nation as we know it. The Democrats will receive at least ONE additional governor, TWO solid blue Senate seats, and ONE radical House member.

To be frank - their plot would set the stage for a nationwide takeover of Liberal elites.

You don't want that... _right?_

We need to know who we can count on to be on the right side of history. **[So Friend, we need you to answer one very important question:](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt4h4tnce8r4168be78euehfc4k5veshkotggf10_rp22sh2s8i66p76c1imco32c1h2bs "So Friend, we need you to answer one very important question:")**

name: Nikki Haley
subject: what’s next
body:
If you watched the debate, you know we’re ready...

| |
---
| | |
---
| | |
Friend,

If you watched the debate, you know we’re ready...Ready to move past the stale ideas and faded names of the past...and we are more than ready for a new generation to lead us into the future!

I’m writing to you today with a vision of that future - **[and how we can achieve that vision, together.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c21444%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oixRClosUiKdic4o7gt27g&sysid=1 "and how we can achieve
that vision, together.")**

I see a strong America - _full of opportunity, that lifts up everyone._

I see a proud America - _confident in who we are, and what we stand for._

And I see America leading the world - _in freedom and peace._

**I’m running for President to make this vision a reality.** _**[It would mean the world to know you’re on my side. If you have $1 or more to spare, I’m hoping you will pitch in a generous contribution to my campaign today.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22555%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JrGEdxtZjMS66UabVrT9pA&sysid=1 "It would mean the world to
know you’re on my side. If you have $1 or more to spare, I’m hoping you will pitch
in a generous contribution to my campaign today. ")**_

The America I see will win the fight for the 21st Century. _And, we won’t win the fight for the 21st Century if we keep trusting politicians from the 20th Century._

The America I see has the courage and confidence to **defend our values** and **defeat our enemies.**

In this America, the Armed Forces of the United States will be stronger and more innovative and capable than ever.

In this America, we’ll start pumping more oil and gas - and stop buying dirty oil from Venezuela.

We’ll stand with our allies - from Israel to Ukraine - and stand up to our enemies - in Iran and Russia.

And in the America I see, Communist China won’t just lose...

Like the Soviet Union before it, the tyranny of its system will land the Communist Chinese government on the ash-heap of history!

Realizing this vision won’t be easy. **[It will take an unparalleled level of commitment from all of us.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22556%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4TVvugrqFOZtQLQQSxzoGw&sysid=1 "It will take an
unparalleled level of commitment from all of us.")**

It requires faith and a willingness to move past the status quo. It will require each and every one of you to know - you can’t complain about what you get in a general election if you don’t play in this primary.

We need someone who can shake up Washington and the political class.

I’ve done it before, and I’ll do it again. I need your help to get there.

**[Please consider chipping in a special donation of $20.24 or more to my campaign today to help us continue to build a surge of momentum and save our country.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22557%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5bYLZqwdUGyTYdy9xiqCTw&sysid=1 "Please consider chipping
in a special donation of $20.24 or more to my campaign today to help us continue
to build a surge of momentum and save our country. ")**
|
_Thank you in advance._

My very best,
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22558%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=j2FDzFfC20coxplA%2ftKybw&sysid=1)

clean_body: If you watched the debate, you know we’re ready... | | | | | | | | Friend, If you watched the debate, you know we’re ready...Ready to move past the stale ideas and faded names of the past...and we are more than ready for a new generation to lead us into the future! I’m writing to you today with a vision of that future - "and how we can achieve that vision, together." I see a strong America - full of opportunity, that lifts up everyone. I see a proud America - confident in who we are, and what we stand for. And I see America leading the world - in freedom and peace. I’m running for President to make this vision a reality. "It would mean the world to know you’re on my side. If you have $1 or more to spare, I’m hoping you will pitch in a generous contribution to my campaign today. " The America I see will win the fight for the 21st Century. And, we won’t win the fight for the 21st Century if we keep trusting politicians from the 20th Century. The America I see has the courage and confidence to defend our values and defeat our enemies. In this America, the Armed Forces of the United States will be stronger and more innovative and capable than ever. In this America, we’ll start pumping more oil and gas - and stop buying dirty oil from Venezuela. We’ll stand with our allies - from Israel to Ukraine - and stand up to our enemies - in Iran and Russia. And in the America I see, Communist China won’t just lose... Like the Soviet Union before it, the tyranny of its system will land the Communist Chinese government on the ash-heap of history! Realizing this vision won’t be easy. "It will take an unparalleled level of commitment from all of us." It requires faith and a willingness to move past the status quo. It will require each and every one of you to know - you can’t complain about what you get in a general election if you don’t play in this primary. We need someone who can shake up Washington and the political class. I’ve done it before, and I’ll do it again. I need your help to get there. "Please consider chipping in a special donation of $20.24 or more to my campaign today to help us continue to build a surge of momentum and save our country. " | Thank you in advance. My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley (48324) directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. name: [URGENT] House Republican Leadership Team
subject: THIS IS NOT A FIRE DRILL
body:
As of the crack of dawn...

| |
---
| | | As of the crack of dawn, over 500,000 Liberals have added their names to what could be the most DAMAGING move to happen in our nation's history...

**ADMITTING D.C. INTO THE UNION!**

Friend - this is no fire drill. **This is the REAL DEAL.**

If successful, the Liberal Mob will sew another star onto our flag and uproot our nation as we know it. The Democrats will receive at least ONE additional governor, TWO solid blue Senate seats, and ONE radical House member.

To be frank - their plot would set the stage for a nationwide takeover of Liberal elites.

You don't want that... _right?_

We need to know who we can count on to be on the right side of history. **[So Friend, we need you to answer one very important question:](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ztakrh6d1tt3qbgbfcfujfbvddqadvg4ns1dtq40_rp22sh2s8i66p76c1im6or2cph2bs "So Friend, we need you to answer one very important question:")**
**Do you believe the District of Columbia should be BANNED from entering our union?**
---
**[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zl3cbpdomghofq1asu159atfsao4fo1m3ccma4ig_rp22sh2s8i66p76c1im6or2cph2bs)[**YES >>**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zf12tarf6uco13t2ghpe5glvcna8h47ce950sj90_rp22sh2s8i66p76c1im6or2cph2bs)_[**NO >>**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z7uftc61hdepb3fijrnus9lvmspt15inkaj2pl6g_rp22sh2s8i66p76c1im6or2cph2bs)**
---
We're gearing up for a HUGE response to show these corrupt Liberals they don't control the masses. That said - **[we need to know where you stand before the sun sets.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zo0lbjtqlqj5ku6mdc3oatv7c7hsjo4l59tsg0lo_rp22sh2s8i66p76c1im6or2cph2bs "we need to know where you stand before the sun sets.")**

name: Governor Ron DeSantis
subject: Hi, this is Ron DeSantis. This is who I am.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Our path to victory is clear from the first debate. Now I'd like to make sure you know what I'm fighting for and who I am.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e9635bb15f524d83af50abd6122d249f&_e=8QoOxlRuZi8a8yglAQpSyjb5Fhk_vG_ME8_51hxHm6gMwqNbdkayxN2kD81JiI47yXAHW0B5X9x913QZgpE7Pf_iuy5TE0NFT83jcL77o78qT0amHb5834OvtcwE-LLpT08j4yrTTWhJZOb9JlKFgkfcKd7tlklxKLV_6e9GLCH7mg_3vP-YSE7MtAsmDKocKlmLLMCOLmXPPIGQucM_6RtBKsns2qnBKmicH9TGj0fdcOstWySGRkLT3gWhKc0Yu8uDtn94dkY07pTy17O3GBIhanGSvSB8Pi_PaXTuw0bT3ncDDYoCnyaf_qQgsXktIKjLCK77d5MxLzz5Pf1V3CeGCyEXsX6n-aTwxcjo4pFdYEB854FpbltvvyWtUauIqLSuVubGFK2iPzbsY4IrLUDDitCw410bWvnhxya_ZVY%3D)
---
Friend, The first Republican primary debate was an opportunity for the nation to hear directly from their future President. To earn YOUR support, I stood up, weathered the attacks, and now I know that we are one step closer to stopping the decline of this country. **If you 're just tuning into the race after this pivotal debate, I'd like to take a moment to tell you a little bit about myself so you know why I'm running for President, what I plan to accomplish, and why I'm asking for your support.** _**Here 's my story**_: I was a blue-collar kid born and raised in Florida who went on to work my way through Yale University where I was Team Captain of our baseball team, before going on to graduate from Harvard Law School. After earning my degrees and witnessing the horrific attack on our nation's freedom on September 11th, 2001, I knew I had to stand up. I volunteered for the Navy and went on to serve in Iraq as a JAG Officer in support of SEAL Team 1.
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e9635bb15f524d83af50abd6122d249f&_e=8QoOxlRuZi8a8yglAQpSyjb5Fhk_vG_ME8_51hxHm6gMwqNbdkayxN2kD81JiI47yXAHW0B5X9x913QZgpE7Pf_iuy5TE0NFT83jcL77o78qT0amHb5834OvtcwE-LLpT08j4yrTTWhJZOb9JlKFgkfcKd7tlklxKLV_6e9GLCH7mg_3vP-YSE7MtAsmDKocKlmLLMCOLmXPPIGQucM_6RtBKsns2qnBKmicH9TGj0fdcOstWySGRkLT3gWhKc0Yu8uDtn94dkY07pTy17O3GFggwcno0mNOoBy7UynbI6kblF1W64OjGxohEjgSPzo1nbIN3RMv0dAbUOL45RWS30GAT4RFJ7-jIujXOtFjnfHaYJnWX4OWpNOKioLBFXxr9BiTtr5MEkbz43UazDcDHzzMmbzdZEZ61U7ceQpm3Ys%3D)
---
Since my time serving in the Navy, I have taken on the role of prosecutor, Congressman, proud Governor of the free state of Florida, father to three young children, and husband to my wonderful wife, Casey.
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e9635bb15f524d83af50abd6122d249f&_e=8QoOxlRuZi8a8yglAQpSyjb5Fhk_vG_ME8_51hxHm6gMwqNbdkayxN2kD81JiI47yXAHW0B5X9x913QZgpE7Pf_iuy5TE0NFT83jcL77o78qT0amHb5834OvtcwE-LLpT08j4yrTTWhJZOb9JlKFgkfcKd7tlklxKLV_6e9GLCH7mg_3vP-YSE7MtAsmDKocKlmLLMCOLmXPPIGQucM_6RtBKsns2qnBKmicH9TGj0fdcOstWySGRkLT3gWhKc0Yu8uDtn94dkY07pTy17O3GM1vPZWxv2CzFD2VgANhfeDD6cLUD6C0nJRcdCGt6PWZKBOFltiJsIb6X-FK83eXTdKNHPRxkT_kjMDAOQ7ait1FA1wVmuyNps_uMzGYRlAgnbqU-BnvMH4Muw7iqwYl9LZIIt40_ERL6W6rk06a0dE%3D)
---

As Governor, I have made it my mission to lead with conviction, unwavering energy, and with a refusal to back down. That's why, in Florida, we held the line when freedom hung in the balance. When Covid policies across the country made commonsense an uncommon virtue, our state became a refuge of sanity and a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans. Leadership matters and I believe my record speaks for itself. Since I took office as Governor, Florida now:
* Ranks as the number one economy in the country by CNBC;
* Ranks number one for new business formations;

* Ranks number one for net in-migration;
* Ranks number one for economic growth amongst large states;
* Has an unemployment rate that is a percentage point below the national average and even lower than other large states like California and New York;
* Ranks number one in education by US News and World Report;
* Has NO state income tax;

* Has a crime rate at a 50-year low.

I have worked tirelessly to transform a once purple state to a deep red blueprint for freedom.
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e9635bb15f524d83af50abd6122d249f&_e=8QoOxlRuZi8a8yglAQpSyjb5Fhk_vG_ME8_51hxHm6gMwqNbdkayxN2kD81JiI47yXAHW0B5X9x913QZgpE7Pf_iuy5TE0NFT83jcL77o78qT0amHb5834OvtcwE-LLpT08j4yrTTWhJZOb9JlKFgkfcKd7tlklxKLV_6e9GLCH7mg_3vP-YSE7MtAsmDKocKlmLLMCOLmXPPIGQucM_6RtBKsns2qnBKmicH9TGj0fdcOstWySGRkLT3gWhKc0Yu8uDtn94dkY07pTy17O3GIeztszNhnXG0AyUglrOhWwlq2eqRGbjKtSfUNTQRqrIlpB5AZvV7CI2v_unqAE-Sp5OpskGLJjDOPJb2gZ5dl8Z_zxVV0seMENKos3UvxybDLW06fh-jIAGBUwmNZDJXsS81AAPXzqqwYvl90-VLWA%3D)
---
But here's the problem, Friend. Failing leftist policies across the country are shoving a radical ideology down your throat. They're telling you that men can get pregnant, want to impose a social credit score on you, and let Mexican drug cartels cross our border freely and continue to murder Americans. This is NOT okay. Riots and disorder have infested some of this nation's oldest cities and turned places like Chicago, Philadelphia, and San Francisco into crime slums. I am NOT willing to accept this decline. We have a President who is floundering and bowing down to his own party instead of doing what is right for the American people. He has consistently bent the knee to the woke mob. These radical policies across the nation are making it nearly impossible for hardworking families to achieve the American Dream, and as a father of three young children and husband to my wife Casey, I cannot sit idly by while their future hangs in the balance. _**This election is not about me. It 's about YOU and the American children who are being subjected to the woke mob's fraud.**_
---

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

Here 's my story: I was a blue-collar kid born and raised in Florida who went on to work my way through Yale University where I was Team Captain of our baseball team, before going on to graduate from Harvard Law School. After earning my degrees and witnessing the horrific attack on our nation's freedom on September 11th, 2001, I knew I had to stand up. That's why, in Florida, we held the line when freedom hung in the balance.
