| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Now I'd like to make sure you know what I'm fighting for and who I am. | | | | | | | | | | Friend, The first Republican primary debate was an opportunity for the nation to hear directly from their future President. To earn YOUR support, I stood up, weathered the attacks, and now I know that we are one step closer to stopping the decline of this country. If you 're just tuning into the race after this pivotal debate, I'd like to take a moment to tell you a little bit about myself so you know why I'm running for President, what I plan to accomplish, and why I'm asking for your support. Here 's my story: I was a blue-collar kid born and raised in Florida who went on to work my way through Yale University where I was Team Captain of our baseball team, before going on to graduate from Harvard Law School. After earning my degrees and witnessing the horrific attack on our nation's freedom on September 11th, 2001, I knew I had to stand up. I volunteered for the Navy and went on to serve in Iraq as a JAG Officer in support of SEAL Team 1. | Since my time serving in the Navy, I have taken on the role of prosecutor, Congressman, proud Governor of the free state of Florida, father to three young children, and husband to my wonderful wife, Casey. | As Governor, I have made it my mission to lead with conviction, unwavering energy, and with a refusal to back down. That's why, in Florida, we held the line when freedom hung in the balance. When Covid policies across the country made commonsense an uncommon virtue, our state became a refuge of sanity and a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans. Leadership matters and I believe my record speaks for itself. Since I took office as Governor, Florida now: Ranks as the number one economy in the country by CNBC; Ranks number one for new business formations; Ranks number one for net in-migration; Ranks number one for economic growth amongst large states; Has an unemployment rate that is a percentage point below the national average and even lower than other large states like California and New York; Ranks number one in education by US News and World Report; Has NO state income tax; Has a crime rate at a 50-year low. I have worked tirelessly to transform a once purple state to a deep red blueprint for freedom. | But here's the problem, Friend. Failing leftist policies across the country are shoving a radical ideology down your throat. They're telling you that men can get pregnant, want to impose a social credit score on you, and let Mexican drug cartels cross our border freely and continue to murder Americans. This is NOT okay. Riots and disorder have infested some of this nation's oldest cities and turned places like Chicago, Philadelphia, and San Francisco into crime slums. I am NOT willing to accept this decline. We have a President who is floundering and bowing down to his own party instead of doing what is right for the American people. He has consistently bent the knee to the woke mob. These radical policies across the nation are making it nearly impossible for hardworking families to achieve the American Dream, and as a father of three young children and husband to my wife Casey, I cannot sit idly by while their future hangs in the balance. This election is not about me. It 's about YOU and the American children who are being subjected to the woke mob's fraud. | Our nation is facing a critical choice in 2024: Freedom or Decline. That is why I am running for President; I will not stand by while Joe Biden sends this nation into deeper decline for another four years. I'm not running to be President. I am running to DO things as President and from Day One we are going to rip up disastrous policies that are harming American families and REVERSE the decline Joe Biden has let fester in this country. The time to act is NOW. | | | I believe that decline is choice, success is attainable, and freedom is worth fighting for. I fought with everything I had on that debate stage on August 23rd and took my vision for restoring this nation directly to the American people. I know that no one is entitled to anything in this world, so I am fighting to earn your support and lead when it matters most. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn't stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism." Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. * I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. | Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President | Ron DeSantis for President PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315 Full Mag News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

There's still time to take the survey! >>

Today is Women's Equality Day, Peter! Today, we commemorate the 1920 adoption of the 19th Amendment which granted women the right to vote. This was a long-overdue victory in the fight for equality — but many women across the nation still lack many of the fundamental rights that should be afforded to ALL Americans – _including the right to reproductive freedom._

**That’s why Derek is urging the Senate to codify reproductive rights into law by passing the Women's Health Protection Act.[**Do you agree that it's time for the Senate to act now? \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Derek Kilmer
Date: August 25, 2023
Subject: Women's Equality Day is right around the corner

Team,

Tomorrow is Women's Equality Day, a day created to celebrate the anniversary of the 19th Amendment's ratification — a pivotal moment in our history that granted women the right to vote.

As we observe Women's Equality Day, let us reflect on the progress we have made and recommit ourselves to the ongoing journey toward gender equality. The 19th Amendment stands as a testament to the power of determination and the pursuit of justice. It signifies the tireless efforts of countless suffragists who fought against adversity to ensure that every voice could be heard, regardless of gender. Their legacy inspires us to continue advocating for equality in all aspects of life.

But team, the fight for gender equity and equal rights is far from over. Since the fall of _Roe v. Wade_ , there have been unprecedented attacks on a woman's right to bodily autonomy, making it clear what's at stake in this election. Women's reproductive autonomy and right to basic health care are on the ballot this November – **and it's up to us to ensure that the voices of the extremist few don't outweigh the will of the majority of Americans.**

**That's why I was proud to vote to pass the Women's Health Protection Act through the House, and will never stop fighting to get this critical legislation signed into law. [Do you agree that it's time for Congress to pass the Women's Health Protection Act and codify a woman's right to reproductive choice, Peter?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68687779/423824172/1327591856?ms=em23_230826_kicker_esrv_gq_act___TK_ettx&refcode=em23_230826_kicker_esrv_gq_act___TK_ettx&source=em23_230826_kicker_esrv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230826_kicker_esrv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=yMuXaKydk/Kg2mKIVuycj40y+JvHHS8U3/eaQFcDkjmY6NDXSeo1i9dCcHkjESY1QPJMU/8DMFM4g81MrDYV78EG9lvFbqAZdqB+ZxQoGHYbYC0ou2DCqYwoVSienZtFvZuop6Ni7IsTnwV4XxdwbR2PNGAq/8BQQAO0sQutHhY=&refcode2=d7086515-0844-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDcwODY1MTUtMDg0NC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KKCcDUwRe4lr5wEoT9EdMiCnzK9bh8e-VddoDl4D0pk=&emci=33c8eb7d-5d43-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=d7086515-0844-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)**

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Former Home Depot CEO issues dire warning for Americans
body:
omething strange is happening in our financial system.

| Dear Reader, Something strange is happening in our financial system. According to analysts at UBS, more than 50,000 retail locations could shut their doors in the months ahead. Already, Walmart, Foot Locker, Bed Bath & Beyond, and Macy's are cutting stores. And former Home Depot CEO Bob Nardelli recently issued a grim warning:
> "We're going to see a lot of bankruptcies. [This is] different than anything I have seen in my 52 years..."
What does it all mean for your family and your money? Dr. Nomi Prins has dug deeper into the research, and she's found something startling. Amid all the turmoil predicted by Nardeni and UBS, Prins has found a single firm that could be the canary in the coal mine foreshadowing the next major crisis in America. All it takes is one look at this troubling chart to see why - [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7ccabbaf8e124849ad1142d30877b0cf&_e=5w5LTp5ECrLfuA6cuasvwZboDoTcmyIo7-Dv8XwF2de8IFTffBogs2qa-iqI73nMdY1KKRRG5GV1zEuQCMsBofBZFpT4GlYDvf-bXxlSyj7LcwbEQDfLp6jaut3e4wHJUWuXjwZS7dkUvLIJ6Jr505Z0UVWy4Jbh2-A1FoYb-P_KS9tWpI5cO26otfxS7t4eKmtfyF6vrsalZRy3nHY5b6gO1n9qRHNh01967BG5vvwxW5u9kWH1wmMkeQSmIy9pQ-cindYOp7AFOxQJZpYmrx0MMO7zrr9wKPfqDGcVh7Y%3D) Dr. Prins says:
> "This chart tells you everything you need to know about the next crisis in America. In short, what we're about to see is a currency crisis - but not the kind of currency crisis most folks expect. This firm - along with many others - will almost certainly go bankrupt as a result."
According to Dr. Prins, our money is about to change forever... and the overhaul is set to happen in just a few weeks. To help folks prepare, she's recorded a briefing that explains all the details of what she calls a 'reset' to our financial system. In it, she lays out all the evidence of this currency crisis, and what you can do to prepare. [Click here now to see her full (and free) presentation.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7ccabbaf8e124849ad1142d30877b0cf&_e=5w5LTp5ECrLfuA6cuasvwZboDoTcmyIo7-Dv8XwF2de8IFTffBogs2qa-iqI73nMdY1KKRRG5GV1zEuQCMsBofBZFpT4GlYDvf-bXxlSyj7LcwbEQDfLp6jaut3e4wHJUWuXjwZS7dkUvLIJ6Jr50wiDf0iwAZFWcTp8vQM699sEGMDZ6MG8nqaX5kDsEAa8XeJYlpkFb_dkajgwuqoeA8w29PoGQ_nRNVpsz3iZQecapGPLd2T0c7JdjqaYyaFh5bTwqIlWWgqDwm0WfafwHWX-WpE8eXYn0NXVEU_T7hI%3D) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar transformations to our money, folks who failed to prepare were blindsided. But those who moved their money beforehand had the opportunity to multiply their nest-egg as a result. [Click here to see why.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7ccabbaf8e124849ad1142d30877b0cf&_e=5w5LTp5ECrLfuA6cuasvwZboDoTcmyIo7-Dv8XwF2de8IFTffBogs2qa-iqI73nMdY1KKRRG5GV1zEuQCMsBofBZFpT4GlYDvf-bXxlSyj7LcwbEQDfLp6jaut3e4wHJUWuXjwZS7dkUvLIJ6Jr5043i5XAcvXqDILTrLuJ18_EZSPgOLd3NoOiMFFQ08DnEamzzlS2Wb9ggUfqtl_sbkreKIIiDWMG0vakEV9X8e64pFo6xLtow3jdBhZR5udC_M36ixCg9GBFaeDVAAZT1ZDZ3vlKX04y7-pCTvVeotJg%3D)

Friend,

I don't usually swear this much.

But I swear I won't shame you or question your party loyalty. I swear I won't exploit you with made up fundraising goals. I swear I won't badger you with these messages if you ask them to stop.

But this message is truly heartfelt & I swear it is worth reading.
My name is Mayra Flores. I'm the America First candidate in TX-34.

A seat that has been a Democrat stronghold for over 100 years until we flipped it red in a stunning upset against Biden & Pelosi in the June special election, almost a year ago. And it was with your help last summer that I became the first Mexican-born Congresswoman in U.S. history.

But then Biden & the Democrats spent millions to erase our victory & they narrowly flipped it back to blue in the November general election.

But as a product of the American Dream & proud conservative, I don't surrender to anyone- especially the radical left who are hellbent on destroying everything that makes America great.

clean_body: It really is now or never | | | | | | | | | | Friend, I don't usually swear this much. But I swear I won't shame you or question your party loyalty. I swear I won't exploit you with made up fundraising goals. I swear I won't badger you with these messages if you ask them to stop. But this message is truly heartfelt & I swear it is worth reading. My name is Mayra Flores. I'm the America First candidate in TX-34. A seat that has been a Democrat stronghold for over 100 years until we flipped it red in a stunning upset against Biden & Pelosi in the June special election, almost a year ago. And it was with your help last summer that I became the first Mexican-born Congresswoman in U.S. history. But then Biden & the Democrats spent millions to erase our victory & they narrowly flipped it back to blue in the November general election. But as a product of the American Dream & proud conservative, I don't surrender to anyone- especially the radical left who are hellbent on destroying everything that makes America great. I just launched my campaign, and this is already the closest race in America. This race is so close that all Joe Biden needs to do is make a phone call to one of his billionaire friends and that would be the end of it all. Unfortunately, I don't have those kinds of connections. And given the rate at which the Democrats raise money, this race will be won or lost in the next few hours. This is our first & last chance at mounting this historic comeback & retaking the most important seat in America. "So please, if there is any amount you can spare for my campaign today, it would truly mean the world to me if you chipped in." Thank you, Mayra | | Paid for by Mayra Flores for Congress PO Box 516 Los Indios, TX 78567 Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Ready for the next one
disclaimer_text:
Paid for
by Vivek 2024
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vstD7e4DN2

Vivek 2024

Did you see the debate?

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/ostD7e4DN2

Fellow American,

When I stepped off the stage, I
could feel electricity in the air. This campaign has built
tremendous momentum and we aren't letting up for a minute.

For those of you who have been
with me since the beginning, you know how big this victory was.
We started this campaign back in late February polling at 0.0%.
My vision is for an America more unified by our founding ideals
than torn apart by our perceived differences.

God is real.
There are two
genders.
Human flourishing
requires fossil fuels.
Reverse racism is
racism.
An open border is no
border.
Parents determine the
education of their children.
The nuclear family is
the greatest form of governance known to mankind.
Capitalism lifts
people up from poverty.
There are three
branches of the U.S. government, not four.
The U.S. Constitution
is the strongest guarantor of freedoms in history.

JOIN OUR
MOVEMENT

My Republican opponents offered a
lot of great points tonight but here's why my campaign is
different:

I'm going to revolutionize
the way our government is run. The people who we elect to run the
government are NOT the ones who actually run the government. It's
the managerial class in the Deep State. You cannot reform these
agencies. The only answer is to SHUT THEM DOWN, and I am the only
presidential candidate who has the plan on how to actually do it.
We have got to change the
conversation. Stop talking about Biden & start talking about what
we actually stand for as Republicans. Spouting off poll-tested
platitudes about Biden makes us sound like partisan hacks. And
that's exactly why it's going to take an outsider from a new
generation to get the job done.
I don't want a national
divorce, and other candidates are pushing us toward the brink of
that division. I'm running to lead us to a national revival. If
we can revive that, then nobody in the world - not a nation, not
a corporation, not a virus - will defeat us.

Fellow American, I hope you are
ready to join me and fight for the future of America. There are
20 weeks until the first primary election. Chip in $20 today and
together, let's make America our first priority.

Fellow American - are you ready
for the revolution?

America First,

Vivek Ramaswamy

JOIN OUR MOVEMENT
→

GET TO KNOW VIVEK:

Vivek is an
American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and
New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside
Corporate America's Social Justice Scam, along with his second
book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit,
and the Path Back to Excellence.

He has been a
prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory
practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he
calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes
with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do
through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a
first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he
often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that
"If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be
outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an
accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the
valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate
summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his
J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund,
then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where
his team developed five drugs that went on to become
FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded
Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct
aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and
others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth
of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the
voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading
companies to focus on excellence over politics.

STAND WITH VIVEK
➞

Paid for
by Vivek 2024

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are
not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax
purposes.

Funds received in response to
this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits.
Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals
without green cards, and federal government contractors are
prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to
collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and
name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200
in an election cycle.

I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States. I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago – an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something – that we do love this country. I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A. I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I’m running for President because we have a country to save! I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. And I’ll do it as your next President. name: Coach
subject: Peter, Tell Joe Biden to PUT AMERICA FIRST!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
Link to petition inside – add your name >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/b24a649d30526f37/bc293cabac4f34e1c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Peter,

It isn’t hard to understand Joe Biden’s priorities. As he likes to say, if you want to see what matters to someone, look at their budget.

Well, I’ve certainly looked at Joe Biden’s budget. It’s a total mess.
---
[**ADD YOUR NAME**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/b24a649d30526f37/f3de36e014329bdbc3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
This guy loves sending money overseas – _just look at the TENS OF BILLIONS sent to Ukraine_ – while here in America our southern border is being overrun, he can’t be bothered to visit the site of natural disaster, our infrastructure is crumbling, and on and on!

**_Isn’t it great to know that he has our backs?!_**

I’m fed up and calling out Joe Biden. It’s far past time he put America first. We cannot be the world’s piggy bank.

If you agree, **please sign my petition today** to make your voice heard.
---
[**ADD YOUR NAME**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/b24a649d30526f37/e59ec17805721ecdc3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
**Our nation is on the wrong track and I’m doing all I can to stop the insanity in Washington.**

I’m grateful to have you standing behind me. **I can assure you I will not let up in this fight.**

\- Coach
---

Fellow American,

When I stepped off the debate stage, I could feel electricity in the air. _This campaign has built tremendous momentum and we aren't letting up for a minute._

For those of you who have been with me since the beginning, you know how big this victory is. We started this campaign back in late February polling at 0.0%. My vision is for an America more unified by our founding ideals than torn apart by our perceived differences.

|
**God** is real.
There are **two** genders.
Human flourishing requires **fossil fuels**.
**Reverse racism** is racism.
An open border is **no border**.
**Parents** determine the education of their children.
The **nuclear family** is the greatest form of governance known to mankind.
**Capitalism** lifts people up from poverty.
There are three branches of the U.S. government, **not four**.
The **U.S. Constitution** is the strongest guarantor of freedoms in history.

My Republican opponents offered a lot of great points tonight but here's why my campaign is different:
* I'm going to revolutionize the way our government is run. _The people who we elect to run the government are NOT the ones who actually run the government_. It's the managerial class in the Deep State. You cannot reform these agencies. The only answer is to **SHUT THEM DOWN** , and I am the only presidential candidate who has the plan on how to actually do it.
* We have got to change the conversation. Stop talking about Biden & start talking about what we actually stand for as Republicans. Spouting off poll-tested platitudes about Biden makes us sound like partisan hacks. And that's exactly why it's going to take an outsider from a new generation to get the job done.
* I don't want a national divorce, and other candidates are pushing us toward the brink of that division. I'm running to lead us to a national revival. If we can revive that, then nobody in the world - not a nation, not a corporation, not a virus - will defeat us.

**[Fellow American, I hope you are ready to join me and fight for the future of America. There are 20 weeks until the first primary election. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: Did you see the debate? | | Fellow American, When I stepped off the debate stage, I could feel electricity in the air. This campaign has built tremendous momentum and we aren't letting up for a minute. For those of you who have been with me since the beginning, you know how big this victory is. We started this campaign back in late February polling at 0.0%. My vision is for an America more unified by our founding ideals than torn apart by our perceived differences. | God is real. There are two genders. Human flourishing requires fossil fuels. Reverse racism is racism. An open border is no border. Parents determine the education of their children. The nuclear family is the greatest form of governance known to mankind. Capitalism lifts people up from poverty. There are three branches of the U.S. government, not four. The U.S. Constitution is the strongest guarantor of freedoms in history. | My Republican opponents offered a lot of great points tonight but here's why my campaign is different: I'm going to revolutionize the way our government is run. The people who we elect to run the government are NOT the ones who actually run the government. It's the managerial class in the Deep State. You cannot reform these agencies. The only answer is to SHUT THEM DOWN , and I am the only presidential candidate who has the plan on how to actually do it. We have got to change the conversation. Stop talking about Biden & start talking about what we actually stand for as Republicans. Spouting off poll-tested platitudes about Biden makes us sound like partisan hacks. And that's exactly why it's going to take an outsider from a new generation to get the job done. I don't want a national divorce, and other candidates are pushing us toward the brink of that division. I'm running to lead us to a national revival. If we can revive that, then nobody in the world - not a nation, not a corporation, not a virus - will defeat us. Fellow American - are you ready for the revolution? name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

| |
---
| | | I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.
**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**
But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.
**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---

Fellow Conservative,

It’s Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy writing to you from Montana this afternoon.

Recently I came across an email from my opponent in my inbox in which he wrote to his supporters that he is “ _**one of the most vulnerable Democratic senators**_ ,” and that political experts are saying that his “ _**[Senate] seat is one of the most likely to flip red unless folks like you help**_ ...”

**He’s right** – he is vulnerable to defeat, and for good reason. Jon Tester represents a state in the United States Senate that Donald Trump won in 2020 by SIXTEEN POINTS.

Meanwhile, **Tester is in the United States Senate voting with Joe Biden 91% of the time.** I have a message for Jon: We’re running to represent Montana, NOT MASSACHUSETTS. _**

I know Jon Tester is vulnerable**_

_**Jon Tester knows he is vulnerable**_

****But unless you’re aware that this Senate race is one of Republicans' best chances to defeat a Democrat incumbent and flip the Senate, none of it is going to matter.****

Races are won by campaigns who can reach their target audience more efficiently and with greater regularity.

Right now, we’re losing the money game. ****[{link to donate}](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=8de0e355b3aa43cb9a78bb6b2ddb67c5&_e=wbd_IK3kf6rqrPRUnDMzEhfMBDrGR3-qwEpG1YodPqdfXBOinVwbZvYKkQCZAVakpb2mWhGB2EtzlBsxN8nME_MvD1ln04nfKLjNZzbxbQBHZE1KYGspCcTbNMWkzyBVGm_hVZe2BQ-2yyDNmGXSrsi7qZ3LmxcdaDQMzYbP9O40j2EDfWN8q62vOprZ89NcKxVVNlgWDwz3kneF8u1nOHL8Zl0Ewli6tHa1pBly1JZAnb9CqvvPiKdjSLvPbcZU7zW7P5hOOK2QCpYA8HQFix_nKOsG8JVPHXrfKfAhlmjyCH2-MYCoxlMURvpUt62WNR0P-FIBa3RDRsqDDZMRUSH6JVk3HA_kru9QWDtsrHK6XAoX0HXwN7Zy7MYWej1Dv_B9-q-ayUnIWnbv8ly9PkmCoILx69Iqx6rfwJHuxJ4%3D)**** Sen. Tester has raised more than $10 million this year from small-dollar donors like you. We’ve raised a fraction of that. We really need the help. Your donation really might make all the difference.

[**LINK TO DONATE** ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=8de0e355b3aa43cb9a78bb6b2ddb67c5&_e=wbd_IK3kf6rqrPRUnDMzEhfMBDrGR3-qwEpG1YodPqdfXBOinVwbZvYKkQCZAVakpb2mWhGB2EtzlBsxN8nME_MvD1ln04nfKLjNZzbxbQBHZE1KYGspCcTbNMWkzyBVGm_hVZe2BQ-2yyDNmGXSrsi7qZ3LmxcdaDQMzYbP9O40j2EDfWN8q62vOprZ89NcKxVVNlgWDwz3kneF8u1nOHL8Zl0Ewli6tHa1pBly1JZAnb9CqvvPiKdjSLvPbcZU7zW7P5hOOK2QCpYA8HQFi1--kSdBzGfFGQxud-htV6-x_Gzg97RQlQN1aZWdJTOUZtrr6169nEgIn5ejKhaxMAGx5BMKDJNPqlFQZ2CaCuSebCugeJrk9AYs2H9i2D1vbgCqsuZCXU4P0dWAKWi7wlG6R4GEb36xsUWlcroFwlY%3D)

**Please let me hear from you now or in the very near future.**

I cannot win this race without support from conservatives around the country.

**Not only will this be the toughest undertaking of my life, but it’ll also be ugly, too.**

You may or may not know who Jon Tester is but let me tell you this right now: _**you need to know his name**_. You’re going to be hearing it a lot over the coming 15 months.

[**I'D BE GRATEFUL IF YOU DONATED TODAY** ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=8de0e355b3aa43cb9a78bb6b2ddb67c5&_e=wbd_IK3kf6rqrPRUnDMzEhfMBDrGR3-qwEpG1YodPqdfXBOinVwbZvYKkQCZAVakpb2mWhGB2EtzlBsxN8nME_MvD1ln04nfKLjNZzbxbQBHZE1KYGspCcTbNMWkzyBVGm_hVZe2BQ-2yyDNmGXSrsi7qZ3LmxcdaDQMzYbP9O40j2EDfWN8q62vOprZ89NcKxVVNlgWDwz3kneF8u1nOHL8Zl0Ewli6tHa1pBly1JZAnb9CqvvPiKdjSLvPbcZU7zW7P5hOOK2QCpYA8HQFixvxYNhNzO_BRXyEeu3RE8cYorufir4LuSvk62eaxk7r3ByH04laNz_Pek6lyoV9Lh8gkN5u6TnVLzs_cXqs4F7MXZ2eDQQQ0hP_qiFPAOmu1ItVE3e0UPMg0ZZFTrHJzj32kKsP-q2gaUNwH_6Z9D0%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

It’s Speaker Newt Gingrich with a couple of thoughts for you today.

I recently met with some of my friends over lunch to talk shop, and during this lunch you can probably guess what we talked about: _**politics.**_

We discussed how we’re going to hold onto the House, while flipping the Senate in November 2024. _**I think it’s safe to say that everyone at the table agrees that though we certainly have our work cut out for us**_ , we’re in a good position to successfully execute our goals.

A couple of things came up that I want to talk to you about today, one in particular: **our chances of flipping the long-held Democrat Senate seat in Montana.**

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: The Jewish Principle of Tikkun Olam
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
Hey there, it’s Alex Padilla. My friend Jacky Rosen is in a tough re-election fight in Nevada, and we’re working to support her. I hope you’ll read the message from her below, and then [**consider splitting a contribution between our campaigns.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-august23-rosen.nPhahr&refcode=em230826-1-30&t=1&akid=1498%2E159979%2ELCT5Lp)**
[](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-august23-rosen.nPhahr&refcode=em230826-1-30&t=2&akid=1498%2E159979%2ELCT5Lp)
Can I tell you the story of how I first got involved in politics?
While serving as the president of Nevada's largest synagogue, I was recruited to run in a competitive House race to help flip a red seat blue. Looking back, it's incredibly fitting that _this_ was my entry point to public service – **because my Judaism is at the very _core_ of my work in the Senate today.**
**In fact, my decision to say "yes" and run for public office in the first place was guided by the Jewish principle of Tikkun Olam – which means to leave the world a better place than how we found it.**
Now, as the third Jewish woman and only former synagogue president in Senate history, I'm proud to serve Nevada and our country. And as we face everything from growing antisemitism to attacks on reproductive freedom to threats to tear down our very democracy, I'm as committed as ever to keep fighting to better this world and make positive change happen. **But I need your help.**
**Mitch McConnell's handpicked candidate has launched his campaign to defeat me, and recent polling shows me _2 points down_ in the race that experts say will likely decide Senate control. So please, I'm humbly asking:**
[**If the principle of Tikkun Olam resonates with you – if you're with me in the fight to continue making progress for the people and communities that we love – will you chip in $3 or more today - to split between my campaign and Alex Padilla’s - to help defend my seat in Nevada and our Democratic Senate majority?](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-august23-rosen.nPhahr&refcode=em230826-1-30&t=3&akid=1498%2E159979%2ELCT5Lp)**

name: Rick Coplen
subject: I’ll always stand with women
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Rick Coplen
body:
|
---
Today we celebrate Women’s Equality Day, which honors the official adoption of the 19th Amendment.

On this day in 1920, decades of hard work and organizing came to fruition as American women secured their fundamental right to vote. This landmark amendment forever changed the face of the American electorate, granting half the population the agency and a voice in our democracy they had previously been denied.

As the son of an immigrant mother, husband to a strong woman, and the father of two extraordinary young women, I have always believed and strongly advocated for equal rights for all. When I’m in Congress, I will fight to defend the rights and liberties of all women – whether it’s reproductive freedoms, pay equity, or the elimination of sexism wherever it exists.

[If you’re with me, sign on here to double down on our shared fight for equality!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68696272/423856249/-3511676?source=RC_EM_PT_WL_230825_1_1&refcode2=021ca0ae-1944-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&contactdata=MVNP/ql79+wDiL8B8fkd2QyCrDxHfkxOkcDl5MRwao2sJSq310QJDr/0ovSf4aGI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODExOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjFjYTBhZS0xOTQ0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X1urHTp4hEV-hkqj6ee5XGmVdKJH53NwSIW7MyCT7A8=&emci=7742b14f-a443-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=021ca0ae-1944-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=24669367) | | **[FIGHT FOR EQUALITY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68696273/423856250/-3511676?source=RC_EM_PT_WL_230825_1_1&refcode2=021ca0ae-1944-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&contactdata=MVNP/ql79+wDiL8B8fkd2QyCrDxHfkxOkcDl5MRwao2sJSq310QJDr/0ovSf4aGI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODExOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjFjYTBhZS0xOTQ0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X1urHTp4hEV-hkqj6ee5XGmVdKJH53NwSIW7MyCT7A8=&emci=7742b14f-a443-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=021ca0ae-1944-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=24669367)**
---
In recent years, the right of women to control their own bodies has been under unprecedented attack.

Simply put, we cannot have true equality under our democracy while millions of women are denied basic rights. Unlike Scott Perry, in Congress I will vote for both laws and a constitutional amendment to ensure that the reproductive freedom of women is once again guaranteed in America.

There is much more work to be done to deliver on our country’s promise of securing equal rights for all. I’m ready for the fights ahead – are you with me?

[Add your name in celebration of Women’s Equality Day and recommit to uplifting women’s rights today and every day!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68696274/423856252/-3511676?source=RC_EM_PT_WL_230825_1_1&refcode2=021ca0ae-1944-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&contactdata=MVNP/ql79+wDiL8B8fkd2QyCrDxHfkxOkcDl5MRwao2sJSq310QJDr/0ovSf4aGI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODExOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjFjYTBhZS0xOTQ0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X1urHTp4hEV-hkqj6ee5XGmVdKJH53NwSIW7MyCT7A8=&emci=7742b14f-a443-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=021ca0ae-1944-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=24669367) | **[FIGHT FOR EQUALITY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68696277/423856253/-3511676?source=RC_EM_PT_WL_230825_1_1&refcode2=021ca0ae-1944-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&contactdata=MVNP/ql79+wDiL8B8fkd2QyCrDxHfkxOkcDl5MRwao2sJSq310QJDr/0ovSf4aGI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODExOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjFjYTBhZS0xOTQ0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X1urHTp4hEV-hkqj6ee5XGmVdKJH53NwSIW7MyCT7A8=&emci=7742b14f-a443-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=021ca0ae-1944-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=24669367)**

clean_body: | Today we celebrate Women’s Equality Day, which honors the official adoption of the 19th Amendment. On this day in 1920, decades of hard work and organizing came to fruition as American women secured their fundamental right to vote. This landmark amendment forever changed the face of the American electorate, granting half the population the agency and a voice in our democracy they had previously been denied. As the son of an immigrant mother, husband to a strong woman, and the father of two extraordinary young women, I have always believed and strongly advocated for equal rights for all. When I’m in Congress, I will fight to defend the rights and liberties of all women – whether it’s reproductive freedoms, pay equity, or the elimination of sexism wherever it exists. | | In recent years, the right of women to control their own bodies has been under unprecedented attack. Simply put, we cannot have true equality under our democracy while millions of women are denied basic rights. Unlike Scott Perry, in Congress I will vote for both laws and a constitutional amendment to ensure that the reproductive freedom of women is once again guaranteed in America. There is much more work to be done to deliver on our country’s promise of securing equal rights for all. I’m ready for the fights ahead – are you with me? | Thanks for stepping up. – Rick | | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Friends of Rick Coplen | =

**If there is one thing we know: Uplifting women’s voices — especially Black women voices — means uplifting all voices.

So today, a day meant to remember when women were granted the right to vote, we’re launching our [_ELECT MORE BLACK WOMAN FUND!!_](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAhcSmTVOWKo16ku3WAKYDZdccNHDWlY9PkzJ-VkzSqHGN8tamh4HuFpnM6ijrXRcFQBDsiTkvvb2D2hl24E5hFu_e_yiWXHpL1Ztz4wK89Qe4WjQr3mmuX7UjkVpynvY7pHw5lXHiEx5fBJisS51gXd0RM6RTcPhkSWgPd5QZqvJAW1IqVA76VIAGexYGdDd9--tXAhWUVv8joQSH7n-65SO1bhMfiBZuZ_Uf8ZgdsoTT5TKCufPXzKXWfNNSqok_hyR1b2fW-OvxPR92ux2skCdr_om2FY8CafTyrr7JqnBcuzatm2l9waGlC5u1Srwfn7iP0hQQWJt4Vs7pgQsmnEyRbMRbgx5WX4a6p0bNQg/3z2/k9IYC6NoSyCnjt8qNVu0AA/h4/KA6uEzY7hgoRZIaH-xSylheSIOMZDsPEkOtwdrTgUHQ)**
While the right to vote was indeed granted to all women 103 years ago — it’s so important to remember that the path to victory was nowhere equal for Black women — who were frequently left out of the suffrage movement.

And remember, Peter, even when the right to vote was granted in 1920 — it was still another FORTY-FIVE years until we passed the _Voting Rights Act of 1965_!

And now — with ZERO Black women in the Senate and a Supreme Court who thinks racial discrimination is a thing of the past — we continue to lose ground. The best way to make it up is to elect more Black women to office up and down the ballot.

[**2024 may seem like a long way away but if we’re going to have the resources we need to send more Black women to office — we have to start now!! Will you donate to our *BRAND NEW* ELECT BLACK WOMEN FUND today? ** ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAhcSmTVOWKo16ku3WAKYDZdccNHDWlY9PkzJ-VkzSqHGN8tamh4HuFpnM6ijrXRcFQBDsiTkvvb2D2hl24E5hFu_e_yiWXHpL1Ztz4wK89Qe4WjQr3mmuX7UjkVpynvY7pHw5lXHiEx5fBJisS51g5z7AL_D0fWs2DqZqie5eiG5Yw6nBiVABBDTHh5y1-wk_6-JEQxrQF4excVWba6aCpwwlLXSNB_29x_mbITv25f9wl_GklUeUw-9KIEXjQo-aNrlVzabXQ9k6QwXbF1i2ahR5uNgI2Hn0VbrKxW_FIUq3a7nJ5kJ5xwaQq7hJGhwkNEDmADiW7IuOR_aIuNgQfzZCWzvc_nTW9MIUqrw_-Q/3z2/k9IYC6NoSyCnjt8qNVu0AA/h5/qra9U97u3-zqttG8AwFv8HdQV6hrJiWvP6jYiCKEkhA)

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5O3Wwmdygae0W-34efSvb_hfX51xtIkq_nCgr0tl8icajKJ5o-MAj5pnFd_kgC-TQTYXkfq3KqomH_fx6S2IuDh9Ji4BKYrICt1NzeLhbhP9YAn2MiZy9LN7EEVKHb92h0Px-6v2FNyegYfJ6XrT8R20AAvCeUAJPt00KD4fjWcTfG0FmC5mMxcCVJuMD5szErosAucdvCWJF5zKa0SIpHhfnsgIGwJS-gywR5FaWIx_5EpbkQFYbcpirCXV6_w0z4IgcsfG_pVBHhvdYdc1As-jgxr3iIKxeZfdzZF4CZw5Fcn13DHRwGHCCcYZcqF84SBdK8eB31Hk5HNZtPO9O4hSS3hoXqAPCKuAOh-JtEQ/3z2/k9IYC6NoSyCnjt8qNVu0AA/h12/xN2EeXaujrTaObDzBzO3-_xHzdD43SLQUCxBPg2B6Ss) The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | It’s Women’s Equality Day, Peter! We think the best way you can celebrate is to | If there is one thing we know: Uplifting women’s voices — especially Black women voices — means uplifting all voices. So today, a day meant to remember when women were granted the right to vote, we’re launching our While the right to vote was indeed granted to all women 103 years ago — it’s so important to remember that the path to victory was nowhere equal for Black women — who were frequently left out of the suffrage movement. And remember, Peter, even when the right to vote was granted in 1920 — it was still another FORTY-FIVE years until we passed the Voting Rights Act of 1965! And now — with ZERO Black women in the Senate and a Supreme Court who thinks racial discrimination is a thing of the past — we continue to lose ground. The best way to make it up is to elect more Black women to office up and down the ballot. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | To electing more Black women across the country! The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: Lesley J. Lopez
subject: I’m not your typical candidate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lopez for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/202306_ll_mmg?refcode2=img_logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/202306_ll_mmg?refcode2=img_logo]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/202306_ll_mmg?refcode2=img_logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/202306_ll_mmg?refcode2=img_logo] Be a founding donor to our people-powered campaign, and help meet our first mid-month goal! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/202306_ll_mmg?refcode2=link_CTA-top]
DONATE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/202306_ll_mmg?refcode2=btn_top]
Please, let me be clear, I have nothing against millionaires, except that ... I’m not one! 😆
In all seriousness, this makes me different from many candidates for Congress. In fact, I would be the first non-millionaire in this seat since 1993. But what others may see as a weakness, I see as a strength, and I hope you will too.
Because I come from a working-class background, I get what it’s like to struggle to pay your bills. I put myself through college with student loans and lots of blue-collar jobs like waiting tables, selling shoes at Macy’s, and being a housekeeper. It was tough, and many days I had to choose between feeding myself and paying for other necessities, but I made it.
My story isn’t unique, but it is rare among folks running for federal office. Because communicating with voters is expensive, one of the top criteria for Congressional candidates is that they can personally cover a huge portion of their campaign costs.
Although I don’t begrudge millionaires their fortunes, I think people who understand hardships should have more seats at the table. That’s why I’m proud that we are building this campaign one grassroots donation at a time.
So as we approach the deadline to reach our first mid-month fundraising goal, we’ve set a target of bringing in 150 donations before the clock strikes midnight on the 15th.
I’m asking, will you be one of the 51 more people we need to give to reach our goal? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/202306_ll_mmg?refcode2=link_CTA1] Anything you give — whether it’s $25, $50, $100, or the most generous amount you can — will make a huge impact to this people-powered campaign, I promise.
Thank you!
Lesley
When she’s not busy being a mom to her two toddlers, Lesley Lopez serves the people of Maryland as a Delegate from District 39 in the Maryland General Assembly. Since she was first elected in 2018, Lesley has rapidly become an effective legislator and leader, spearheading efforts to alleviate student debt, improve the delivery and efficiency of health care, and protect the limited financial resources of economically vulnerable Marylanders. Lesley has passed legislation to strengthen gun safety laws and guarantee the rights for all women in the state. She is an adjunct professor at George Washington University and a proud union member of SEIU Local 500. Lesley lives in Germantown, MD, with her husband Richard Kelly, and their two sons, Max and Graham.
DONATE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/202306_ll_mmg?refcode2=btn_biobox]
Paid for by Lopez for Congress
Lesley Lopez for Congress
PO Box 86931
Montgomery Village, MD 20886-6931
United States

The first $6,600/$10,000 from a person/multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Biden for President, with the first $3,300/$5,000 designated for the primary and the next $3,300/$5,000 for the general election. The next $41,300/$15,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to the DNC. The next $510,000/$255,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.
A contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant by contacting contact@joebiden.com. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Contributions will be used in connection with federal elections, may be spent on any activity as each committee determines in its sole discretion, and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. Biden Victory Fund does not accept contributions from corporations or their PACs, unions, federal contractors, national banks, those registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA, SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies, or foreign nationals.

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: This ain’t easy
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Working families and the middle class need somebody who will fight for them.
#

If you’re running for public office, you better have a good reason. It ain’t easy.
A bunch of people who have never met you are going to attack you, tear you down, smear your name.
You’re going to spend a lot of nights on the road, and a lot of time away from your loved ones.
But I’m not complaining — I know why I’m doing this. I’m running for the same reason I joined the Marines:
Because I love this country, and because I love the people in it. Working families and the middle class need somebody who will fight for them in the Senate. I will.
But to win this race, we have to raise some significant resources.
And the way this campaign is funded is by people like you chipping in to emails like this. Our average online donation is about $26, and we’ve had over 200,000 donations so far this year.
I’m really proud of that. You should be, too.
But we need a lot more to win. And that means we need to ask you to donate from time to time.
And today is one of those days.
[**If you’ve been waiting for the right time to make a donation, please: Make it today. We’ve fallen behind on our goals, and we really need your help. Anything you can afford will help us catch up.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug23.NWxa9e&refcode=em230826-1-f&t=1&akid=1041%2E734936%2EtASFte)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1045?c0=ruben-em-aug23.7Jwrcb&refcode=em230826-1-f&t=20&akid=1041%2E734936%2EtASFte)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1046?c0=ruben-em-aug23._xHikj&refcode=em230826-1-f&t=21&akid=1041%2E734936%2EtASFte)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1039?c0=ruben-em-aug23.hNnBDZ&refcode=em230826-1-f&t=22&akid=1041%2E734936%2EtASFte)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1040?c0=ruben-em-aug23.Q6fKq6&refcode=em230826-1-f&t=23&akid=1041%2E734936%2EtASFte)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1041?c0=ruben-em-aug23.EpL7PM&refcode=em230826-1-f&t=24&akid=1041%2E734936%2EtASFte)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-aug23.91DAaM&refcode=em230826-1-f&t=25&akid=1041%2E734936%2EtASFte)**
---
****
One last thing:
I never thought I’d have thousands of people like you backing me up. And I never thought I’d need to ask you to do more. But to win, I do.
Just know that I appreciate it, and I don’t take any of it for granted.
Thank you, Peter.
Ruben

name: Team Greta for AG
subject: Fitch is focused on headlines, not Mississippians
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greta Martin for AG
body:
Why hasn’t Fitch done her job to ensure free and fair elections?

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68698619/423864504/-456841951?refcode=BEB_EM_FR_230826CF_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDZmMzNlZTMtMWM0NC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=B_pmi4VHCgR5G9ls5rL7FoRum6t8xbvYD5tYUT58Y2c=) Peter,

Mississippi’s campaign finance laws are notoriously lax. Like, really lax. And it’s up to our attorney general to enforce the laws we do have on the books.

**So why hasn’t Mississippi Attorney General Lynn Fitch done her job to ensure free and fair elections?**

Notably, Fitch has failed to pursue flagrant campaign finance violations from Chris McDaniel’s campaign for Lieutenant Governor. A journalist for _Mississippi Today_ summarized the issue perfectly:
_“Fitch’s office has declined comment on why it would not pursue the original complaint, including where the unaccounted-for $15,000 went... Many political observers have surmised Republican Fitch is loathe to go after complaints about McDaniel for fear of angering his conservative base in the state GOP. Fitch’s office has faced some complaints of failing to fulfill responsibilities of the office, instead focusing on big headline-grabbing national issues and cases.”_ Peter, we’ve known from the get-go that Fitch is more focused on building her national profile than doing her job to uphold Mississippi’s laws. And that’s why we’re standing with Greta, a lifelong advocate for Mississippians who won’t hesitate to prosecute when people abuse our state laws.

[We have the opportunity to give Fitch the boot this November and elect an AG who will fight for every Mississippian. And right now, we’re gearing up our get-out-the-vote efforts so folks in every corner of the state know what’s at stake. clean_body: Why hasn’t Fitch done her job to ensure free and fair elections? = Peter, Mississippi’s campaign finance laws are notoriously lax. Like, really lax. And it’s up to our attorney general to enforce the laws we do have on the books. So why hasn’t Mississippi Attorney General Lynn Fitch done her job to ensure free and fair elections? Notably, Fitch has failed to pursue flagrant campaign finance violations from Chris McDaniel’s campaign for Lieutenant Governor. A journalist for Mississippi Today summarized the issue perfectly: “Fitch’s office has declined comment on why it would not pursue the original complaint, including where the unaccounted-for $15,000 went... Many political observers have surmised Republican Fitch is loathe to go after complaints about McDaniel for fear of angering his conservative base in the state GOP. Fitch’s office has faced some complaints of failing to fulfill responsibilities of the office, instead focusing on big headline-grabbing national issues and cases.” Peter, we’ve known from the get-go that Fitch is more focused on building her national profile than doing her job to uphold Mississippi’s laws. And that’s why we’re standing with Greta, a lifelong advocate for Mississippians who won’t hesitate to prosecute when people abuse our state laws. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Thanks for standing with us, Team Greta for AG Greta Kemp Martin was born, raised, and educated in Mississippi. She is an active member of the Mississippi Bar, and currently works as the Litigation Director for Disability Rights Mississippi, the protection and advocacy agency for the state. As Attorney General, Greta will fight for the rights of everyday Mississippians, and stand up for the working people of this state. = Paid for by Greta Martin for AG Greta Kemp Martin for Attorney General PO BOX 16402 Jackson, MS 39236 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Mark Warner
subject: The top 3 things that annoy me about Tim Kaine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
let’s dive in

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68698744/423865294/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTBjMzQwYS0xZDQ0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4hnJk5tSRmE1U6G1mRcZtIO16x03NCL_khGY8hojhlc=&emci=5f51c82f-b942-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=210c340a-1d44-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, I’ve had the honor of being Tim Kaine’s friend since we met at Harvard Law School in 1980. For over 40 years, I’ve watched him wholeheartedly serve Virginia, first as mayor of Richmond, then as my Lieutenant Governor, and later Governor, before serving together in the United States Senate. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68698746/423865296/729265428?refcode=mw_em_230826_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTBjMzQwYS0xZDQ0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4hnJk5tSRmE1U6G1mRcZtIO16x03NCL_khGY8hojhlc=) (We also make a pretty good band – here’s us jamming at the Floyd Country Store in VA) This means I’ve spent _a lot_ of time with Tim and gathered plenty of intel on him. So as I sat down to write this email __[**asking you to support Senator Kaine’s re-election campaign,**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68698748/423865298/729265428?refcode=mw_em_230826_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTBjMzQwYS0xZDQ0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4hnJk5tSRmE1U6G1mRcZtIO16x03NCL_khGY8hojhlc=)__ I found myself wondering exactly what I should say to you to assure you that Tim is the right choice to represent Virginia in Congress. And then it dawned on me: **I want to tell you the top 3 things that annoy me the most about Tim Kaine.** First off, Tim is way too nice! As a former civil rights attorney and missionary, he’s spent his entire career committed to social justice, being driven by the value of kindness and the belief that it can change peoples’ lives. And he’s a genuinely good guy on top of that. Second, he’s ridiculously good at playing the harmonica. Seriously, he carries them in his briefcase, just in case a jam session breaks out on the Senate floor. Third and finally, and I’ve said this before, he’s a deeply optimistic person. Sometimes I can be a glass half-empty kind of guy, but Tim’s always seems about 2⁄3 full. We need someone like Tim Kaine in the Senate. Tim’s value of kindness and decency is what drives his undying dedication to serving the people of Virginia. And in a Congress plagued by partisan division, Tim’s relentless optimism keeps him from giving up in the crucial fights to protect voting rights, safeguard a woman’s right to choose, and more. Now the harmonica... that one might not always translate to his work as a Senator, it’s just really great to watch. The thing is, Tim’s seat could very well determine if the GOP takes control in 2024. Republicans are working overtime to oust him next year and take back control of the Senate. **__[**So I’m asking you today if you can split a $5 donation between my campaign and Tim Kaine’s so we can send him, his kindness, impressive harmonica playing, and optimism back to the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68698750/423865300/729265428?refcode=mw_em_230826_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTBjMzQwYS0xZDQ0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4hnJk5tSRmE1U6G1mRcZtIO16x03NCL_khGY8hojhlc=)__** I know Tim very well, and I know he’s not done building a Virginia that works for all. **__[**Help re-elect Senator Kaine and defend our Democratic Senate majority by splitting a contribution today >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68698751/423865303/729265428?refcode=mw_em_230826_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTBjMzQwYS0xZDQ0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4hnJk5tSRmE1U6G1mRcZtIO16x03NCL_khGY8hojhlc=)__** Thank you, Mark ** ** ********[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68698752/423865304/729265428?refcode=mw_em_230826_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTBjMzQwYS0xZDQ0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4hnJk5tSRmE1U6G1mRcZtIO16x03NCL_khGY8hojhlc=)********

name: Michael B. Moore
subject: The all-male Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael B
body:
When we defeat Nancy Mace and I go to Congress, I will PROUDLY vote to codify Roe v. Wade nationwide.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68698865/423865570/-1369586090?refcode=em230826_scban&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjUwYzM0MGEtMWQ0NC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vua3GvVZOVJ5Fxrae1xic0yB5c8WQPvFvWP72DQqWzo=&emci=4dbbf578-8843-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=250c340a-1d44-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=14781535) | Peter, The South Carolina Supreme Court — **[the only all-male state high court in the country](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68698868/423865575/750159418?refcode=em230826_scban&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjUwYzM0MGEtMWQ0NC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vua3GvVZOVJ5Fxrae1xic0yB5c8WQPvFvWP72DQqWzo=&emci=4dbbf578-8843-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=250c340a-1d44-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=14781535)** — just upheld extreme Republicans' six-week abortion ban. Since six weeks is before most people know whether they're pregnant, this ruling effectively bans abortion in my state. **I believe everyone should be free to decide when they start or expand their family. Period.** Nancy Mace and her fellow MAGA extremists think judges and politicians should be involved in those decisions. That's why we're booting her out of office and taking back the House in 2024. **Here's my promise, Peter: When we defeat Nancy Mace and I go to Congress, I will PROUDLY vote to codify _Roe v. Wade_ nationwide — and restore the freedoms cruelly stolen from millions of Americans last year.** _[**We can only win if we reach every voter in this swing district and ensure they know what's at stake. Please chip in anything you can to power our fight to flip this seat and restore reproductive rights for ALL!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68698871/423865578/1426579746?amount=3&refcode=em230826_scban&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjUwYzM0MGEtMWQ0NC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vua3GvVZOVJ5Fxrae1xic0yB5c8WQPvFvWP72DQqWzo=)_ [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68698875/423865582/89202668?amount=3&refcode=em230826_scban&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjUwYzM0MGEtMWQ0NC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vua3GvVZOVJ5Fxrae1xic0yB5c8WQPvFvWP72DQqWzo=) Nancy Mace is just as extreme on this issue as South Carolina's all-male Supreme Court. In 2019, she voted for a six-week abortion ban in the state legislature. Last month, when House Republicans proposed making it harder for members of our Armed Forces to access reproductive care, Nancy Mace called it an "asshole move" — [**_then voted for it anyway!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68698879/423865586/1517459709?refcode=em230826_scban&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjUwYzM0MGEtMWQ0NC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vua3GvVZOVJ5Fxrae1xic0yB5c8WQPvFvWP72DQqWzo=&emci=4dbbf578-8843-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=250c340a-1d44-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=14781535) And while she voted YES on attacking the freedoms of those who serve, she voted NO on expanding the child tax credit, NO on the job-creating infrastructure bill, and NO to gun violence prevention measures to keep our kids safe in schools. **Reproductive freedom is a TOP issue for folks in this swing district. If we can bring in the resources to communicate our position on this issue, I'm confident we'll win this race, take back the House, and codify _Roe_. [_Can you chip in $3 now to help make it happen?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68698883/423865590/1426579746?amount=3&refcode=em230826_scban&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjUwYzM0MGEtMWQ0NC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vua3GvVZOVJ5Fxrae1xic0yB5c8WQPvFvWP72DQqWzo=)** name: David Trone
subject: A personal note on Women’s Equality Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Trone for Maryland
body:
Peter –

103 years ago today, the 19th Amendment was certified in our nation’s Constitution. While white women were able to celebrate this major victory without caveat, Black women across the nation still faced voter disenfranchisement and Jim Crow laws that would keep them from the ballot box for years to come.

Today’s anniversary marks one stage in women's long fight for political equality. I can’t help but reflect on that long journey and the path still lay ahead of us before reaching gender equity.
I come from a long line of formidable women.

Both my grandmother and my mother’s generations made tremendous progress towards achieving their rights as full and equal citizens in our democracy. But now, for the first time in our country's history, a generation of American women – including my three daughters – have fewer rights than their mothers did.

So on this Women’s Equality Day, I’m asking you to join me in our fight to ensure that all women – regardless of their race, sexual orientation, identity, or socioeconomic status – can lead a life of opportunity, justice, and dignity without barriers to their basic American rights.

STAND WITH WOMEN [https://secure.ngpvan.com/sWoEx4KGlkSeHSi1JzF2AQ2]

– David

Paid for by David Trone for Maryland.
David Trone for Maryland
P.O. Box 83998
Gaithersburg, MD 20883-3998
United States
