name: VoteVets.org
subject: ☀️ To all VoteVets supporters - please don’t click away 🫡
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
When we think about the people who have done the most to support VoteVets over the years, it’s not the people who write the biggest checks who come to mind.
#
Derek -
When we think about the people who have done the most to support VoteVets over the years, it’s not the people who write the biggest checks who come to mind.
It’s the people who were there when everything was on the line.
Like you, Derek.

Your support, voice, and participation has helped us run some of the most powerful election ads out there and flipped races for Democrats.
It’s helped us fight for things that matter most to Veterans like the PACT Act and stopping Republicans from defunding the VA. And right now, it’s helping us take the fight to Tommy Tuberville and the GOP over their dangerous blockade on Military promotions. It’s helping us invest in important Virginia races. And it will lead to big victories in 2024.

But here’s an interesting fact: out of almost 2 million people who have taken action with VoteVets, only 1% have made a donation to support our work.
Today, we’re asking you to join that select group.

Our average donation is $25. Some give more, many give less. But with the GOP waging an all out assault on our Military, all that matters is that you’re choosing to power our work with a donation before our end-of-month deadline ends at midnight tonight.
We’ll put it right to work fighting and defeating these liars and hypocrites in the most important election cycle in modern American history — the one we’re in right now.
[**If helping VoteVets run some of the most effective election ads of the cycle, ads that win races seems worth $3 to you, we’re humbly asking you to make that donation before our deadline on August 31. disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Our children deserve so much better than this
#

We shouldn’t live in a country where this is a news headline:
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug23.8Y_0mi&refcode=em230826-1-30&t=1&akid=6431%2E3935704%2EV8VgE9)
A brand new analysis of CDC data reveals in 2021, 4,752 children died by gun violence, surpassing the already high record set in 2020.
Gun violence is the **number one** cause of death for American children.
[**Our children deserve so much better than this. Will you please make a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today to help us continue our work to make our communities safer?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug23.8Y_0mi&refcode=em230826-1-30&t=2&akid=6431%2E3935704%2EV8VgE9)

clean_body: Our children deserve so much better than this We shouldn’t live in a country where this is a news headline: A brand new analysis of CDC data reveals in 2021, 4,752 children died by gun violence, surpassing the already high record set in 2020. Gun violence is the number one cause of death for American children. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | There are so many lifesaving solutions to stop preventable gun violence. Safe storage laws would help ensure that children can’t access guns in their homes. Universal background checks and extreme risk protection orders would help ensure that guns don’t end up in the wrong hands. But getting this commonsense legislation passed at the federal level won’t be easy. With a Republican House majority and a narrowly divided Senate, we’re up against too many elected officials who would rather side with the gun lobby than do the work to keep their constituents safe. Our children don’t deserve to grow up in fear. Thank you for working with us to make our country a safer place for generations to come. \- The team at GIFFORDS ** Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

subject: This is what my mother taught me

body:
| Peter, I’m running to be Florida’s next U.S. Senator — and I hope you’ll give me a moment to share why.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68699726/423868163/-1296989123?amount=25&source=EM_NBI_dwspac_20230826_FR_1.1_0_3MO_DMP_NA_NA_powellsplit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjRlNWViNy0xZTQ0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P4XlYQn-BNWvwlnLZ2VrgmAxV8ahVThwmTp0L7Vl03Q=)
_My husband and three children._
I was born in Ecuador, and when I was 14, my mother brought my sisters and me to America in search of a better life.

We made a new home in a small, one room apartment in America. My mother worked double shifts as a home health care provider and at night, she took classes to learn English. When I was 15, I started picking up shifts at the local doughnut shop to help us make ends meet.

My mother’s hard work, incredible sacrifices, and relentlessly fierce hope made it possible for me to graduate college and become the first South American immigrant to serve in Congress. **She taught me that a better education, a better home, and a better future is always possible if we never give up. This is the promise of America.**

**_And that’s why I’m running for Senate. Because Florida deserves better, and we’ve got to fight for it._**

Right now, our state is being pushed backward by far-right extremists like my opponent, Sen. Rick Scott. He’s targeting the most vulnerable amongst us, dividing our communities, and threatening the American dream. It’s no wonder why a mere 40% of Floridians view him favorably.

With experts saying Rick Scott is one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection in 2024, I know that we can defeat him and restore the promise of America — but not without all hands on deck.

**_[So please, will you join the fight for a better future by splitting a donation of $25 between Democrats Win Seats and my campaign? Heyyyyyy Peter, it’s John Fetterman.
You know me — I like to keep it short(s):
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230826-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230826-1&refcode2=503_552475_E3cXVa&akid=503%2E552475%2EE3cXVa)
So let’s get right to it: **Bob Casey is one of the top targets of Mitch McConnell and national Republicans, and he needs our grassroots help to win.**
[**Can you chip in to help re-elect Bob and keep us fighting for PA in the Senate?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230826-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230826-1&refcode2=503_552475_E3cXVa&akid=503%2E552475%2EE3cXVa)

Fun fact: I’ve been able to increase my shorts time ever since I figured out I don’t have to wear a suit to vote “yea” or “nay” from the threshold of the Senate chamber. 😎
And every single “yea” or “nay” in the Senate is important, Peter, because we’ve got a razor-thin 51-seat Democratic majority. **That’s why we have to do everything we can to re-elect Bob and defend our majority in Pennsylvania.**
[**With Republicans ready to pour million$ of dollars into our Commonwealth to defeat Bob Casey, we need tons of grassroots support right away. Can you chip in to help us win + keep Bob Casey in the fight with me?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230826-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230826-1&refcode2=503_552475_E3cXVa&akid=503%2E552475%2EE3cXVa)

❤️ John

name: Shawn Wilson
subject: Reintroducing myself
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
This email’s a longer one, so I hope you’ll take some time to read it.

Peter, In a moment I’d like to reintroduce myself and share why I’m running to be governor of Louisiana, but first: **_[My campaign has a critical $30,000 end-of-month fundraising goal coming up, and with just a few weeks left until the primary, we can’t afford to fall short. Please, chip in $5 to help us hit this crucial target!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68700853/423872426/334608572?amount=5&refcode=ea.bdedb53a-2144-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.bdedb53a-2144-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzOTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmRlZGI1M2EtMjE0NC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2FeSJ6MpCkfYsdx2oirnminqMKED8WwYJHolASbMvBE=)_** **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68700855/423872428/334608572?amount=5&refcode=ea.bdedb53a-2144-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.bdedb53a-2144-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzOTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmRlZGI1M2EtMjE0NC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2FeSJ6MpCkfYsdx2oirnminqMKED8WwYJHolASbMvBE=)** My name is Shawn Wilson, and as a son of Louisiana, I bet we probably have a few things in common, Peter. I grew up in a middle-class family in Algiers, attended university in Lafayette, worked in the community after graduating, and became a devoted husband and father (and eventually grandfather) along the way. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68700856/423872429/334608572?refcode=ea.bdedb53a-2144-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.bdedb53a-2144-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzOTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmRlZGI1M2EtMjE0NC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2FeSJ6MpCkfYsdx2oirnminqMKED8WwYJHolASbMvBE=)
_That’s me on the left, surrounded by my wonderful family on the day I qualified to run for governor_ Seven years ago, I was appointed Secretary of the Department of Transportation and Development to bring my unique brand of leadership to a struggling department. At the time, Louisiana was facing record budget deficits and a slumping economy. The department was short on funds and hadn’t broken ground on many of the big infrastructure projects that we’d needed for _decades._ Well, we got to work bringing local, state, and federal leaders together in collaboration with business owners, farmers, and neighborhood associations. In the end, we got things done and created the largest infrastructure investment in our state’s history. **The bottom line is this: I love my home state of Louisiana, and I have spent my career working to make our state better — something I vow to continue as our next governor.** So, I have a favor to ask, Peter: **_[Will you make your first contribution to my campaign to help hit our critical end-of-month fundraising goal before the deadline? We’re counting on your support to reach more voters, win this high-stakes election, and build a stronger Louisiana for ALL.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68700857/423872430/334608572?refcode=ea.bdedb53a-2144-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.bdedb53a-2144-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzOTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmRlZGI1M2EtMjE0NC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2FeSJ6MpCkfYsdx2oirnminqMKED8WwYJHolASbMvBE=)_** clean_body: This email’s a longer one, so I hope you’ll take some time to read it. Peter, In a moment I’d like to reintroduce myself and share why I’m running to be governor of Louisiana, but first: = = My name is Shawn Wilson, and as a son of Louisiana, I bet we probably have a few things in common, Peter. I grew up in a middle-class family in Algiers, attended university in Lafayette, worked in the community after graduating, and became a devoted husband and father (and eventually grandfather) along the way. = That’s me on the left, surrounded by my wonderful family on the day I qualified to run for governor Seven years ago, I was appointed Secretary of the Department of Transportation and Development to bring my unique brand of leadership to a struggling department. At the time, Louisiana was facing record budget deficits and a slumping economy. The department was short on funds and hadn’t broken ground on many of the big infrastructure projects that we’d needed for decades. Well, we got to work bringing local, state, and federal leaders together in collaboration with business owners, farmers, and neighborhood associations. In the end, we got things done and created the largest infrastructure investment in our state’s history. The bottom line is this: I love my home state of Louisiana, and I have spent my career working to make our state better — something I vow to continue as our next governor. So, I have a favor to ask, Peter: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Shawn = = = | | PAID FOR BY WILSON FOR LOUISIANA Wilson for Louisiana P.O. We have to break the supermajorities to protect North Carolina’s democracy!
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68700901/423872478/823540626?refcode=ea.c0edb53a-2144-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.c0edb53a-2144-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGVkYjUzYS0yMTQ0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cikZHQk6Sk63tIqIhOfv4e_PqzwypxxpCiqaw3UKrf0=&emci=eabca22e-8443-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=c0edb53a-2144-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
Peter, radical Republicans have made one thing very clear: _They care far more about holding onto power than they do about upholding our constitutional rights._ Roy recently vetoed a far-right proposal that is designed to make it harder for some groups of people to vote. But we know that the GOP legislative leaders are planning further attacks and might try to override the Governor’s veto. This is crunch time. **[Peter, it’s up to us to break the supermajorities and protect the future of North Carolina’s democracy. You can help by donating to support Roy’s work for Democratic candidates.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68700902/423872480/435245919?refcode=ea.c0edb53a-2144-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.c0edb53a-2144-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGVkYjUzYS0yMTQ0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cikZHQk6Sk63tIqIhOfv4e_PqzwypxxpCiqaw3UKrf0=)** The founding promise of our democracy is that _we the people_ have the power to decide who represents us. But Republicans’ aim is to let _the legislature_ decide who gets to vote! Not only is it anti-democratic, it’s _dangerous_ — plain and simple. **[Roy will do everything possible to protect North Carolinians’ voting rights, but we also need to kick these anti-voter elected officials OUT of our legislature and elect leaders who’ll stand up for us. clean_body: We have to break the supermajorities to protect North Carolina’s democracy! | Peter, radical Republicans have made one thing very clear: They care far more about holding onto power than they do about upholding our constitutional rights. Roy recently vetoed a far-right proposal that is designed to make it harder for some groups of people to vote. But we know that the GOP legislative leaders are planning further attacks and might try to override the Governor’s veto. This is crunch time. = The founding promise of our democracy is that we the people have the power to decide who represents us. But Republicans’ aim is to let the legislature decide who gets to vote! Not only is it anti-democratic, it’s dangerous — plain and simple. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = = Thank you! Friend, just hours after launching my campaign for U.S. Senate, I spoke with Lawrence O’Donnell on MSNBC to talk about why I’m running to defeat Sen. Rick Scott and flip Florida blue. [](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/21591?t=7&akid=1962%2E564421%2EslNyp0) Rick Scott has failed us in Florida. He’s proposed tax increases on working families, advocated for a nationwide abortion ban, and wrote the GOP plan to end Social Security and Medicare. He’s pushing our state backward – and we need to fight back.

**But there’s good news: Experts at _CNN_ , _FiveThirtyEight_ , and _Roll Call_ all agree that Florida is one of Democrats’ best opportunities to flip a Senate seat blue in 2024, and new polling shows this race is nearly TIED at 44% to 43%. **

We can defeat Rick Scott, folks, but only with all hands on deck. [**Will you split a donation of $3 between Ron Be Gone and my campaign to flip Florida blue and defend our Senate majority? Debbie Mucarsel-Powell

Friend,

After receiving tips from concerned parents in Livingston, NJ, my team investigated and found that "equity, inclusion, and diversity" was taking precedence over reading, writing, and arithmetic with elected school board members.

**Indoctrination starts behind closed doors in almost every instance – whether in school boards nationwide or in corporate America training rooms.**

Radicals attempt to push identity politics on just about everyone – and our kids are the most vulnerable.

The best way to handle this is by exposing it, **and that's why my team at OMG is handing out cameras to parents around the nation** – empowering them to break their own stories and impact their community with change.

So, when I showed up at a school board meeting in Livingston, NJ, to announce our effort to arm parents with undercover cameras, the board’s chairman, Vineeta Khanna, **ironically ordered me to stop recording (violating New Jersey's recording laws).**

While I asked my cameraman to put his camera down, I made the announcement and then proceeded to show them how they would be recorded by pointing out a hidden camera in the room – they didn't seem thrilled.

Thankfully, Ms. Khanna and elected school board members around America cannot stop parents equipped with hidden cameras and trained to ethically use them.

**Now here's where things got interesting.**

As I left the meeting, I faced local law enforcement who had been called on me!

[](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxcjzFvgzAQRn_NsYHsM5gwMLRFdGgVde1UGfsCbrmYGBDKv69AUYeu7z199hmeRn-511A-A-Lg3QyIoJ4A8fa5cVy_-e01PX-8pzd95mKX-AKIy32iv_IxkhEbP-60bBJXG20u5BKqpa6U0Ih5lQx1Z5zpNCorHKlCW3RSldidpKZCquqU-BoFKnFCLQuRizwjReQKS9IWqjOqglwcD2VGbibGEDizgZOxHpZlmo8ftYDtTHaNlJkrubDsBWAbfoguxOS86WNYpx1xn852CGFMu2CiS7lLA4Nq14W_5rBGS6Ca_xWg3v2-tPLhH8Qanozvr6Aa7h5sobg3W5SA2nBYrwuoBkUSazdtfhz9rEvIRX9cZQP_BgAA__8-2YBn)
I can't make this stuff up.

Their fear of exposure, combined with their ignorance of the law, should alarm us all – as these are the folks tasked with leading entire school districts to educate our children while setting an example of morality and character values.

Do you trust them?

**I certainly don’t.**

**[Watch the video here](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxcjzFvgzAQRn_NsYHsM5gwMLRFdGgVde1UGfsCbrmYGBDKv69AUYeu7z199hmeRn-511A-A-Lg3QyIoJ4A8fa5cVy_-e01PX-8pzd95mKX-AKIy32iv_IxkhEbP-60bBJXG20u5BKqpa6U0Ih5lQx1Z5zpNCorHKlCW3RSldidpKZCquqU-BoFKnFCLQuRizwjReQKS9IWqjOqglwcD2VGbibGEDizgZOxHpZlmo8ftYDtTHaNlJkrubDsBWAbfoguxOS86WNYpx1xn852CGFMu2CiS7lLA4Nq14W_5rBGS6Ca_xWg3v2-tPLhH8Qanozvr6Aa7h5sobg3W5SA2nBYrwuoBkUSazdtfhz9rEvIRX9cZQP_BgAA__8-2YBn)** , and if you can, please chip in to cover the costs of equipping parents with cameras and knowledge so they can take control of these rogue leaders.

Respectfully,

James O’Keefe

subject: re: weekend plans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=388%2E52803%2E9xZxtj)

| | I know I should be off enjoying my weekend and NOT staring at a computer screen—but I just couldn’t resist reaching out one more time, Peter. You see, this is the FINAL weekend before Angela’s End-of-Month deadline. **And right now, we’re having our worst fundraising week of the _entire_ campaign.** **[So please, before you go on and enjoy the rest of your Saturday, could you spare just $25 to make sure we elect Democrat Angela Alsobrooks as Maryland’s next U.S. Senator?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/5120?t=9&amount=25&akid=388%2E52803%2E9xZxtj)** | | | [Chip in $25](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/5120?t=10&amount=25&akid=388%2E52803%2E9xZxtj)
---
| | [Other Amount](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/5120?t=11&amount=35&akid=388%2E52803%2E9xZxtj)
---
It’s not easy running a campaign against a self-funded, multi-millionaire, Peter.
**And it’s especially difficult around fundraising deadlines,** when we have to hit big $$ goals to make sure we’re not losing ground to the wealthy and well-connected.
So yes, my only weekend plans are helping Angela have the strongest fundraising push possible before Thursday’s deadline. **But I’m not asking you to do the same, Peter.**
**[Instead, I’m asking you to pitch in $25 so we can help Angela Alsobrooks win Maryland’s U.S. Senate race _before_ you go on to have the best weekend imaginable. >>](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/5120?t=12&amount=25&akid=388%2E52803%2E9xZxtj)**
| | [Chip in $25](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/5120?t=13&amount=25&akid=388%2E52803%2E9xZxtj)
---
| | [Other Amount](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/5120?t=14&amount=35&akid=388%2E52803%2E9xZxtj)
---
Thanks for the help,
Daniel Cooper
_Deputy Campaign Manager
Angela Alsobrooks for Senate_

Today marks **103 years since women first won the right to vote.** Since then, so many brave women leaders have paved the way for female senators like me and Jacky – but there's still a long road ahead to reach true equality for women.
We still are working to close the gender wage gap so women can finally earn the same amount as their male counterparts. We are trying to expand access to paid leave so no one has to choose between taking care of a sick loved one and missing a paycheck. And critically, we're facing an extreme Republican party that is doing everything it can to rip away women's reproductive rights – including by pushing for a national abortion ban.
**That's why it's so important that we re-elect Jacky, a strong pro-choice, pro-woman fighter whose battleground race in Nevada could decide Senate control. **
**[In honor of Women's Equality Day, will you donate $5 today to help me and Jacky continue fighting for abortion rights and women everywhere? Every dollar will be split between our campaigns. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68702247/423877064/-393630507?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk110-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmZmMzBhMC0yMjQ0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pAsG60ZeEjfFLxdJ93BjyCPCnHaYKDzPxijlWSFBk-g=)**

They’ve nominated a Trump surrogate, NRA member, and near-billionaire that will say and spend anything to try to get the people of Indianapolis to vote for him. ****= The last thing Indianapolis needs is a mayor that won’t work to overturn the extreme ban on women’s healthcare that will worsen our state’s brain drain and force countless women into dangerous situations. = Thanks, Indiana Dems | | | = | = [content goes here] 101 W Washington St., #1110E Indianapolis, IN 46204 Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. body:
We need your help.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68702438/423877994/1843371473?refcode=EM_F_230825highschool_N_TN_90DO_7_G_TestB_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgwNzAxOTUzLTIzNDQtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yBk8ZZHnIQHUfc2gfUOQF1pMejkVLTbGi8x-yQIno6A=)
| Fellow activist,

You have probably heard about our voter registration blitz we’re kicking off at college campuses around the state, but that’s not all we have planned. With your help, we hope to travel to high schools across Pennsylvania to ensure eligible students register to vote.

[**We are working to develop relationships with high schools to set up tabling focused on high school seniors, but to pull this off, we need your help. Can you rush $25 to help us fund this critical program?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68702443/423878000/1843371473?refcode=EM_F_230825highschool_N_TN_90DO_7_G_TestB_L1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgwNzAxOTUzLTIzNDQtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yBk8ZZHnIQHUfc2gfUOQF1pMejkVLTbGi8x-yQIno6A=)

We know this can work. Last year, our team went to Chester High School in Chester City and had great success: [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68702446/423878007/1843371473?refcode=EM_F_230825highschool_N_TN_90DO_7_G_TestB_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgwNzAxOTUzLTIzNDQtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yBk8ZZHnIQHUfc2gfUOQF1pMejkVLTbGi8x-yQIno6A=)
But we also know what’s at stake if we aren’t able to get this program off the ground:

Low youth participation is **disastrous** for our democracy and young people alike, and there is too much at stake to sit idly by. That’s why we center the youth (17-35) in our work and will be out on the ground conducting voter registration and civic education in several high schools, college campuses, and universities all across Pennsylvania.

Our staff speaks directly to students, listens to what they have to say, and ensures they have the information they need to make their voices heard, but we cannot do this alone.

[**When we engage with new voters face-to-face, they are more likely to turn out when it matters most and vote for their values. Can you rush $25 to help fund this program? →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68702450/423878011/1843371473?refcode=EM_F_230825highschool_N_TN_90DO_7_G_TestB_L2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgwNzAxOTUzLTIzNDQtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yBk8ZZHnIQHUfc2gfUOQF1pMejkVLTbGi8x-yQIno6A=) Peter, In just a moment, I’m going to ask if you can spare $1 to help fund our efforts to elect more women into Congress. **[_If you want, you can cut to the chase by donating your four quarters right here >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68703213/423880734/-529510226?amount=1&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230826_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTMyNTI1OTAtMjU0NC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uRrlZk7ke8X8cOg_Kc1bQYP1zfpP09GlktQ7ygh_-II=),** but here’s why it’s so important. Fundraising has really slowed down this summer and right now, we’re not on track to hit our end-of-month goal next week. $1 may not seem like a lot to you — especially compared to the billionaire mega donors and shady super PACs Republicans have in their corner — but we have the power of the grassroots on our side. $1 from every single person reading this email will add up quickly, and give us the kind of momentum we need to elect more women and take back the House majority in 2024. We already know that the more our government looks like us, the more it works for us. We need more women in positions of leadership in order to make sure our voices are heard, and that we have a seat at the table. Otherwise, we’ll never make progress on codifying abortion access, paid family leave, closing the gender pay gap, and more. name: Jon Tester
subject: Fundraising is one of the worst parts of the job
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
I’m a third-generation farmer, the Senate’s only working dirt farmer, and I’ll never stop fighting for the hardworking people that call Montana home.

| I'll be honest, Peter —

Fundraising is one of the worst parts of this job, **but just a few moments from now I’ll have to ask you to make a donation.**

Give me a chance to explain: I’m not asking this often because I like it. I do it because national Republicans and out-of-state super PACs are pledging to spend outrageous amounts of money to attack my character and **the only chance we have to respond is by collecting grassroots donations from a whole lot of people.**

_Peter, my opponents will try to turn me into someone I'm not, because they can’t beat who I am._

I’m a third-generation farmer, the Senate’s only working dirt farmer, and I’ll never stop fighting for the hardworking people that call Montana home.

**Since we officially launched my reelection campaign, tens of thousands of people all over the country have chipped in to support us.** That’s something I’m proud of, and it means that I’ll have a fighting chance to stand up to the millions of dollars the GOP will spend against me.

**But we can’t slow down, not even for a minute, because experts are already saying that this will be the most expensive election in Montana’s history.**

[_**So with all eyes on our race, I have to ask, can I count on you to make a split donation between my campaign and Fight for Progress right now to help us reach our end-of-month goal in 5 days? This is important. I need your help.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68703260/423880826/665036970?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230826-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYyYmU1YmEzLTI1NDQtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3edh-xKX0hkbRZfp5VfuUB6cVPXfgGN3U-F_3VLcO3E=)

body:
Today, we’re hoping you’ll allow us to give you five reasons why your $5 contribution is so important to Ilhan Omar.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=468%2E791427%2EiEtnUU)

Hi there,
Today, we’re hoping you’ll allow us to give you five reasons why your $5 contribution is so important to Ilhan Omar.
1. In 2022, Ilhan won her primary against a challenger by just 2,466 votes, and our opponents are already recruiting another challenger who will uphold the status quo in Congress. So we cannot take this race for granted.

2. The right wing has already made Ilhan one of their top targets this election cycle. According to new reports, AIPAC’s Super PAC is recruiting candidates to defeat the Squad — and Ilhan is one of their top two targets1. This is the same super PAC that took a _$1 million_ contribution from a billionaire Trump mega-donor earlier this year, all with the intention to interfere in Democratic primaries2.

3. Ilhan is a proven progressive champion. We need to keep her in Congress so she can continue her work to fight for Medicare for All and the Green New Deal, and so much more.

4. We aren’t banking on super PACs with millionaire and billionaire donors to swoop in and save the day for Ilhan. Instead, we rely on the people. This movement is powered by folks just like you giving small amounts of money at a time.

5. In just 5 days, we’re facing our August fundraising deadline. If we want to reach our goals, we need a large outpouring of support before our deadline passes.

We hope these five reasons show just how important your contribution to Ilhan Omar is today. Now, the choice is yours:
**[Will you please chip in $5 — or any amount that makes sense for you — to Ilhan Omar before her August fundraising deadline on Thursday?](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-aug23.SAeyb4&refcode=em230826-1-t2&t=2&akid=468%2E791427%2EiEtnUU)**

Thank you for all that you do to support our movement.
\- Team Ilhan

name: Wisconsin Senate Update
subject: Republicans are going all-in to flip Wisconsin red
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Tammy Baldwin needs your support today.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1042%2E35263%2E1tX3cW)
Peter — Wisconsin is home to some of the most competitive elections in the country. That’s why Republicans are going **ALL-IN** to flip our state red this election. Don’t just take our word for it:
* The GOP held their first presidential debate in Milwaukee this week
* Right-wing extremist group Moms for Liberty hosted a presidential town hall in Wisconsin
* Donald Trump Jr. even came to town to drum up MAGA support as a surrogate for his father’s campaign

In a state where the past two presidential elections were decided by less than 1%, it’s no surprise Republicans are making their presence felt in Wisconsin this early. But it’s not just Wisconsin’s 10 electoral votes they’re after — **they are gearing up to defeat Tammy and take back the Senate too.** Not one but two mega-millionaires are considering jumping into the race for Wisconsin’s U.S. Senate seat — and they have personal warchests to bankroll their entire campaigns to defeat Tammy. name: Team Katie Porter
subject: re: Vivek Ramaswamy’s take on single women
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=28768%2E3422442%2E6Jjpdu)
We wanted to make sure you saw Katie’s email following Wednesday’s Republican debate. We hope you have a chance to read it, and if you’d like to help us send the first single mom of school aged kids and a champion for families to the U.S. Senate, **consider making your first donation to our grassroots powered campaign today:** **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230826-1](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230826-1?refcode=EMAK26_1_GOP_20230826_V1_F&refcode2=28768_3422442_6Jjpdu&akid=28768%2E3422442%2E6Jjpdu)**
---
* * *
There was a lot of BS flying around last night’s GOP debate, but this line from Vivek Ramaswamy caught my attention: **_"The government pays single women more not to have a man in the house."_**
This is a demeaning and frankly, flat-out false statement. As one of Congress' only single moms of school-aged kids, I've called attention to how our tax code unfairly punishes single parents. When the Child Tax Credit was enacted during the pandemic, for example, married parents making less than $150,000 per year qualified for monthly payments. But for single parent families, you only qualified if you made less than $112,500 per year.
I fought this unequal treatment because there’s no “single parent discount” for groceries, kids’ shoes, rent, or childcare. **By punishing single parent families, we punish the children whose families are often most in need of assistance.**
**When I was advocating against a single parent penalty, I asked why it existed in the first place. The answer was "no one's asked about it before."** That might be because no single mom of young kids had ever served in Congress—until I was elected in 2018. If elected to the Senate, I'd be the first single mom of school-aged kids to serve there too.
We don’t need guys like Vivek demonizing millions of single parents in America who need their government to work for them—we need leaders on the national level who will fight for _all_ families and champion investments in schools, affordable childcare, and in paid leave policies.
[**That's why I'm running for the U.S. Senate, and I'd be so honored to have you on our team.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230826-1?refcode=EMAK26_1_GOP_20230826_V1_F&refcode2=28768_3422442_6Jjpdu&akid=28768%2E3422442%2E6Jjpdu)
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230826-1?refcode=EMAK26_1_GOP_20230826_V1_F&refcode2=28768_3422442_6Jjpdu&akid=28768%2E3422442%2E6Jjpdu)
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAK26_1_GOP_20230826_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=28768_3422442_6Jjpdu&akid=28768%2E3422442%2E6Jjpdu)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=28768%2E3422442%2E6Jjpdu)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=28768%2E3422442%2E6Jjpdu)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Imagine the Democratic Party without AOC, Jamaal Bowman, Cori Bush, or Summer Lee.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

For a team with a small budget, we’ve had quite an impact in the last few
years.

Imagine the Democratic Party without AOC, Jamaal Bowman, Cori Bush, or
Summer Lee. We recruited each one of these transformative leaders to run
for Congress and with your support we took on the establishment and won.

Justice Democrats in Congress are still fighting every single day for
issues that match the scale of the crises we face. Summer Lee, Rashida
Tlaib, and Jamaal just introduced the Oligarch Act, which would tax
extreme wealth and make sure the 1% are paying their fair share.

But as you know, our fundraising slowed way down over the last year.

As a grassroots-supported organization, our fundraising makes a big impact
on the level of support that we’re able to offer our endorsed candidates.
In order to sustain our work for the long haul, we need your
support, Peter.

Every month we set goals to keep our budget on track and right now we’re
racing against the clock to reach our $85,000 end of month goal.

Thank you for being a part of this movement to transform the Democratic
Party from the inside out.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/137465?refcode=em20230826-30549&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=30549%2E1203867%2EXaIiCX ]If you’ve been waiting to make your first contribution to support our
work, this is the best time because your donation will help us reach our
critical end-of-month fundraising goal. Will you donate right now?

Together we will continue to fight for progress for all of our
communities,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1003&akid=30549%2E1203867%2EXaIiCX ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the

Knoxville, TN 37932

| Fellow Conservative, can I share something important with you?

Over the last six months we've held more than 100 campaign events across the country, met with thousands of voters, and drawn a line in the sand on important policy issues.

Now, I just completed my **FIRST** debate, and we're continuing to build a **SURGE** of momentum.

**BUT** , we still have a lot of ground to cover in order to win the White House and save our country!

_**[As we continue to build a winning campaign, I want to remind you why I am running for president and why your support matters.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6238ddd22863403e902df4a50088d378&_e=PDCt9dWaQ9DO_M0Y7AAhrZcrQmEdwmNzQWn6FPrxyKndvlekR0P3Q27d60U3M8ApBAGX3PTAWIHQiKQ5rdqUVjLSrRzd5KpMrZM9DgmNY5Vuk5BuUAkjwSYjn_pjQrBTbh3Sfb47kLiSvnOFsV_w8zxC4-EtMW0PpQlogHO-jEKb3DRUGsYFxk_PFPvH-Y3jZmw7AOwSgiVhuptCxpcvJcMQCkSBdwniwfYbDZF6rwbsVZpF2b46R40dNosvSG3D7BIcGp3V0kD3oMcM45a-UV-974pFILaqe6fex9N7CAckFPpT87jDFMjVpJqt-dI73Z91UlPKunOz2ovMcX0ySnlOKWuU8ktkIjlo48PF51w%3D "As we continue to build a winning campaign, I want to remind you why I am running for president and why your support matters.")**_

---
| [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6238ddd22863403e902df4a50088d378&_e=PDCt9dWaQ9DO_M0Y7AAhrZcrQmEdwmNzQWn6FPrxyKndvlekR0P3Q27d60U3M8ApBAGX3PTAWIHQiKQ5rdqUVjLSrRzd5KpMrZM9DgmNY5Vuk5BuUAkjwSYjn_pjQrBTbh3Sfb47kLiSvnOFsV_w8zxC4-EtMW0PpQlogHO-jEKb3DRUGsYFxk_PFPvH-Y3jRh9ULQT1O0lNneFQpkJ2wlUE3cVl4V29N2k5LBEROrLPsVi4tnzwFmpfiookffInHTO-_7-m382moIBjrJczja99ff0b1RChdh3A8M4kZ9i1WaOEg-M5sMrjhVpz6e0dvgzuhajjVN8vQCBwcx0oT9B8WdZMGU7evzfozYDId3Y%3D)
---

I'm a proud daughter of legal immigrants, a wife of a combat veteran, and a mother of two. I have watched the American Dream unfold before me.

_**But, with the Democrats in power, our future is slipping. **_

Right now, we have too many families paying too much for groceries; too many small businesses who can't afford rent, and too many big businesses getting taxpayer bailouts.

We have too much crime on our streets - too many drugs flooding our cities - and too few police and border patrol.

And from Joe Biden on down, our leaders put too much trust in big government and too little trust in the American people.

They have us spiraling toward socialism, with a new trillion-dollar spending bill every few months, and _a national debt over 32 trillion dollars._

_**This is not the America I want to leave to my children! **_

I am running for president to save our country from the downward spiral of socialism and defeatism. I aim to move America upward toward freedom and strength.

_**[But, I need your help to make it happen. Can I count on you?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6238ddd22863403e902df4a50088d378&_e=PDCt9dWaQ9DO_M0Y7AAhrZcrQmEdwmNzQWn6FPrxyKndvlekR0P3Q27d60U3M8ApBAGX3PTAWIHQiKQ5rdqUVjLSrRzd5KpMrZM9DgmNY5Vuk5BuUAkjwSYjn_pjQrBTbh3Sfb47kLiSvnOFsV_w8zxC4-EtMW0PpQlogHO-jEKb3DRUGsYFxk_PFPvH-Y3jtDpcwHrQNea1Q6xjMSdhlLGhXPJSSrhVmaEPGGm11BWFKuh9FSf2cH78QOI2V76SPXjB0pKCoCLPwaoMQGHJ-XNxEkOJT33eVw48wWNa_RDyjA7rfSp4dvymd-kQl9n_NIjlQ-OSuGhrShoxzGnTEYnUhfL8vLWCmm8q68nfSl0%3D "But, I need your help to make it happen. Can I count on you? ")**_

I can promise you, America is always worth fighting for.

As a brown girl, growing up in a black-and-white world, I saw the promise of America unfold before me.

As the proud wife of a combat veteran, I saw our people's deep love of freedom, and determination to defend it.

As Governor, I saw our state move beyond hate and violence, and lift everyone in peace.

And as Ambassador, I saw that America is still the standard.

Our moment is now - and our mission is clear.

_**[Will you help me save our country and secure our future?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6238ddd22863403e902df4a50088d378&_e=PDCt9dWaQ9DO_M0Y7AAhrZcrQmEdwmNzQWn6FPrxyKndvlekR0P3Q27d60U3M8ApBAGX3PTAWIHQiKQ5rdqUVjLSrRzd5KpMrZM9DgmNY5Vuk5BuUAkjwSYjn_pjQrBTbh3Sfb47kLiSvnOFsV_w8zxC4-EtMW0PpQlogHO-jEKb3DRUGsYFxk_PFPvH-Y3joQhKmTV5v2MK9yA1WCBGAiTMEBO0V7ZCf_SD9jwOKaP62dR0xAjvMj8CTV-fldle6jRenL97HEcNr03JuEsq-KkjSNgdVptkbAsamLhVJvUSaI5uxfrepZL_e62dIUHigyGiByxLOTTDtRHvIs9CaqgJrTGdRoYStTgHudHbmlw%3D "Will you help me save our country and secure our future?")**_

If you can join me today by chipping in, it would mean so much to me.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6238ddd22863403e902df4a50088d378&_e=PDCt9dWaQ9DO_M0Y7AAhrZcrQmEdwmNzQWn6FPrxyKndvlekR0P3Q27d60U3M8ApBAGX3PTAWIHQiKQ5rdqUVjLSrRzd5KpMrZM9DgmNY5Vuk5BuUAkjwSYjn_pjQrBTbh3Sfb47kLiSvnOFsV_w8zxC4-EtMW0PpQlogHO-jEKb3DRUGsYFxk_PFPvH-Y3js37kmL4fTnpLg01LoTbZVgyKHcm-22MNOyVTik6ZO4QtuooB-9TNQmJjClx9ZbdUwdyVhd4UzWPnXSXSOPrA70dOvaKQfqc_yyLdKwYHCLF_yLyLhdREBzyJRMvIWD5bPUXs69WjA9KHz8RErhKi8b9DnIOAOWCGDYv0wvh7AeM%3D "I appreciate your support more than you can imagine. If you can join me today by chipping in, it would mean so much to me.")**

Thank you for everything you do for our country.

My very best,
Nikki R. Haley

clean_body: Over the last six months we’ve held more than 100 campaign events across the country, met with thousands of voters, and drawn a line in the sand on important policy issues. | | | | | | | | | Fellow Conservative, can I share something important with you? Over the last six months we've held more than 100 campaign events across the country, met with thousands of voters, and drawn a line in the sand on important policy issues. Now, I just completed my FIRST debate, and we're continuing to build a SURGE of momentum. BUT , we still have a lot of ground to cover in order to win the White House and save our country! "As we continue to build a winning campaign, I want to remind you why I am running for president and why your support matters." | I'm a proud daughter of legal immigrants, a wife of a combat veteran, and a mother of two. I have watched the American Dream unfold before me. But, with the Democrats in power, our future is slipping. Right now, we have too many families paying too much for groceries; too many small businesses who can't afford rent, and too many big businesses getting taxpayer bailouts. We have too much crime on our streets - too many drugs flooding our cities - and too few police and border patrol. And from Joe Biden on down, our leaders put too much trust in big government and too little trust in the American people. They have us spiraling toward socialism, with a new trillion-dollar spending bill every few months, and a national debt over 32 trillion dollars. This is not the America I want to leave to my children! I am running for president to save our country from the downward spiral of socialism and defeatism. I aim to move America upward toward freedom and strength. "But, I need your help to make it happen. Can I count on you? " I can promise you, America is always worth fighting for. As a brown girl, growing up in a black-and-white world, I saw the promise of America unfold before me. As the proud wife of a combat veteran, I saw our people's deep love of freedom, and determination to defend it. As Governor, I saw our state move beyond hate and violence, and lift everyone in peace. And as Ambassador, I saw that America is still the standard. Our moment is now - and our mission is clear. "Will you help me save our country and secure our future?" | | "I appreciate your support more than you can imagine. If you can join me today by chipping in, it would mean so much to me." Thank you for everything you do for our country. My very best, Nikki R. Fellow American,

I’m the conservative running for California’s 9th Congressional District who is going to flip this top-target House seat and retire a failed Democrat incumbent who votes with Biden 95% of the time.

Believe it or not, I’m also the mayor of one of California’s largest cities.

After watching my city suffer from crime, homelessness, and economic hardship, I decided to take on the powerful Democrat incumbent – _and I won._

Now, we’re reducing crime and homelessness, revitalizing our economy, creating jobs, and balancing our budgets.

**As a conservative who’s proven I can win in blue California,[I now need your help to flip CA-9.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c52c05f0864c47efa4307006500ec553&_e=2v8BV_VwggLvoOfTh3_vwLw0zym3tZv-FVZY4rbgp0mvQpYHyDU6AfCLSF6U5oq_vNXjnanH8VgvychmOyCN1aztfhe2RhoNNacn_gBm0sfM1jXXxv0pT50iDYwFdeV6TH7St_30DDh2mBsbvaFiPuz4RGjCeiFxwfCy1m-_Ky_ies3h4OsNeq_GYdTt7bVCmmOXX89QsZjHa5-yalwgCTgxUphOYp0lDceO7FgJ4wob7Zx2t-KoHfeNOSie0lZey6dZ2rLRKpF45YOOpLsZ-lL2v6fTCyTWNI8xCs8zVtv_guhSubhMcUDDD8nqLiEQOfJuMU9BJMZlxdeeaONnCBAAEq-EZk7JDvgc9MatE1F3ir_ob69dSlYtSMhjr060)**

House Republican leadership has identified this race as **one of our best chances to flip a seat and grow our majority.**

[ ** Help Kevin Flip CA-9 ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c52c05f0864c47efa4307006500ec553&_e=2v8BV_VwggLvoOfTh3_vwLw0zym3tZv-FVZY4rbgp0mvQpYHyDU6AfCLSF6U5oq_vNXjnanH8VgvychmOyCN1aztfhe2RhoNNacn_gBm0sfM1jXXxv0pT50iDYwFdeV6TH7St_30DDh2mBsbvaFiPuz4RGjCeiFxwfCy1m-_Ky_ies3h4OsNeq_GYdTt7bVCmmOXX89QsZjHa5-yalwgCTgxUphOYp0lDceO7FgJ4wq75gq9aC2wjBOVHVpFgZ6QamXlGbd41s05fxJW6OE06f2L2KzVbiIjT0pgPA7uYFeMLmbnWZ0ktNc1Mu0OunYXicy_xwXhSUj9d2qxmOmjzDto7NrUS4HkP7pIzgYDsfDwKGhdM2VL_w8hReHiPgHj)
I’ve already received endorsements from Speaker McCarthy, Majority Leader Scalise, and Conf. Chair Stefanik – [**and now I need your support too.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c52c05f0864c47efa4307006500ec553&_e=2v8BV_VwggLvoOfTh3_vwLw0zym3tZv-FVZY4rbgp0mvQpYHyDU6AfCLSF6U5oq_vNXjnanH8VgvychmOyCN1aztfhe2RhoNNacn_gBm0sfM1jXXxv0pT50iDYwFdeV6TH7St_30DDh2mBsbvaFiPuz4RGjCeiFxwfCy1m-_Ky_ies3h4OsNeq_GYdTt7bVCmmOXX89QsZjHa5-yalwgCTgxUphOYp0lDceO7FgJ4woBQhuFGgciADYs9a1Kz3ZJzQ_iSL8_XNFHakgnppAwSFfoUzN-l3gaMdb7IdWo2NLMwBYFhit136UL57rjsz35tP6jM90zg7vZoERGNydZaeZu8Fnznj2ZRYJjs53c5Y_pByqvCaPn3-VSZKVYavdQ)

We need to get inflation under control, secure our borders, end government corruption, support our veterans & military, and protect our freedoms.

But we need to flip this seat so we have a fail-proof House majority that can work with a Republican president and Senate to get America back on track.

[**Will you join our effort to flip this top-target House seat by supporting my campaign with a contribution of $10, $25, $50 or more?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c52c05f0864c47efa4307006500ec553&_e=2v8BV_VwggLvoOfTh3_vwLw0zym3tZv-FVZY4rbgp0mvQpYHyDU6AfCLSF6U5oq_vNXjnanH8VgvychmOyCN1aztfhe2RhoNNacn_gBm0sfM1jXXxv0pT50iDYwFdeV6TH7St_30DDh2mBsbvaFiPuz4RGjCeiFxwfCy1m-_Ky_ies3h4OsNeq_GYdTt7bVCmmOXX89QsZjHa5-yalwgCTgxUphOYp0lDceO7FgJ4wrANezHuBrn802ZHz1ls0clVUK5I52oLUwu9XqxMCwkZtN0-POGg4p22grFKbR-4EnwRMp0-y0ha33wrInM2usfFxs-P1xgusbOBfTbNDDX2dfs1GtpmXdPz9ynlKkP_g1d6DOYFCTnC6itmMSVMMPg)

Thank you,

Kevin Lincoln

Republican for Congress

[ ** Help Kevin Flip CA-9 ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c52c05f0864c47efa4307006500ec553&_e=2v8BV_VwggLvoOfTh3_vwLw0zym3tZv-FVZY4rbgp0mvQpYHyDU6AfCLSF6U5oq_vNXjnanH8VgvychmOyCN1aztfhe2RhoNNacn_gBm0sfM1jXXxv0pT50iDYwFdeV6TH7St_30DDh2mBsbvaFiPuz4RGjCeiFxwfCy1m-_Ky_ies3h4OsNeq_GYdTt7bVCmmOXX89QsZjHa5-yalwgCTgxUphOYp0lDceO7FgJ4wrboU0z5CEIv9Eg9apFBrSguf7MIZMp40ipnDFqIt3odeplhrhA2kMuKLmKklgkbBCw7wSIVTkNobJHsN4_b0-NHHqfy2CMODkR5-f5eAq2TayOLnUhAUMcljex8efN_Hz7j3rVYMclNzsPlp0LfNi_)

| **Meet Kevin Lincoln
**
My name is Kevin Lincoln, and my story, is the Valley’s story. I am a 3rd generation Stocktonian, raising a 4th generation in the city I love. I’m the grandson of Mexican immigrants, and my stepfather is an Army veteran.

Like many Stocktonians, my family has overcome economic setbacks. My own father struggled to survive on these streets, and was at one time, homeless. But I never let adversity define me. I joined the Marines and served in the White House Military Office, assigned to Marine One. I graduated college while working full-time and raising a family. I’ve worked in corporate America and served our community as a pastor, and as a non-profit leader.

I’m blessed with a beautiful wife, Bonnie, and two amazing children. I’ve lived a life of service, but the greatest honor of my life has been giving back to my community, through serving as Mayor of my hometown, Stockton.

Fellow Conservative,

It’s Speaker Newt Gingrich with a couple of thoughts for you today.

I recently met with some of my friends over lunch to talk shop, and during this lunch you can probably guess what we talked about: _**politics.**_

We discussed how we’re going to hold onto the House, while flipping the Senate in November 2024. _**I think it’s safe to say that everyone at the table agrees that though we certainly have our work cut out for us**_ , we’re in a good position to successfully execute our goals.

A couple of things came up that I want to talk to you about today, one in particular: **our chances of flipping the long-held Democrat Senate seat in Montana.**

Fellow Conservative,

It’s Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy writing to you from Montana this afternoon.

Recently I came across an email from my opponent in my inbox in which he wrote to his supporters that he is “ _**one of the most vulnerable Democratic senators**_ ,” and that political experts are saying that his “ _**[Senate] seat is one of the most likely to flip red unless folks like you help**_ ...”

**He’s right** – he is vulnerable to defeat, and for good reason. Jon Tester represents a state in the United States Senate that Donald Trump won in 2020 by SIXTEEN POINTS.

Meanwhile, **Tester is in the United States Senate voting with Joe Biden 91% of the time.** I have a message for Jon: We’re running to represent Montana, NOT MASSACHUSETTS. _**

I know Jon Tester is vulnerable**_

_**Jon Tester knows he is vulnerable**_

****But unless you’re aware that this Senate race is one of Republicans' best chances to defeat a Democrat incumbent and flip the Senate, none of it is going to matter.****

Races are won by campaigns who can reach their target audience more efficiently and with greater regularity.

Right now, we’re losing the money game. ****[{link to donate}](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=255d0ec20fd84277bb552119402877d8&_e=ZigQP-2bBPhr1H7a-B7vwLdo6N5PjMY2VkNNr__vveFeWQsszk0pbReFWKSOvCtwRatcqKd_pwqIXlIrAAYZE0VXq9crmQ4R6o8wfn_CAde824ZRQqVDhXItyEqHX0TH6mDA1DX2L3Lh5c8DKWTGNwkkSqarZ3KQh6TUXi87HgzQhl_sV2yMZ_-LTx0rGEtkzwd4ZQ3l7KZTfFgx6ixRm7GJg7XOk4V0GljDPBVvGQolRn-Ix1OiuoVEUpy68dd3SkFDYQL8E0lYndRKB6a7g-FD1aPp1zdcgpWY1OQ-UpldS46WwVk-2XCJ9ksT8EVtiH2pNJ-3gsXWV_Y5_tQtJOUGUADrfqJYmYBVrPvGsC-7gQQC47FMkdhfgQK1bAsC3FEHisJ616FOtp6mxqBFV2Y0UVrsfX4leVUU7QVeSEw%3D)**** Sen. Tester has raised more than $10 million this year from small-dollar donors like you. We’ve raised a fraction of that. We really need the help. Your donation really might make all the difference.

[**LINK TO DONATE** ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=255d0ec20fd84277bb552119402877d8&_e=ZigQP-2bBPhr1H7a-B7vwLdo6N5PjMY2VkNNr__vveFeWQsszk0pbReFWKSOvCtwRatcqKd_pwqIXlIrAAYZE0VXq9crmQ4R6o8wfn_CAde824ZRQqVDhXItyEqHX0TH6mDA1DX2L3Lh5c8DKWTGNwkkSqarZ3KQh6TUXi87HgzQhl_sV2yMZ_-LTx0rGEtkzwd4ZQ3l7KZTfFgx6ixRm7GJg7XOk4V0GljDPBVvGQolRn-Ix1OiuoVEUpy68dd3E3kWIXfB_Dl-i-52LW73HzOH2nCsW_AEdxN0L8PJEF6HYVbO7UKP3JT4QXbiLyJk73G1rNiPEMiDtjfUI6MsqRMifmOQTvKtsgc20tYwN_7-lelIIAYKPT5ib83XcWEmDKC6s1CDWpeX5eLi9r0VPIUTNiixv1kK8NRNUFd7sJQ%3D)

**Please let me hear from you now or in the very near future.**

I cannot win this race without support from conservatives around the country.

**Not only will this be the toughest undertaking of my life, but it’ll also be ugly, too.**

You may or may not know who Jon Tester is but let me tell you this right now: _**you need to know his name**_. You’re going to be hearing it a lot over the coming 15 months.

[**I'D BE GRATEFUL IF YOU DONATED TODAY** ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=255d0ec20fd84277bb552119402877d8&_e=ZigQP-2bBPhr1H7a-B7vwLdo6N5PjMY2VkNNr__vveFeWQsszk0pbReFWKSOvCtwRatcqKd_pwqIXlIrAAYZE0VXq9crmQ4R6o8wfn_CAde824ZRQqVDhXItyEqHX0TH6mDA1DX2L3Lh5c8DKWTGNwkkSqarZ3KQh6TUXi87HgzQhl_sV2yMZ_-LTx0rGEtkzwd4ZQ3l7KZTfFgx6ixRm7GJg7XOk4V0GljDPBVvGQolRn-Ix1OiuoVEUpy68dd3qOJt3wYq5COvoXYoprilLNnvWIlYUjH3QlagvrDuToHoPaj4npUQ99i0Wqul-j_4-wjFQVI4juzoIh9pZa0h1q3A1isO-LYqKkvaWiQVHt_JpKansWLjjIfzB2Mj-WiNscvtRojglt8l1d9Cyvjb9opEtAtuLaQDxNLLoVeFyRc%3D)

Thank you,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

|
* * *

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

name: Colin Allred
subject: sorry to email again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend, I know I already emailed you about our massive voter outreach operation we're launching to retire Ted Cruz.
But my finance director just called to let me know we're still falling $21,282 short of our August fundraising goal and need to pick up the pace before our strict deadline.
Voter suppression is no joke, especially in Texas.
It's already one of the hardest states to cast your ballot in, and the GOP is trying to make it even tougher. But here's the thing: Republicans wouldn't be trying so hard to stop people from voting if they weren't seriously worried about movements like ours.
Texas is a battleground state, friend – Ted Cruz won his last race by barely 2% of the vote. And our voter outreach efforts will make all the difference in our race to defeat Ted Cruz. That's why I urgently need your help: Please, will you rush $10, $20, or any amount to me and Serve America to make sure we hit our $300,000 goal tomorrow to reach voters and flip Texas blue? → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Every dollar makes a difference. Thank you so much.
Colin

He’s great at uniting people and pups, inspiring change, and delivering
results for everyone. He’s also great at giving belly rubs.

his fundraising goal this month.

Fellow Conservative,

It’s Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy writing to you from Montana this afternoon.

Recently I came across an email from my opponent in my inbox in which he wrote to his supporters that he is “ _**one of the most vulnerable Democratic senators**_ ,” and that political experts are saying that his “ _**[Senate] seat is one of the most likely to flip red unless folks like you help**_ ...”

**He’s right** – he is vulnerable to defeat, and for good reason. Jon Tester represents a state in the United States Senate that Donald Trump won in 2020 by SIXTEEN POINTS.

Meanwhile, **Tester is in the United States Senate voting with Joe Biden 91% of the time.** I have a message for Jon: We’re running to represent Montana, NOT MASSACHUSETTS. _**

I know Jon Tester is vulnerable**_

_**Jon Tester knows he is vulnerable**_

****But unless you’re aware that this Senate race is one of Republicans' best chances to defeat a Democrat incumbent and flip the Senate, none of it is going to matter.****

Races are won by campaigns who can reach their target audience more efficiently and with greater regularity.

Right now, we’re losing the money game. ****[{link to donate}](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9a80a0c6bf3041248826701fd322c830&_e=Nm0LFudokkeZdeQkosal15dEwyKIEjzZ7EpN_SkYHtNOJjVbhmOwuvFZaKc6M96kPpuMmC6I1m8PFM41uz7J2kv1GnW4mVEhjekLo_EH9v93VsXg7K3UqsX_b09BY3FsuRaE0_GhGIZsTcPiZhJIumgtTR9-1W8n9VJYZgUt-594QUzvt9wvhrfpSfYoz8OwvLsecN3B0eDdhSRsCuySogXMEw9HztYuTgTpIrMzNvM9IMKjtjDHyhM3g4GnvZRdodo6DViemfQZjua-eNZqo91l5CXIjYqiH_i7cjLqp5YasFkKLpn2J_JUTSrPmzJeqqpEIWJg9vNnH0A8HIHJ1yYMLMQSIiDHAKcWnAzWrkbFGrVOnIoKmozzaU8ag05yfYqxoVIB8XFr_BgPa2qdcSR_57PX0d1pqDk3KCxMbzA%3D)**** Sen. Tester has raised more than $10 million this year from small-dollar donors like you. We’ve raised a fraction of that. We really need the help. Your donation really might make all the difference.

[**LINK TO DONATE** ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9a80a0c6bf3041248826701fd322c830&_e=Nm0LFudokkeZdeQkosal15dEwyKIEjzZ7EpN_SkYHtNOJjVbhmOwuvFZaKc6M96kPpuMmC6I1m8PFM41uz7J2kv1GnW4mVEhjekLo_EH9v93VsXg7K3UqsX_b09BY3FsuRaE0_GhGIZsTcPiZhJIumgtTR9-1W8n9VJYZgUt-594QUzvt9wvhrfpSfYoz8OwvLsecN3B0eDdhSRsCuySogXMEw9HztYuTgTpIrMzNvM9IMKjtjDHyhM3g4GnvZRdodo6DViemfQZjua-eNZqo934NlPgydunXvrHJIlA5bKGn0t92aBFizM4cAjJoPGfZdnKvPZJKZL-V2HRjuntKj82c3cyeSUOHAVZYmn53msJ3sVWR2jKdrLMxdvdF-xnDjYz8ItgcJOpN4g-SJEkcy8Fl77J1OwM71dWKAyQQ8k%3D)

**Please let me hear from you now or in the very near future.**

I cannot win this race without support from conservatives around the country.

**Not only will this be the toughest undertaking of my life, but it’ll also be ugly, too.**

You may or may not know who Jon Tester is but let me tell you this right now: _**you need to know his name**_. You’re going to be hearing it a lot over the coming 15 months.

[**I'D BE GRATEFUL IF YOU DONATED TODAY** ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9a80a0c6bf3041248826701fd322c830&_e=Nm0LFudokkeZdeQkosal15dEwyKIEjzZ7EpN_SkYHtNOJjVbhmOwuvFZaKc6M96kPpuMmC6I1m8PFM41uz7J2kv1GnW4mVEhjekLo_EH9v93VsXg7K3UqsX_b09BY3FsuRaE0_GhGIZsTcPiZhJIumgtTR9-1W8n9VJYZgUt-594QUzvt9wvhrfpSfYoz8OwvLsecN3B0eDdhSRsCuySogXMEw9HztYuTgTpIrMzNvM9IMKjtjDHyhM3g4GnvZRdodo6DViemfQZjua-eNZqowb41El2EKeSPCdTIITW_ypHrZTrMeVDYaWql16mcEWu5_1lEnEf5HWAI2MDiIXz0PTUu-hInm2ik7ZEfw7ekkVsIA6VsaApB1SWzapw2ooZzwDiknU-ligb5k5jQBj19ixmQRBtdDRfAi7K3kOqiXQ%3D)

Thank you,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

|
* * *

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9a80a0c6bf3041248826701fd322c830&_e=Nm0LFudokkeZdeQkosal15dEwyKIEjzZ7EpN_SkYHtNOJjVbhmOwuvFZaKc6M96kPpuMmC6I1m8PFM41uz7J2kv1GnW4mVEhjekLo_EH9v93VsXg7K3UqsX_b09BY3FsuRaE0_GhGIZsTcPiZhJIumgtTR9-1W8n9VJYZgUt-594QUzvt9wvhrfpSfYoz8OwvLsecN3B0eDdhSRsCuySogXMEw9HztYuTgTpIrMzNvM9IMKjtjDHyhM3g4GnvZRdodo6DViemfQZjua-eNZqowKSsJUglMde4lKWA-CtBl2tyE1_izXs5VpGX9dK5rlwMFprWIWJLu3QqyF68z20KNbReJoluRkYFxhJRuJ6OG_-wtUEYq9YxeG_iIBAIOF41Enj74yM81iSr46eQUs8z0niMSntp37wxaPbH5H_ei4%3D)

* * *

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9a80a0c6bf3041248826701fd322c830&_e=Nm0LFudokkeZdeQkosal1x3AuomD0SJRXLI5FChH4RBe5o77JxPvdKFiSeYjN7Ldooh7L0pfcPKPQYOB1wbLaIu45BP0N4H4x-uHfW0qETSyULWA8AcGpydZA0dv8slIO9gIQcLYXTo-g-Ot-AESgOK9F-bKCmqg9EXSzFON6nq3g6ifueCPsU-WqeuSSsVSrl4RuphYI_TeUcA1K9Bxxw%3D%3D) [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9a80a0c6bf3041248826701fd322c830&_e=Nm0LFudokkeZdeQkosal11PvQPy6nlfItLPXszFFtlU-_Jozouy0_W649Bq8DuIB453LE0ktQj3lNg0HSHQROaSgaf9ppzZ8wHfyLzxKerKrMFTg5WRBwLsxLRxZWr7e9ak5-7SBe7aTeHIv_KPAdKRJA_rUfh50x4SpVv5ocJBt4geHdMPo4YIMpU2aDIZb-1eznaDTXlMrVsFdcoHLfQ%3D%3D) [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9a80a0c6bf3041248826701fd322c830&_e=Nm0LFudokkeZdeQkosal12NEYeBjYuomafBHJ_GE87eAzuvZOSYhtivGg-wGlF3jDa8wC_xxxfdTYs2v9mWJAYd8ByuUjmH-3Oo1BYx54gCy-S8j4edpbUP_AeRehF1wI2TRC_jAcRV7uswCNNF3mlPpM1LEd-xZc37oJG4KQCsVqbz5ToiTJPyW9FHHOFUOhXGNe8T9T_Ht_X-5IvQE__tnjGd3tUKT0CVowRQHJS4%3D)

name: Team Keith Potts for Senate
subject: 🚨 TWENTY-SEVEN New Endorsements! 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keith Potts for Senate
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230826_em_fr_b1_TKP_3090 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230826_em_fr_b1_TKP_3090]
Friend, we have great news, and we wanted you to be the first to know:
TWENTY-SEVEN fellow council members, State Senators, State Representatives, and other elected officials have endorsed Keith in his run for US Senate!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230826_em_fr_b1_TKP_3090 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230826_em_fr_b1_TKP_3090]
And as much as we could tell you about why Keith is the candidate worth supporting in this race, we decided to let a few of them do the talking. Before we dive in, we'd be wrong not to mention our upcoming End of Month Fundraising Deadline. In honor of 30 new supporters, will you chip in $20 toward our $8,747 goal? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230826_em_fr_b1_TKP_3090&amount=20]
RUSH IN $20 > [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230826_em_fr_b1_TKP_3090&amount=20]
Friend, we don't want to take up too much of your time – here's what people are saying about our favorite Councillor-turned-candidate:
"Throughout his time on the Council, Councillor Potts has used his voice to advance meaningful public safety reforms. Keith Potts will serve Hoosier families thoughtfully and well in Washington."
- Council President Vop Osili
"Keith Potts has been there time and again for our community, working to stand up to MAGA Republican ideas and help deliver real results for working Hoosier families. Keith is the clear choice for voters who want to protect the freedoms of women, seniors, the LGBTQ+ community, and all Hoosiers."
- Senator JD Ford
"I am proud to endorse Councillor Potts for the United States Senate because I have seen his passion for serving Indiana from the start of his career. Keith has been a supporter of my efforts to educate and engage with future generations of public servants, and he is part of a new generation of leadership that looks forward in how to fix our problems and not getting distracted or dwelling on the past."
- Marion County Surveyor Deb Jenkins
From Keith and everyone on our team, we are honored to have so many incredible people standing alongside us.
Together, we can make sure that Hoosiers get the strong voice in Washington that they deserve.
But we're still missing a crucial piece of the puzzle: you! Grassroots support is key to maintaining the momentum we've built. Our final End of Month Fundraising Deadline of the summer is approaching fast – can we count on your support before it's too late? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230826_em_fr_b1_TKP_3090]
REACH OUR GOAL [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230826_em_fr_b1_TKP_3090]
Thank you,
Team KP
Keith Potts was first elected in 2019 to represent District 2 on the Indianapolis City-County Council.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230826_em_fr_b1_TKP_3090 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230826_em_fr_b1_TKP_3090]
Keith’s political work has been centered on issue-based campaigns and progressive candidates, with a particular focus on protecting women’s rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and the environment.
He is an arts advocate, having graduated in 2012 from the Boston Conservatory of Music with a Bachelor of Fine Arts degree. He works with local non-profit arts organizations, teaching after-school music classes, directing, and performing with organizations like the Phoenix Theatre, Indy Shakes, Indianapolis Chamber Orchestra, Actors Theatre of Indiana, and Civic Theatre. Keith currently lives on the north side of Indianapolis with his husband, Dr. Bryan Dodd, and their rescue dog, Mak.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to
Keith Potts for Senate
PO Box 90103
Indianapolis, IN 46260
SUPPORT KEITH [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230826_em_fr_b1_TKP_3090]

Indianapolis, IN 46260

body:
| | | Fellow American, Our end-of-month deadline is coming up in just five days, and we URGENTLY need your help.
---
**[Can you be one of the 172 patriots we need to step up before our end-of-month goal?](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=25259df464324d6a87ed9d3ea9c954f8&_e=8P7T8OyeAeRJeEGSvw9oyniutjN6olyHnXhQbl0xkRX6ZdjZBnYpTN9JJro0HP7AtBhqIPjmSujLepMD8DlvdoQk2XHExJ29NCGMYhkdBwZ9AW6vu8_MLId8NJ4a3BAztZ0Whb6R3cFBw2xiWqgxsZ1rl13rRRn5l836y1sHD_Bw_VCyz1aat6lZlAifFLbc6dBA1UJmNTFtYjPld7TpA4uIkPyP6UbFWGijLIYRfKth_ROEHntyUZ6bP5W1heKJjRVenf5VD65C6IRRV2M0XmvZ8gPeeauS6RcS0UpPBZ4wRpVpanIA1oHE5dpYJdPtuqgg7Q5hMgsQbYLHsXFsd11yEgQ-i7Ojwffw86t-yuVI2f6Hi38fWF6dy4d6lJHTCw3LEDGoIlpKFb9T55yfogriYK7xVSFmQFEpkNGPU7k%3D)**

Across the country, far Left elite are doing everything that they can to take down Josh.

They **HATE** how he’ll _never back down for freedom_ , and they’re **TERRIFIED** because he’s _not afraid to tell the truth_.

**Josh’s unapologetic, unwavering conservatism means that the Left’s wrath is aimed DIRECTLY at him, and we urgently need reinforcements from our grassroots team before our end-of-month deadline.**

We’re not where we need to be as of **[10:00 AM this morning](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=25259df464324d6a87ed9d3ea9c954f8&_e=8P7T8OyeAeRJeEGSvw9oyniutjN6olyHnXhQbl0xkRX6ZdjZBnYpTN9JJro0HP7AtBhqIPjmSujLepMD8DlvdoQk2XHExJ29NCGMYhkdBwZ9AW6vu8_MLId8NJ4a3BAztZ0Whb6R3cFBw2xiWqgxsZ1rl13rRRn5l836y1sHD_Bw_VCyz1aat6lZlAifFLbc6dBA1UJmNTFtYjPld7TpA4uIkPyP6UbFWGijLIYRfKth_ROEHntyUZ6bP5W1heKJjRVenf5VD65C6IRRV2M0Xo-yexu5tRiOP4QySeGB21D_npbtP38jdP_6hch4GX-cFOFR5HSXQ3aO1dpLVSwTM9D8-AM8qDVPSuBD1AkywzrSgPy_0cg3J4P1UdxynT-SJyZIUJkEYsod2_CmsGmO4oz1wTfzaiD3WaicGsc4eKg%3D)** , but luckily, we still have time to catch up.

clean_body: | | | Fellow American, Our end-of-month deadline is coming up in just five days, and we URGENTLY need your help. Across the country, far Left elite are doing everything that they can to take down Josh. They HATE how he’ll never back down for freedom , and they’re TERRIFIED because he’s not afraid to tell the truth. Josh’s unapologetic, unwavering conservatism means that the Left’s wrath is aimed DIRECTLY at him, and we urgently need reinforcements from our grassroots team before our end-of-month deadline. We’re not where we need to be as of , but luckily, we still have time to catch up. Thank you, Team Josh Hawley | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

name: Delegate Karen Greenhalgh
subject: Two Upcoming Events: Parents Matter w/ Gov. Glenn Youngkin & VA Energy Town Hall
body:
| | | **T WO OFFICIAL EVENTS ANNOUNCED**
---
|
---
| | I’m pleased to extend the invitation to join me at two upcoming community events in Virginia Beach. The first, and most recent addition is the latest entry in Governor Youngkin's “Parents Matter” forum series, to be held this Monday, August 28th. The second is a Virginia Energy Town Hall scheduled for Thursday, September 21st. Both are free to attend and open to the public. Details and event registration links may be found below. I look forward to seeing you there! All the best,
---
---
| | **Delegate Karen S. Greenhalgh**
_Virginia General Assembly_
Richmond: 1-804-698-1085
District: 1-757-636-7316
[DelKGreenhalgh@house.virginia.gov](mailto:DelKGreenhalgh@house.virginia.gov "DelKGreenhalgh@house.virginia.gov")
---
| [](https://virginiageneralassembly.gov/)
---
| [](https://virginiabeach.gov/)
---
|
---
| | |
---
| |
# Parents Matter Conversation with Governor Glenn Youngkin
---
---
**_Monday, August 28th_**
Doors open at 12:30 PM **_Bow Creek Recreation Center_** 3427 Club House Rd, Virginia Beach, VA 23452 Join Governor Youngkin and Delegate Greenhalgh for a conversation on issues important to parents raising the next generation of Virginian citizens. *RSVP required
---
[**RSVP**](https://www.eventbrite.com/e/parents-matter-conversation-with-governor-glenn-youngkin-tickets-703747617067?aff=oddtdtcreator)
---
|
# Virginia Energy Town Hall
---
---
_Co-hosted by the Virginia Beach Council of Civic Organizations
_ _&__The Office of Delegate Karen Greenhalgh_
---
**_Thursday, September 21st_**
7:00 PM **_Bow Creek Recreation Center_** 3427 Club House Rd, Virginia Beach, VA 23452 A community forum with utility providers and state energy authorities on policy, operations, and strategic outlook. Presentations from the Virginia Dept. of Energy, Virginia Natural Gas, and Dominion Energy will be followed by an open Q&A; period. *RSVP encouraged

---
[**RSVP**](https://www.eventbrite.com/e/virginia-energy-town-hall-tickets-698513832677?aff=oddtdtcreator)
---
| | |
---
| | [](DelKGreenhalgh@house.virginia.gov)
---
| OFFICE OF DELEGATE KAREN GREENHALGH426 Investors Place, Ste. 202Virginia Beach, VA 23452

body:
Did you see Sepi's email, friend?

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68707280/423895865/-1233768706?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=230826_team_bio_kicker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM5MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmM3OWU5ZGYtMzA0NC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tZ2j1atClozO-AQionvuusgz1PDBKYGSY48IOfrg06s=)
---
Did you see Sepi's email, friend? Her incredible journey has stretched from the violent repression of revolutionary Iran to the West Hollywood Mayor's office. Today, she's running for Congress to represent all of us. She'll continue to be a champion for our West Hollywood community, her constituents in District 30 and for working people everywhere. And on Women's Equality Day, we're so proud to have Sepi in this fight — lifting up the voices of women in our community and fighting for our basic rights which are under continued threat. [**_Before you read Sepi's story below, will you chip in a few dollars to help elect a representative who truly stands for us?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68707281/423895866/-1233768706?refcode=230826_team_bio_kicker_l1&refcode2=bc79e9df-3044-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=230826_team_bio_kicker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM5MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmM3OWU5ZGYtMzA0NC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tZ2j1atClozO-AQionvuusgz1PDBKYGSY48IOfrg06s=) **[Chip in →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68707282/423895867/-1233768706?refcode=230826_team_bio_kicker_b1&refcode2=bc79e9df-3044-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=230826_team_bio_kicker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM5MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmM3OWU5ZGYtMzA0NC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tZ2j1atClozO-AQionvuusgz1PDBKYGSY48IOfrg06s=)** With gratitude, — Team Sepi \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Sepi Shyne <info@sepishyne.com>
Date: Thu, Aug 24, 2023 at 1:13 PM
Subject: When I was five years old, my family and I fled the Iranian revolution.
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, When I was five years old, I fled the Iranian revolution with my family, carrying nothing more than a stuffed elephant. **Today, I'm running for Congress.** The fact that I'm here today is an American Dream realized, friend. It's a testament to the value of education, hard work, and determination. It's a testament to the sacrifices my parents made to build a better life for their children, and to the strength of the communities we find and the ones we create for ourselves. It wasn't always easy. When I arrived in the United States, I spoke no English. I was the only Brown girl in my kindergarten class; I experienced harassment, prejudice, and outright discrimination. I was undocumented until I was 16 years old. **But these challenges helped make me the person I am today. They renewed my determination to build a better nation, where no one has to face the same barriers our family went through.** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68707283/423895868/-1233768706?refcode=230826_team_bio_kicker_img&refcode2=bc79e9df-3044-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=230826_team_bio_kicker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM5MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmM3OWU5ZGYtMzA0NC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tZ2j1atClozO-AQionvuusgz1PDBKYGSY48IOfrg06s=)** So I worked hard. I went to law school. I spent more than two decades fighting for civil rights, as co-president of the LGBT Bar Association of Los Angeles, as a board member of the Human Rights Campaign, and as a member of the City of West Hollywood's LGBTQ+ Advisory Board. Then, in 2020, we made history. I was elected to the West Hollywood City Council, becoming the first woman of color in history to hold that office, as well as the first openly-LGBTQ Iranian to hold public office in the world. Today, I have the honor of serving our City as Mayor. I go to work everyday, fighting to make sure everyone has the same opportunities to thrive, regardless of skin color, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, nationality, age, disability, or socioeconomic status. And with our civil liberties under unprecedented attack, that fight is more urgent now than ever. [**_I'm running for Congress to be a champion for all of us, friend, because I know what it's like to feel powerless. Will you join
