clean_body: Did you see Sepi's email, friend? | | = Did you see Sepi's email, friend? Her incredible journey has stretched from the violent repression of revolutionary Iran to the West Hollywood Mayor's office. Today, she's running for Congress to represent all of us. She'll continue to be a champion for our West Hollywood community, her constituents in District 30 and for working people everywhere. And on Women's Equality Day, we're so proud to have Sepi in this fight — lifting up the voices of women in our community and fighting for our basic rights which are under continued threat. = = With gratitude, — Team Sepi \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Sepi Shyne <info@sepishyne.com> Date: Thu, Aug 24, 2023 at 1:13 PM Subject: When I was five years old, my family and I fled the Iranian revolution. To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, When I was five years old, I fled the Iranian revolution with my family, carrying nothing more than a stuffed elephant. Today, I'm running for Congress. The fact that I'm here today is an American Dream realized, friend. It's a testament to the value of education, hard work, and determination. It's a testament to the sacrifices my parents made to build a better life for their children, and to the strength of the communities we find and the ones we create for ourselves. It wasn't always easy. When I arrived in the United States, I spoke no English. I was the only Brown girl in my kindergarten class; I experienced harassment, prejudice, and outright discrimination. I was undocumented until I was 16 years old. But these challenges helped make me the person I am today. They renewed my determination to build a better nation, where no one has to face the same barriers our family went through. = So I worked hard. I went to law school. I spent more than two decades fighting for civil rights, as co-president of the LGBT Bar Association of Los Angeles, as a board member of the Human Rights Campaign, and as a member of the City of West Hollywood's LGBTQ+ Advisory Board. Then, in 2020, we made history. I was elected to the West Hollywood City Council, becoming the first woman of color in history to hold that office, as well as the first openly-LGBTQ Iranian to hold public office in the world. Today, I have the honor of serving our City as Mayor. I go to work everyday, fighting to make sure everyone has the same opportunities to thrive, regardless of skin color, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, nationality, age, disability, or socioeconomic status. And with our civil liberties under unprecedented attack, that fight is more urgent now than ever. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: = = = = With gratitude, — Sepi | Mayor Sepi Shyne has taken on WeHo's biggest issues and delivered results. From raising the minimum wage to the highest in the nation to significantly reducing homelessness – she's running for Congress to fight for all of us. It's our time to Shyne, make a donation today. Hello,
When my husband Adam Frisch ran against Lauren Boebert last year, we were the underdogs until the very end.
Adam did not receive any national support. We were heavily out-raised and out-spent by Boebert and her Washington allies.
Ultimately, though, Adam lost to Lauren Boebert in a recount by just 546 votes – the closest race in the entire country.
The worst part is that it wasn’t because we didn’t work hard. Our family, our team, and our volunteers gave it everything we had. We just ran out of money.
In the final weeks of the race, we had to cut back. Right as Boebert was increasing her advertising – right as we _knew_ we were on her heels – we had to pull TV ads, cancel digital buys, and make a lot of hard budget decisions.
Adam might not say it, but I will: If we had had additional resources and been able to fully fund his campaign until the end, Adam would probably be in Congress right now – and Lauren Boebert would be a footnote in a history book.
It’s part of why Adam announced so early that he’s running again against Lauren Boebert. We need to make sure that we have the time and the money to build a campaign that can sustain all the way through to November 5, 2024.
Adam can win. But Boebert’s allies are already attacking him, and Adam’s not taking any money from corporate PACs. If he is going to defeat Lauren Boebert, Adam needs grassroots donors like you to chip in right now:

Adam did not receive any national support. We were heavily out-raised and out-spent by Boebert and her Washington allies. Our family, our team, and our volunteers gave it everything we had. We just ran out of money. In the final weeks of the race, we had to cut back. Right as Boebert was increasing her advertising – right as we knew we were on her heels – we had to pull TV ads, cancel digital buys, and make a lot of hard budget decisions. Adam might not say it, but I will: If we had had additional resources and been able to fully fund his campaign until the end, Adam would probably be in Congress right now – and Lauren Boebert would be a footnote in a history book. It’s part of why Adam announced so early that he’s running again against Lauren Boebert. subject: We have come so far, but we still have work to do.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
We can keep moving Kentucky forward, but Andy needs your support right now. Peter,

We're just a couple of months out from Election Day, and I couldn't be more proud of how Andy has run his re-election campaign.

These hotly contested races tend to get dirty. Candidates begin mudslinging, taking cheap shots, and losing sight of important issues. But Andy has remained focused. He continues to practice what he preaches by sharing a hopeful vision for our Commonwealth — one in which Kentuckians unite behind shared values of family, faith, hard work, and caring for one another.

That's why his campaign resonates with Kentuckians across zip codes, in rural, suburban, and urban areas, and in the hearts of millions. And it's why a majority of Kentuckians approve of the job he's done as governor. We have come so far in the last four years, and Andy is prepared to keep moving the Commonwealth forward — but we still have work to do.

[**That's why I'm asking, if you're able, please donate any amount before Andy's August end-of-month deadline Peter: This race is going to be the most expensive governor's race in Kentucky history. Andy's opponent and his allies are spending millions in an effort to deceive voters about who Andy is and what he's accomplished for our Commonwealth.

You and I both know the truth – but we need to ensure Kentuckians in every corner of the Commonwealth know it too. There's simply too much on the line to let Andy's opponent buy this race and drag Kentucky backward. We need your support today to ensure we can set the record straight so Andy can keep fighting to make progress for Kentucky.

[**Will you join me in supporting Andy's re-election campaign by chipping in before his end-of-month deadline? name: DASS
subject: Report: MAGA Republicans seek to hijack local elections boards.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/89914/images/dass-logo-transparent.png]

Folks, we're raising the alarm about a very concerning trend emerging at the state level ahead of the 2024 presidential election.
By now, you probably know that far-right Republicans at every level of government have been waging an all-out assault on voting rights. But Republican-led legislatures are now going the extra step: moving to take control of state and local elections offices outright.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-q3-2023?refcode=em-8.26.23-all-a [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-q3-2023?refcode=em-8.26.23-all-a]
According to an ABC report , the authority being sought by Republicans ranges from seizing power to handpick local election boards to dismissing election officials in “Democratic strongholds” altogether.
This isn't just a problem in red states. This is happening in crucial battlegrounds like North Carolina, Texas, Michigan and Pennsylvania -- states where a Democratic loss could hand Republicans the House, Senate or even put Trump back in the White House.
We need to make sure Trump and his allies never get the chance to steal an election. One of the best ways to do that is by bolstering the Democrats' national effort to defend and elect pro-democracy Secretaries of State. Rush in $5 to Dems of State today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-q3-2023?refcode=em-8.26.23-all-a]If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Chip in $250 Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-q3-2023?refcode=em-8.26.23-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=250]
Another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-q3-2023?refcode=em-8.26.23-all-a]
Folks, ahead of the 2022 midterm election, American democracy faced a nightmare scenario: that pro-Trump, election-denying Republicans would become the officials charged with certifying our elections.
With your help we stopped them, but this is not the time for complacency.
Republicans are literally writing the rules in their favor before ballots are counted in 2024. We can't get out-maneuvered, and ensuring we have strong, Democratic Secretaries of State overseeing our elections is critical to stopping them.
Chip in $5, or any amount you can, to defend and elect Democratic Secretaries of State and protect our democracy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-q3-2023?refcode=em-8.26.23-all-a]
Thanks,
Dem Secretaries of State (DASS)
Donate $3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-q3-2023?refcode=em-8.26.23-all-a]

Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the only organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States.
Right now, Republicans are changing the rules and changing the players to try and change the outcomes of future elections. Democratic Secretaries of State are the last line of defense to protect our democracy and preserve the will of the voters. Please consider a donation to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda.

---
| | **Happy back-to-school season from Team Gottheimer!**

As summer winds down and our students return to school, we just wanted to wish a happy back-to-school month to Jersey Families! As your Congressman, Josh is dedicated to making sure all of our students are safe in class — from having drinking water safe from chemicals to the food they need to succeed.

But as the summer ends we are also getting closer and closer to 2024 — which means we need to have Josh’s back so he can keep prioritizing our students in Congress.

clean_body: | | Happy back-to-school season from Team Gottheimer! As summer winds down and our students return to school, we just wanted to wish a happy back-to-school month to Jersey Families! As your Congressman, Josh is dedicated to making sure all of our students are safe in class — from having drinking water safe from chemicals to the food they need to succeed. But as the summer ends we are also getting closer and closer to 2024 — which means we need to have Josh’s back so he can keep prioritizing our students in Congress. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = While Josh is in Congress fighting for our students' success, the NRCC has declared banning universal free meals a 2024 priority. After the debate, her favorability rating rose to 85%, up from 61% before the debate, according to a poll from Democratic firm Navigator. The same poll also found that 45% of the survey takers named Haley the winner of the debate, followed by 24% for DeSantis.” https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=2be087faed5fabbfeace0f795058d060463efa31f1866857a880323abb17c004f35a2163747bc8bbf21f4b59a85011376bbf8438203975f16516d3b48a4cc694 CONTINUE READING Read More → https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=2be087faed5fabbf24d3091b470ea31664642ae1dde6719ff412747962b614749a2def801d31a194267d6b8cefc2d28273c09bd45368f34e9dccd801e063e3ef Who are we kidding? Nikki Haley won on brains and experience. “Hands down, Nikki Haley won the first GOP debate. And I don’t say this just because she’s a South Carolinian or because she was the only woman among the fiery pack of primary candidates. She was simply smarter (even smarter than you, Vivek), more sensible and more experienced — and it showed. While the men onstage argued and hurled invectives — some of them, anyway — Haley was poised, precise and prepared. And I would add brave. It took courage to do what others, with the exception of former New Jersey governor Chris Christie, refused to do: speak truth to Donald Trump’s power.” https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=2be087faed5fabbf24d3091b470ea31664642ae1dde6719ff412747962b614749a2def801d31a194267d6b8cefc2d28273c09bd45368f34e9dccd801e063e3ef CONTINUE READING Here’s what people are saying about Nikki’s momentum: Brian Kilmeade, co-anchor, Fox & Friends: I thought Nikki Haley stole the show… She was confident, working it on all sides… Kayleigh McEnany, co-host, Fox News’ Outnumbered: @NikkiHaley is a strong voice on foreign policy. Today, I told my 3-year-old daughter about the #GOPDebate, and she said "I want the only girl on the stage to win." Nikki is an inspiring woman & it's great to have her on this stage. Alyssa Farah Griffin, CNN: She showed up like she came to play and actually run against Donald Trump. Michael Steele, MSNBC: Do you look like someone that the country, at the end of the day, can say, I can see him in the Oval Office? Tonight, the only person who struck that chord for me was Nikki Haley. She was the only one who took risks that none of the others would take… she stepped out in a way that the others did not. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States. I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago – an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something – that we do love this country. I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A. I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I’m running for President because we have a country to save! I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor” because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. And I’ll do it as your next President. As President, I’ll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington’s spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America’s future. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=2be087faed5fabbf6f03e452bf64c0804f8d46b966678716839fe029693832bbaeb9bddd92365e7258c9be0a3291b214097eee0fcd2a63143bd1a1014172659a Will you join me today and help me save our country? https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=2be087faed5fabbf6f03e452bf64c0804f8d46b966678716839fe029693832bbaeb9bddd92365e7258c9be0a3291b214097eee0fcd2a63143bd1a1014172659a DONATE Paid for by Nikki Haley for President. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=2be087faed5fabbff7feef77ff8a6122c9f2236d7846217aab60e8d2fa887efe0a8b741e25af08b1cae9c72b459928007ed5f452318f365e3366ab345fa84ce9 www.nikkihaley.com By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided from each of Nikki Haley for President, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, Team Stand For America, SFA Fund, Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley (48324) directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. And I don’t say this just because she’s a South Carolinian or because she was the only woman among the fiery pack of primary candidates. She was simply smarter (even smarter than you, Vivek), more sensible and more experienced — and it showed. While the men onstage argued and hurled invectives — some of them, anyway — Haley was poised, precise and prepared. And I would add brave. It took courage to do what others, with the exception of former New Jersey governor Chris Christie, refused to do: speak truth to Donald Trump’s power.” CONTINUE READING Here’s what people are saying about Nikki’s momentum: Brian Kilmeade, co-anchor, Fox & Friends: I thought Nikki Haley stole the show… She was confident, working it on all sides… Kayleigh McEnany, co-host, Fox News’ Outnumbered: @NikkiHaley is a strong voice on foreign policy. Michael Steele, MSNBC: Do you look like someone that the country, at the end of the day, can say, I can see him in the Oval Office? | | Peter, **More than one hundred years ago today, women won the right to vote.** I want to acknowledge that while this victory was hard fought, it didn't include everyone. Women of color were excluded for many years. The fight for equality for all did not end that day, and it continues on — whether we're fighting for equal pay, paid maternity leave, or for the government to respect our bodily autonomy. As a young engineer, I was the only woman in my department. I was routinely told that I didn't belong there – in fact, they predicted I'd be gone in six months. _I didn't listen._ Instead, I buckled down, worked harder, and proved them wrong. **[I'm dedicated to the ongoing fight for equality, but I can't do it alone. It's going to take all of us coming together to win. Can you chip in now before our end-of-August fundraising deadline and fuel the fight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68707962/423898115/974409837?refcode=2023-08-26-womensequality&recurring=&amount=11&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=b4c93a41-3244-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGM5M2E0MS0zMjQ0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JflKOKD_gXuRomEoxPW0rS1YkJKFkiyWeTOMkTSJAUs=)** Peter, MAGA Republicans are determined to roll back our fundamental human rights. Extremists have banned abortion in more than a dozen states – ignoring the fact that the majority of Americans support reproductive rights. Even so-called "moderates" like Lori Chavez-DeRemer have voted to restrict essential reproductive care. They believe they can get away with this undemocratic behavior and win at the ballot box. **It's time to buckle down, work hard, and prove them wrong.** [**We're building a movement full of people who believe in equality for**** _everyone_****. Will you help power our campaign to victory with a donation today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68707963/423898116/974409837?refcode=2023-08-26-womensequality&recurring=&amount=11&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=b4c93a41-3244-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGM5M2E0MS0zMjQ0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JflKOKD_gXuRomEoxPW0rS1YkJKFkiyWeTOMkTSJAUs=) Together, I know we can win the fights to come and create a more equal America for all. clean_body: | | | | Peter, More than one hundred years ago today, women won the right to vote. I want to acknowledge that while this victory was hard fought, it didn't include everyone. Women of color were excluded for many years. The fight for equality for all did not end that day, and it continues on — whether we're fighting for equal pay, paid maternity leave, or for the government to respect our bodily autonomy. As a young engineer, I was the only woman in my department. I was routinely told that I didn't belong there – in fact, they predicted I'd be gone in six months. I didn't listen. Instead, I buckled down, worked harder, and proved them wrong. = Peter, MAGA Republicans are determined to roll back our fundamental human rights. Extremists have banned abortion in more than a dozen states – ignoring the fact that the majority of Americans support reproductive rights. Even so-called "moderates" like Lori Chavez-DeRemer have voted to restrict essential reproductive care. They believe they can get away with this undemocratic behavior and win at the ballot box. It's time to buckle down, work hard, and prove them wrong. = Together, I know we can win the fights to come and create a more equal America for all. More soon, Lynn | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Lynn Peterson for Congress |

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: One year of the congressional Mamas’ Caucus
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Making sure that mothers have a seat at the table where policy decisions are being made. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTviOyx_odpRVY32zqFhtacUm8IopiPYYWaiH-V-9i9z8VPLKb9zxZYEWDTOIlT59Rs-IGVU0Xl-tV_pglVtVrMYEq1xgX603-6YZD2KsVaN-qOZrauGPBfFhK8kvvrcBC1m0MK3GPL-p5EqPI1WlhDpRIgsq2d7GznhnWRB34GaSJtudSXjgMNaSkGv0QFdML1/3z2/bQLbhnHvT4S7q4pzgF2cwg/h0/NyXfZibhr5kx1xDtlogFH2V7Q_70LivR32QMDzWrP5k)
---
Friend, We just celebrated the one-year anniversary of the congressional Mamas’ Caucus, which I founded to advocate for mothers of color and working families. We’re making sure that mothers have a seat at the table where policy decisions are being made. **We’re fighting for equal pay, because moms make just 62 cents for every dollar dads make.** After having a child, we often face bias, career interruptions, and lower pay—the “motherhood penalty.” Due to systemic racism, Black and brown moms earn even less money to provide for their families, and Black women are also in the midst of a maternal health crisis. **We’re fighting to close these racial and gender wealth gaps and to secure a national paid leave program, high-quality childcare and early education programs that pay providers a living wage, and reproductive justice.** We’re also advocating for policies to reduce poverty, including my bill, the _End Child Poverty Act_ , which would provide families with a $428/month payment per child, cutting deep child poverty by over 93%. **The cost of raising a child in our country is among the highest in the world, which is why the Mamas’ Caucus is fighting for the bold and needed changes that working-class families and families of color deserve.** [**Will you chip in $5 or more so we can ensure that working-class families have the resources they need to thrive?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zlIoCC0XFlxQeggDoKPTUl-neo_XzrFC5-uT4M1CDGT-c8YRMA9eYoc_4oCM44qaYWheMaT3AVtqNso0P_VPman0BuOu3LyWDQgn4S2t1_sXiSZPH9ZOImVGRLdfou3C2EDyPWfmXaHC2Mtw5YHSyBNCh4kZBSJ5PdD9-IxqNb--SnGfpw-GrpDOwEqRKWg-8exA7R3XtaTNNVQEwBCMwOL-NPAZ37_V-iXVo1HMAl52g9MS06ZSfBT3LEGpyOaGGJqe2G6lxsBG-uOvdv4SyvajQZwgRIFXvEgfWxsUgnpqFsH6C3CFFiOpFYVEbO1poFfLM4Sto7CQ4mh8Na4ke5AHcHVoaK5AWucv77DX_XIvgFtsvjsKoAVTIz3TIlip0/3z2/bQLbhnHvT4S7q4pzgF2cwg/h1/0tINmeZTYddW09OjNObK9cPv0mPJMTtqwY0NNWH9hdY) clean_body: Making sure that mothers have a seat at the table where policy decisions are being made. | | | Friend, We just celebrated the one-year anniversary of the congressional Mamas’ Caucus, which I founded to advocate for mothers of color and working families. We’re making sure that mothers have a seat at the table where policy decisions are being made. We’re fighting for equal pay, because moms make just 62 cents for every dollar dads make. After having a child, we often face bias, career interruptions, and lower pay—the “motherhood penalty.” Due to systemic racism, Black and brown moms earn even less money to provide for their families, and Black women are also in the midst of a maternal health crisis. We’re fighting to close these racial and gender wealth gaps and to secure a national paid leave program, high-quality childcare and early education programs that pay providers a living wage, and reproductive justice. We’re also advocating for policies to reduce poverty, including my bill, the End Child Poverty Act , which would provide families with a $428/month payment per child, cutting deep child poverty by over 93%. The cost of raising a child in our country is among the highest in the world, which is why the Mamas’ Caucus is fighting for the bold and needed changes that working-class families and families of color deserve. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | I promise to continue centering mothers and children in policy, and to keep fighting for families like yours. Thank you for being by my side. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Rashida Tlaib for Congress, please .

body:
As students across the country head back into the classroom, here’s how Team Biden-Harris is working to make education fair and accessible for all. → | | |
---
It’s back to school season. As students across the country head back into the classroom, here’s how Team Biden-Harris is working to make education fair and accessible for all →
➡️**Investing in education.** President Biden and Vice President Harris are devoting historic and vitally needed resources to unlocking opportunity for millions of Americans, and have pushed for a historic $20 billion investment in high-poverty Title I schools. We’re addressing our national teacher shortage, investing in HBCUs, upgrading public schools, and more. ➡️**Tackling student debt.** President Biden and Vice President Harris have secured the largest increases to the Pell Grant program in a decade, fixed programs like Public Service Loan Forgiveness, and created a new income-driven repayment plan that will cut undergraduate loan payments in half and bring monthly payments to zero for low-income borrowers. They’ve also implemented a plan in which over 800,000 student loan borrowers who have been repaying their loans for 20 years or more will see _$39 billion_ of their loans discharged. ➡️**Countering extremism in the classroom.** While extremists all over the country have targeted LGBTQ+ students and families and are working to block students from learning our country’s full history, Team Biden-Harris is committed to doing everything in their power to protect _all_ students.
[ We can -- and will -- keep building on that progress. clean_body: As students across the country head back into the classroom, here’s how Team Biden-Harris is working to make education fair and accessible for all. → | | | It’s back to school season. As students across the country head back into the classroom, here’s how Team Biden-Harris is working to make education fair and accessible for all → ➡️Investing in education. President Biden and Vice President Harris are devoting historic and vitally needed resources to unlocking opportunity for millions of Americans, and have pushed for a historic $20 billion investment in high-poverty Title I schools. We’re addressing our national teacher shortage, investing in HBCUs, upgrading public schools, and more. ➡️Tackling student debt. President Biden and Vice President Harris have secured the largest increases to the Pell Grant program in a decade, fixed programs like Public Service Loan Forgiveness, and created a new income-driven repayment plan that will cut undergraduate loan payments in half and bring monthly payments to zero for low-income borrowers. They’ve also implemented a plan in which over 800,000 student loan borrowers who have been repaying their loans for 20 years or more will see $39 billion of their loans discharged. ➡️Countering extremism in the classroom. While extremists all over the country have targeted LGBTQ+ students and families and are working to block students from learning our country’s full history, Team Biden-Harris is committed to doing everything in their power to protect all students. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | As long as they’re in office, President Biden and Vice President Harris are committed to bringing the promise of a high-quality education to every student, and fighting for a future where all students are treated fairly and free to be themselves. Thank you, Team Biden-Harris

clean_body: While MAGA extremists are set on banning books, I know our education system has much greater needs. | = | | | BREAKING NEWS: Texas Governor Abbott signs new book ban law authorizing school library censorship | = Listen, Texas leads the country in the number of books banned by school districts. As a public school educator, I know how important it is to open students’ eyes to diverse perspectives and new points of view. But extremist Republicans like Beth Van Duyne are dead-set on banning books and censoring any curriculum that doesn’t fit their own agenda. I’m running for Congress because it’s absolutely critical we stop Republicans’ attacks on books and education. I hope you'll take a moment to read the entire message, then make a donation of $3 to support our effort to keep CA-47 in Democratic control.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68709608/423903224/-129347026?refcode=em-8.26.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODgzMjEwMmYtMzY0NC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2-xKDrt1xm22MoccbWXMyvqLXLfldMX3gNs25oId98g=)_**

I'll never forget the day Donald Trump was elected in 2016. Our country took an unimaginable turn, but I knew it wasn't the time to sit back and hope for change -- _we needed to be the change._

That’s why I founded Women for American Values and Ethics (WAVE) -- a woman-led, grassroots organization dedicated to advancing our shared ideals.

What started as just 21 women in my living room grew into a force several thousand strong across Orange County. Our organizing efforts played a key role in flipping four Orange County congressional seats from red to blue in 2018.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68709612/423903231/-129347026?refcode=em-8.26.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODgzMjEwMmYtMzY0NC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2-xKDrt1xm22MoccbWXMyvqLXLfldMX3gNs25oId98g=)
_WAVE members during the historic Women’s March in Orange County in 2018._
**But Peter, things have changed since 2018.**

National Republicans believe 2024 is their best chance to re-establish the "Orange Curtain" in our community.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68709614/423903234/-129347026?refcode=em-8.26.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODgzMjEwMmYtMzY0NC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2-xKDrt1xm22MoccbWXMyvqLXLfldMX3gNs25oId98g=)
A GOP resurgence should concern everyone. In recent years, the OC community we hoped would become a model for change instead saw a spike in extremism, anti-Asian and antisemitic racism, and homophobic policies at the local level. With Republicans in control of Congress, we've seen horrific attacks on our fundamental rights -- including our right to choose.

We can't squander this chance to keep CA-47 blue. We need a Democratic candidate with the right experience and who can defeat the OC GOP nominee and who will also protect and defend our shared values. **That's why I stepped up to run.**

The good news is that we've proven what we can accomplish when thousands of us step up and demand change. I'm confident we can win, but I’m counting on YOUR support to fuel this effort.

**_[With the GOP pushing to retake Orange County, we can’t take our foot off the gas. I'm hoping you'll consider making a contribution of $3 to keep our momentum going strong.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68709618/423903236/-129347026?refcode=em-8.26.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODgzMjEwMmYtMzY0NC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2-xKDrt1xm22MoccbWXMyvqLXLfldMX3gNs25oId98g=)_**

clean_body: | = = | **= I'll never forget the day Donald Trump was elected in 2016. Our country took an unimaginable turn, but I knew it wasn't the time to sit back and hope for change -- we needed to be the change. That’s why I founded Women for American Values and Ethics (WAVE) -- a woman-led, grassroots organization dedicated to advancing our shared ideals. What started as just 21 women in my living room grew into a force several thousand strong across Orange County. Our organizing efforts played a key role in flipping four Orange County congressional seats from red to blue in 2018. = WAVE members during the historic Women’s March in Orange County in 2018. But Peter, things have changed since 2018. National Republicans believe 2024 is their best chance to re-establish the "Orange Curtain" in our community. = A GOP resurgence should concern everyone. In recent years, the OC community we hoped would become a model for change instead saw a spike in extremism, anti-Asian and antisemitic racism, and homophobic policies at the local level. With Republicans in control of Congress, we've seen horrific attacks on our fundamental rights -- including our right to choose. We can't squander this chance to keep CA-47 blue. We need a Democratic candidate with the right experience and who can defeat the OC GOP nominee and who will also protect and defend our shared values. That's why I stepped up to run. The good news is that we've proven what we can accomplish when thousands of us step up and demand change. I'm confident we can win, but I’m counting on YOUR support to fuel this effort. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thanks for reading, and thanks in advance for chipping in. In unity, Joanna Weiss | Joanna's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! Peter,

When I stepped off the stage, I could feel electricity in the air. _This campaign has built tremendous momentum and we aren't letting up for a minute._

For those of you who have been with me since the beginning, you know how this victory was. We started this campaign back in late February polling at 0.0%. My vision is for an America more unified by our founding ideals than torn apart by our perceived differences.

|
**God** is real.
There are **two** genders.
Human flourishing requires **fossil fuels**.
**Reverse racism** is racism.
An open border is **no border**.
**Parents** determine the education of their children.
The **nuclear family** is the greatest form of governance known to mankind.
**Capitalism** lifts people up from poverty.
There are three branches of the U.S. government, **not four**.
The **U.S. Constitution** is the strongest guarantor of freedoms in history.
| [** JOIN OUR MOVEMENT **](http://links.weareallgop.com/u/click?_t=b92eb49f39064cec8967c67e15b89278&_m=7f71c910bb814a4a9cf45e75f0980dc9&_e=HR54XZXQYq27gIQpwW1rsX5jk__FdVGKDIienqVuNCbrh0AMgstSZJwQ_Qa9hJjjFWYg8kmK-virM0lAnR91-kUYwe9a2OUCtLP43TDpa95lU0MFM38u7ZSj6qOJmO6rmbI5O7GGXwDnWjVShiAwFEJquOovOTBAKz3YkZnU5Eamc2pOzzsm8hygOYxxbWaWJrxSUOaCk495Viw1P7wRYx6mT4k0p7EbGOmenAs-q1Jwo_uQaexznlOrsQnYqlCaJ2NxkP-m0jHsNV0Jx0zoxhapRNioN8qOSaY4GsHSA5hK4O8633JHnboHzsBt63o-GiHOFYLcqU7DCKLGdNV5TJNvnUiKbM56luT9gLkjhF_iW4ecfYP8mf1CDQHZ-wNUdjjNKL_v6Obg-0-7qAiJcA%3D%3D)
---

My Republican opponents offered a lot of great points tonight but here's why my campaign is different:
* I'm going to revolutionize the way our government is run. _The people who we elect to run the government are NOT the ones who actually run the government_. It's the managerial class in the Deep State. You cannot reform these agencies. The only answer is to **SHUT THEM DOWN** , and I am the only presidential candidate who has the plan on how to actually do it.
* We have got to change the conversation. Stop talking about Biden & start talking about what we actually stand for as Republicans. Spouting off poll-tested platitudes about Biden makes us sound like partisan hacks. And that's exactly why it's going to take an outsider from a new generation to get the job done.
* I don't want a national divorce, and other candidates are pushing us toward the brink of that division. I'm running to lead us to a national revival. If we can revive that, then nobody in the world - not a nation, not a corporation, not a virus - will defeat us.

**[Peter, I hope you are ready to join me and fight for the future of America. There are 20 weeks until the first primary election. Chip in $20 today and together, let's make America our first priority.](http://links.weareallgop.com/u/click?_t=b92eb49f39064cec8967c67e15b89278&_m=7f71c910bb814a4a9cf45e75f0980dc9&_e=HR54XZXQYq27gIQpwW1rsX5jk__FdVGKDIienqVuNCbrh0AMgstSZJwQ_Qa9hJjjFWYg8kmK-virM0lAnR91-kUYwe9a2OUCtLP43TDpa95lU0MFM38u7ZSj6qOJmO6rmbI5O7GGXwDnWjVShiAwFEJquOovOTBAKz3YkZnU5Eamc2pOzzsm8hygOYxxbWaWJrxSUOaCk495Viw1P7wRYx6mT4k0p7EbGOmenAs-q1JB9Bh5zRYbiFPTw1MUcLnnlvMzq9Dqzj-WTZzadZmanQeA9N2jhu4bYMYt4icxVZzuu-hygWy_e8BbHObdCat3ICVevmsi41JHknxdyJWHsiy12mXEqlM4vN82y5or-j5e-ujol64HCPVHC3yjTwy_GV5aBRkHwM0PZGfyLqVP_Q%3D%3D)**

_Peter - are you ready for the revolution?_

America First,

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Team Nikki
subject: Happy Women’s Equality Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#
---
Happy Women’s Equality Day, friends! Today we celebrate those who fought to make progress in the fight for women’s rights, but it’s also an opportunity to reflect upon how much work is ahead of us to achieve true equality in our country. As the first woman to represent Illinois’ 13th Congressional District, Nikki is committed to working across the aisle to deliver legislation addressing the challenges women in our district and across our country face. But Nikki can't do this work alone. That’s why we wanted to make sure you have a chance to see the message she sent last week on the anniversary of the ratification of the 19th Amendment. **[Friend, please take a look at Nikki’s message below and then add your name to her petition to show your support for her work to achieve true equality and opportunity for all>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68709634/423903256/-1426431129?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230826_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDMyMTAyZi0zNjQ0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=reSpCLz-ogP9Tjp6Bb_YDhO3WP7ms6rRix4KX3e29vg=&emci=cbbb3b29-6243-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=9032102f-3644-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=13891387)** | [ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68709636/423903258/-1426431129?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230826_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDMyMTAyZi0zNjQ0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=reSpCLz-ogP9Tjp6Bb_YDhO3WP7ms6rRix4KX3e29vg=&emci=cbbb3b29-6243-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=9032102f-3644-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=13891387)

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Nikki Budzinski
Date: Friday, Aug 18, 2023
Subject: On this day in 1920
Hello,
On this day in 1920, the 19th Amendment, which granted women the constitutional right to vote, was ratified.
I have immense gratitude for the generations of women who paved the way to expand voting rights through years of organizing — and as the first woman to represent Illinois’ 13th district, I’m proud to be an example for the next generation of young women and encourage them to become politically involved.
Even though we’ve come a long way over the last 103 years, I would be remiss if I didn’t say that our work to achieve true democracy is far from over.
Despite the passage of the 19th Amendment, people of color, including women of color, are still denied the right to vote today through coordinated voter suppression tactics.
GOP-led state legislatures have targeted Black and brown folks across our country by passing restrictive voting laws that limit their ability to vote by mail, cutting early voting hours, purging voters from the voter rolls, and even criminalizing organizers who hand out water to voters waiting in line in some states.
I am committed to making progress in our fight to expand and protect the fundamental right to vote for every American, but I need to know your standing with me in this fight.
That’s why I’m asking today: [**Will you add your name to show your support for my efforts to fight for equal voting rights in Washington?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68709638/423903260/-1426431129?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230826_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDMyMTAyZi0zNjQ0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=reSpCLz-ogP9Tjp6Bb_YDhO3WP7ms6rRix4KX3e29vg=&emci=cbbb3b29-6243-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=9032102f-3644-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=13891387)

But that makes August even better, because that’s when dad is home the most. I mean, just look at how happy I am to see him 🥰🥰 = OK enough chasing my tail. My dad is fighting really hard for all of Colorado + the pets in our great state, but he can’t do it alone. Especially before his big end-of-month deadline on thursday. That’s why we he had to call in the reinforcements (aka me) to ask: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Talk to ya later! — Zuma Crow 🐾 P.S. be sure to give your fellow furry friends love today! And if you have anybody who could be my friend, we always love pictures :) = Jason Crow for Congress 8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543 Greenwood Village, CO 80112 United States | mailto:info@jasoncrowforcongress.com | Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

name: Conor O'Callaghan
subject: We are reminded that the fight for equality is not over.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Conor for AZ
body:
|
---

| | Today marks the 50th anniversary of Women's Equality Day, a day commemorating the enactment of the 19th amendment and women gaining the right to vote. As we celebrate the rights and protections won by past generations, we are reminded that the fight for equality is not over. We are still fighting for equal pay, better family leave policies, the right to choose, intersectional equality, and so much more. I want to make sure you saw my recent email about the Arizona Supreme Court and the importance of this election for reproductive freedom. What's happening in our state illustrates why the fight for equality continues today. I am 100% pro-choice, and our campaign is about fighting for Arizona, ending extremism, and empowering everyone to exercise their freedoms. **[Can I count on you to join us in this fight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68710009/423904210/-475151067?refcode=2023-08-26-equality&recurring=0&amount=13&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=8cd6a794-3744-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc0NDIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGNkNmE3OTQtMzc0NC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=x5GD81Vkf2wyA_dFhAqhvXLRI4gkbMWt2BD9XSTqdhE=)** _Conor_ [Join the Movement](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68710010/423904211/-475151067?refcode=2023-08-26-equality&recurring=0&amount=13&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=8cd6a794-3744-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc0NDIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGNkNmE3OTQtMzc0NC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=x5GD81Vkf2wyA_dFhAqhvXLRI4gkbMWt2BD9XSTqdhE=) Forwarded Message | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68710011/423904212/993309821?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc0NDIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGNkNmE3OTQtMzc0NC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=x5GD81Vkf2wyA_dFhAqhvXLRI4gkbMWt2BD9XSTqdhE=&emci=1e1d44f1-9843-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=8cd6a794-3744-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=7520491)
---

In the wake of _Dobbs v. Jackson_ , states across the country have rolled back our rights and left women and families with few if any options. Here in Arizona, we've seen a chaotic fight since last year over whether to enforce a law from the _Civil War_ that would prosecute women (and the doctors who help them) for exercising their right to choose.
This law is currently not in effect. **But we just learned today that Arizona's Supreme Court is reconsidering this horrible ban.**
If the court reinstates the law, women and doctors will be prosecuted for standard medical practices. Women will no longer have the freedom of choice and doctors will be prevented from saving lives or helping victims of rape and incest. This ban is wrong, and it's not what Arizonans want.
I don't know what the Arizona Supreme Court will do.
**But here's what I'll do in Congress: Codify _Roe v. Wade_ and protect reproductive rights. **
**[Will you join our movement and help me codify _Roe v. Wade_? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68710012/423904213/-475151067?refcode=2023-08-26-equality&recurring=0&amount=15&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=8cd6a794-3744-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc0NDIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGNkNmE3OTQtMzc0NC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=x5GD81Vkf2wyA_dFhAqhvXLRI4gkbMWt2BD9XSTqdhE=)**
[Join the Movement](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68710013/423904214/-475151067?refcode=2023-08-26-equality&recurring=0&amount=15&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=8cd6a794-3744-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc0NDIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGNkNmE3OTQtMzc0NC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=x5GD81Vkf2wyA_dFhAqhvXLRI4gkbMWt2BD9XSTqdhE=)
My opponent, David Schweikert, is a poster boy for the anti-choice movement. He supports national bans, opposes protecting access to contraception, and urged the U.S. Supreme Court to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ three years before the _Dobbs_ decision. His extremism is unmatched and we have to beat him.
I am building a grassroots campaign to fight for reproductive rights. Advocating to codify _Roe v. Wade_ is personal for me. As a husband, father, proud son of a strong independent woman, and big brother to two younger sisters, I firmly believe that no one should grow up in a country where women are treated as second-class citizens. I am 100% pro-choice. Our campaign is about protecting your rights to reproductive health care, and we need you to stand with us.
**[Can we count on you to join our campaign, stop David Schweikert's extremism, and protect a woman's right to choose?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68710014/423904215/-475151067?refcode=2023-08-26-equality&recurring=0&amount=15&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=8cd6a794-3744-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc0NDIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGNkNmE3OTQtMzc0NC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=x5GD81Vkf2wyA_dFhAqhvXLRI4gkbMWt2BD9XSTqdhE=)**
Join our movement and together we will protect the freedom to choose.
_Conor_

Our campaign is about protecting your rights to reproductive health care, and we need you to stand with us. = Join our movement and together we will protect the freedom to choose. clean_body: Sherrod is ready to smash records | Friend, Peter,I know. You 've received many emails recently, but I'll tell you this is the most important one yet! SHERROD BROWN, OHIO 'S FAR-LEFT SENATOR, BROUGHT IN A STAGGERING $5 MILLION LAST QUARTER, AND HE IS NOT SLOWING DOWN. We can't allow Coastal leftists to maintain their stranglehold over the Senate by re-electing Sherrod Brown. This is what my team and I have been warning you about, Peter. I desperately need you to support us so we can finally retire Sherrod Brown. Can I count on you to take action? If we fall short of our August goal, there is no doubt the Democrats will not only keep the Senate majority but even flip red States! Do you know what that means? More spending, more crime, more attacks on American energy, more illegal border crossings, and a bigger IRS collecting more tax dollars from you. Essentially, in a nutshell, LESS freedom for you and your family. My team has activated 800% matching to stop this takeover by the Radical Left! Please, Peter. We need your help. We're doing all we can to make you understand how vital donating is, but we don't have the luxury of time. | This is a critical moment in our campaign. Only YOU can help us fight back. If you're still with me and want to flip the Senate in November, I need you to help out. Thanks, -Matt Dolan PAID FOR BY DOLAN FOR OHIO Not authorized by any other candidate.

**Next week marks the end of August -- and with it, our end-of-month fundraising deadline.**

This is a critical benchmark in our effort to unseat extreme Rep. David Schweikert and give AZ-01 the representation it deserves.

Schweikert stands against so many communities in our district: He wants draconian abortion restriction with no exceptions, twice voted against medical care for our veterans, only answers to Republican Party bosses, and so much more.

That’s why my team and I are putting in the work -- _even on summer weekends_ \-- to defeat him.

clean_body: | = I hate to reach out to you on the weekend, friend, but I have an important update to share: Next week marks the end of August -- and with it, our end-of-month fundraising deadline. This is a critical benchmark in our effort to unseat extreme Rep. David Schweikert and give AZ-01 the representation it deserves. Schweikert stands against so many communities in our district: He wants draconian abortion restriction with no exceptions, twice voted against medical care for our veterans, only answers to Republican Party bosses, and so much more. That’s why my team and I are putting in the work -- even on summer weekends \-- to defeat him. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** With thanks, Marlene | Marlene's campaign to flip AZ-01 is being built from the ground up with grassroots support! = To learn more about Marlene and how she's fighting for Arizona families, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS Marlene for Congress 7904 E. Chaparral Road, Suite A110-472 Scottsdale, AZ 85250 United States

| Fellow Conservative, can I share something important with you?

Over the last six months we've held more than 100 campaign events across the country, met with thousands of voters, and drawn a line in the sand on important policy issues.

Now, I just completed my **FIRST** debate, and we're continuing to build a **SURGE** of momentum.

**BUT** , we still have a lot of ground to cover in order to win the White House and save our country!

_**[As we continue to build a winning campaign, I want to remind you why I am running for president and why your support matters.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8ee7844590aa45469ac2b61f63b883c7&_e=vfg6zV98Ku_kwy4KDhrbfgzGrVqUeYWZM9wQpt2hmlu78patEDHVh7aQ41fwqNbcxH_mfD5WM-EUr3zl6wCPpmoWKBCjWWPS_WFFZrZZTfBJoEXhobCz9wfLccIZH9XLgkheSPuFeqELewr0v9PfF5SxWqJHh2XgDuz2Mta_CbYcn9hG9PKqfpB9AiQO4mo_xSfMMgZSk72vwb-11q2vmrV87pHzLT-_1z7fgGnEpZbC_GySAC70uQErxPhmVx8ze4Y-gJrKT6zJdrqaw7QbGjAX1fF9SgpJrez8OU7SOnE-CR6HHa-H1H_zgCt4J9q9yEZ7gBT6RKevBpuYIJFzVzcNOab_0kkO7NigEiiXkGc%3D "As we continue to build a winning campaign, I want to remind you why I am running for president and why your support matters.")**_

I'm a proud daughter of legal immigrants, a wife of a combat veteran, and a mother of two. I have watched the American Dream unfold before me.

_**But, with the Democrats in power, our future is slipping. **_

Right now, we have too many families paying too much for groceries; too many small businesses who can't afford rent, and too many big businesses getting taxpayer bailouts.

We have too much crime on our streets - too many drugs flooding our cities - and too few police and border patrol.

And from Joe Biden on down, our leaders put too much trust in big government and too little trust in the American people.

They have us spiraling toward socialism, with a new trillion-dollar spending bill every few months, and _a national debt over 32 trillion dollars._

_**This is not the America I want to leave to my children! **_

I am running for president to save our country from the downward spiral of socialism and defeatism. I aim to move America upward toward freedom and strength.

_**[But, I need your help to make it happen. Can I count on you?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8ee7844590aa45469ac2b61f63b883c7&_e=vfg6zV98Ku_kwy4KDhrbfgzGrVqUeYWZM9wQpt2hmlu78patEDHVh7aQ41fwqNbcxH_mfD5WM-EUr3zl6wCPpmoWKBCjWWPS_WFFZrZZTfBJoEXhobCz9wfLccIZH9XLgkheSPuFeqELewr0v9PfF5SxWqJHh2XgDuz2Mta_CbYcn9hG9PKqfpB9AiQO4mo_exytRw1jAMth3-8lO_OPrjrn46alwWwcRC7H4MKhunrR1Woos6B8UFxkrlmkz7m_RkDBXsq5tyzRX79KfIvBJmK_Zp13m9tZrxv0APyX4z1C9FxH6rzih3MyfOljgtH3QnIMDpmDsrBGy3_Nn1MOzs6Mqkxi7Z2wYnvu2MiklDI%3D "But, I need your help to make it happen. Can I count on you? ")**_

I can promise you, America is always worth fighting for.

As a brown girl, growing up in a black-and-white world, I saw the promise of America unfold before me.

As the proud wife of a combat veteran, I saw our people's deep love of freedom, and determination to defend it.

As Governor, I saw our state move beyond hate and violence, and lift everyone in peace.

And as Ambassador, I saw that America is still the standard.

Our moment is now - and our mission is clear.

_**[Will you help me save our country and secure our future?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8ee7844590aa45469ac2b61f63b883c7&_e=vfg6zV98Ku_kwy4KDhrbfgzGrVqUeYWZM9wQpt2hmlu78patEDHVh7aQ41fwqNbcxH_mfD5WM-EUr3zl6wCPpmoWKBCjWWPS_WFFZrZZTfBJoEXhobCz9wfLccIZH9XLgkheSPuFeqELewr0v9PfF5SxWqJHh2XgDuz2Mta_CbYcn9hG9PKqfpB9AiQO4mo_8BSigQkANNYKa9ytelP6FKR-ott44zhFCXvNvZjL8A3KnhgGd4VzWcEhV8_QtBmKQglCjy3szeVvOPGIuueT0YUHempB8CJKTQ68qfOTFBnQcTWsjggdy5CR9NplaYEqayhCrQD6sayCIuzh1WIT4eufpx8nhIqHwnZ7VHv4_-Y%3D "Will you help me save our country and secure our future?")**_

Thank you for everything you do for our country.

My very best,
Nikki R. Haley

clean_body: Over the last six months we’ve held more than 100 campaign events across the country, met with thousands of voters, and drawn a line in the sand on important policy issues. | | | | | | | | | Fellow Conservative, can I share something important with you? Over the last six months we've held more than 100 campaign events across the country, met with thousands of voters, and drawn a line in the sand on important policy issues. Now, I just completed my FIRST debate, and we're continuing to build a SURGE of momentum. BUT , we still have a lot of ground to cover in order to win the White House and save our country! "As we continue to build a winning campaign, I want to remind you why I am running for president and why your support matters." | I'm a proud daughter of legal immigrants, a wife of a combat veteran, and a mother of two. I have watched the American Dream unfold before me. But, with the Democrats in power, our future is slipping. Right now, we have too many families paying too much for groceries; too many small businesses who can't afford rent, and too many big businesses getting taxpayer bailouts. We have too much crime on our streets - too many drugs flooding our cities - and too few police and border patrol. And from Joe Biden on down, our leaders put too much trust in big government and too little trust in the American people. They have us spiraling toward socialism, with a new trillion-dollar spending bill every few months, and a national debt over 32 trillion dollars. This is not the America I want to leave to my children! I am running for president to save our country from the downward spiral of socialism and defeatism. I aim to move America upward toward freedom and strength. "But, I need your help to make it happen. Can I count on you? " I can promise you, America is always worth fighting for. As a brown girl, growing up in a black-and-white world, I saw the promise of America unfold before me. As the proud wife of a combat veteran, I saw our people's deep love of freedom, and determination to defend it. As Governor, I saw our state move beyond hate and violence, and lift everyone in peace. And as Ambassador, I saw that America is still the standard. Our moment is now - and our mission is clear. "Will you help me save our country and secure our future?" | | "I appreciate your support more than you can imagine. If you can join me today by chipping in, it would mean so much to me." Thank you for everything you do for our country. My very best, Nikki R. clean_body: Let’s prove them wrong | | ICYMI, team: anti-abortion extremists are already threatening another Ohio showdown. Fresh off this month's HUGE triumph, we're rapidly shifting our focus to the central showdown of the year. This November features the SOLE ballot measure to safeguard abortions and to maintain our unbeaten run in upholding Roe nationally, we need to hit the ground running. = = Listen closely, friend, the underhanded tactics that surfaced the "November will be different" sentiment aren't going anywhere. Their aim in the special election was clear: cloud the waters with confusion to mislead voters and divert their attention from the actual battle ahead in November. We overcame their ploys this month, but there's no time for complacency. We must fuel our drive, rally the troops, and ensure our community is prepared and passionate about preserving reproductive rights. November is just around the corner. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Your support means the world! Team, today means a lot to me. Women's Equality Day commemorates the adoption of the 19th Amendment into the Constitution – an amendment that, after years of tireless advocacy, gave women the right to vote.It is not lost on me that despite its adoption, women of color – women who helped lead the fight – were still denied the right to vote until the Voting Rights Act of 1965. So today, as a woman of color, I am committed to championing ALL women by promoting equality and voting rights. Because intersectionality _matters_. **[Please, can you chip in any amount right now before our urgent end-of-month deadline? We need to get out the vote, and every dollar counts towards doing so.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68711153/423907844/-93024851?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.08.26_B1_Womens-Equality-Day_30o&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTE2NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjkzN2JlZS0zYTQ0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LAgZ4JSRcAYBHFPoRh3EmZbRDx4at2Z-ABlakGXFbE8=)**

clean_body: | | | = Team, today means a lot to me. Women's Equality Day commemorates the adoption of the 19th Amendment into the Constitution – an amendment that, after years of tireless advocacy, gave women the right to vote.It is not lost on me that despite its adoption, women of color – women who helped lead the fight – were still denied the right to vote until the Voting Rights Act of 1965. So today, as a woman of color, I am committed to championing ALL women by promoting equality and voting rights. Because intersectionality matters. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = With the primary only 10 short days away, I am personally asking you to help me get one step closer to being a champion for RI-01 in Congress. – Sabina | | ---|--- | | Paid for and Authorized by Sabina for Rhode Island | | Sabina for Rhode Island P.O Box 40715 Providence, RI 02940 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Campbell Pair
subject: Did you see the GOP Debate Wednesday night?
body:
Peter,

Vivek Ramaswamy called climate change a hoax, “Drill, Frack, Burn Coal” .

Gov. Doug Burgum said he would get rid of the Department of Education.

Gov. Ron DeSantis praised his six-week abortion ban he signed in Florida as a “pro-life” governor.

Former Vice President Mike Pence pledged a national abortion ban.

The GOP are not pro-life.

We must protect women.

| | Friend,

---
I’ve talked about how dark of a day August 24 was for our country...

---
... _From the corrupt Radical Left prosecutor arresting me as an innocent man, to Democrats gloating over my mugshot, to Crooked Joe raising money off of my arrest, to the Third World conditions of the violent Fulton County Jail._
---
_But we’ve had enough of the darkness. Today, I want to shine light on something great I saw that day.
_
---
**As I rode in on my motorcade to be arrested as an innocent man, I heard shouts of** _**“FREE TRUMP”**_**from patriots peacefully standing on the sidewalks.**
---
Keep in mind, this isn’t exactly the most Republican-friendly city in America.
---
That’s what made it so surprising and nice to hear._
_
---
As I’ve said before, I truly believe that the people of our country are horrified at what Crooked Joe’s Democrats are doing to our once free Republic. _The people get it, and they won’t stand for it.__
_
---
**Biden’s tyrannical abuse of power will be what finally UNITES our country and brings all Americans together to choose a new path of GREATNESS.**_
_

Biden’s tyrannical abuse of power will be what finally UNITES our country and brings all Americans together to choose a new path of GREATNESS. If Democrats aren’t making life easy for you right now, then please don’t donate. Don’t even think about it. | | Thank you, Donald J. name: Kim Nguyen
subject: Fighting for our rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kim Nguyen for Congress
body:
| | **Happy Women’s Equality Day!**

Today, we’re celebrating how far American women have come and committing ourselves to fighting for voting rights, gender equity, and reproductive freedom.

It’s critical that we defend voting rights for _everyone_ , particularly those who have previously been silenced at the ballot box. Women of color were some of the last Americans to gain the right to vote, and our voices are needed now more than ever – at the polls and in Congress.

**My team wrote you a message explaining why this is so important to our campaign.[If you’re ready to join this fight, please consider rushing a donation before this month’s fundraising deadline:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68711780/423909922/788273769?contactdata=AT9St/5QqVautpio/LUAHgw9GBG29gkA+AKyPkewVJYK5JSvkUSBlMS8U2WgVbGdwnXXR76tGTpqx2dw9iiTJR7Ee6nSWWAyq55UA9xIFdg=&amount=10&refcode=KBN_EM_FR_3MO_230826_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmI0ZWY0OGQtM2U0NC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qeXww7or8zLR44N2sBPQUQ7PxOgFDPjrwdxfBxjXH5E=)** | | **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68711781/423909923/788273769?contactdata=AT9St/5QqVautpio/LUAHgw9GBG29gkA+AKyPkewVJYK5JSvkUSBlMS8U2WgVbGdwnXXR76tGTpqx2dw9iiTJR7Ee6nSWWAyq55UA9xIFdg=&amount=10&refcode=KBN_EM_FR_3MO_230826_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmI0ZWY0OGQtM2U0NC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qeXww7or8zLR44N2sBPQUQ7PxOgFDPjrwdxfBxjXH5E=)**
---
Thanks,

Kim

* * *
**_Forwarded Message from Team Nguyen:_**

**Tomorrow is Women’s Equality Day, which commemorates the adoption of the Nineteenth Amendment!**

In 1920, after decades of organizing, American women began to secure their fundamental right to vote. This was a watershed moment in our shared history – and it opened the door for women like Kim to run, win, and lead!

When Kim is in Congress, she’ll fight to protect the right to vote and defend the rights and freedoms of all women. That means codifying _Roe_ , protecting access to abortion and contraception, closing the gender pay gap, and addressing the issues that impact women – especially women of color.

[Will you make a donation so Kim can win this race and make history as the first Asian-Latina in Congress? With your help, we can beat the GOP and elect a Democratic champion in CA-45!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68711782/423909924/788273769?contactdata=AT9St/5QqVautpio/LUAHgw9GBG29gkA+AKyPkewVJYK5JSvkUSBlMS8U2WgVbGdwnXXR76tGTpqx2dw9iiTJR7Ee6nSWWAyq55UA9xIFdg=&amount=10&refcode=KBN_EM_FR_3MO_230826_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmI0ZWY0OGQtM2U0NC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qeXww7or8zLR44N2sBPQUQ7PxOgFDPjrwdxfBxjXH5E=)

clean_body: | | Happy Women’s Equality Day! Today, we’re celebrating how far American women have come and committing ourselves to fighting for voting rights, gender equity, and reproductive freedom. It’s critical that we defend voting rights for everyone , particularly those who have previously been silenced at the ballot box. Women of color were some of the last Americans to gain the right to vote, and our voices are needed now more than ever – at the polls and in Congress. My team wrote you a message explaining why this is so important to our campaign.= | | = Thanks, Kim Forwarded Message from Team Nguyen: Tomorrow is Women’s Equality Day, which commemorates the adoption of the Nineteenth Amendment! In 1920, after decades of organizing, American women began to secure their fundamental right to vote. This was a watershed moment in our shared history – and it opened the door for women like Kim to run, win, and lead! When Kim is in Congress, she’ll fight to protect the right to vote and defend the rights and freedoms of all women. That means codifying Roe , protecting access to abortion and contraception, closing the gender pay gap, and addressing the issues that impact women – especially women of color. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for being a part of our campaign. name: Amanda Nichols, Our Revolution
subject: Women’s Rights are Human Rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis —

Today is Women’s Equality Day, and the 103rd anniversary of the day women officially gained the right to vote in the US. We fought for that right just about as long as we’ve now held it — a good reminder that revolutions take time.

Our Revolution has been fighting for women since we were founded seven years ago, and we will fight another 100 years to secure our rights if we need to. This is where you come in.

In honor of Women’s Equality Day and our 7th Anniversary - we have been trying to recruit as many progressives as we can to give a gift in the next 24 hours. Many folks are adding $7 to their gift or adding $7 to their gift in honor of it. Are you in? (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9676?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230826_FR_wed_0_3MO_amandanichols_na_na_wed&t=1008&akid=4589%2E5885482%2Ea2qjxd)

In 2022, we helped elect fifty-seven(!!) women to office, including sending some incredible new members of Congress, including Summer Lee in Pennsylvania, Delia Ramirez in Illinois, and Becca Balint, the first woman ever to serve in Congress from Vermont.

And just earlier this month, with the help of grassroots donors like you, our volunteers mobilized thousands of Ohio voters to successfully protect abortion rights.

Our Revolution will always roll up its sleeves and do everything it can to elect and empower more women. Help us celebrate our accomplishments and keep fighting for progress. Give a gift today. (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9676?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230826_FR_wed_0_3MO_amandanichols_na_na_wed&t=1009&akid=4589%2E5885482%2Ea2qjxd)

From Medicare for All to living wages to putting an end to medical and student debt — these are all issues that impact women at a much higher rate than men.

We are here fighting for progress today thanks to the women and movements that came before us. And we’re building a lasting movement to make sure progress is never halted. Donate today and be part of our movement. (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9676?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230826_FR_wed_0_3MO_amandanichols_na_na_wed&t=1010&akid=4589%2E5885482%2Ea2qjxd)

When we organize, we win—

Amanda Nichols

Communications Director, Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

name: Josh Harder
subject: A national emergency
body:
My new bill. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68711979/423910551/657127102?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2NiNjJiODktM2Y0NC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=67Q42ESstzQLL3AEY08P5m7SDRqQFP2m38TlhddUL2g=) | Peter, Right now, we’re all feeling the effects of climate change. Extreme heat is raging throughout the country, wildfires are spreading rapidly, and this past week there was a hurricane barreling towards LA for the first time in 84 years. Meanwhile, Republican presidential candidates are still claiming climate change is a hoax. But the science is crystal clear - global warming is real and we’re already seeing it’s effects. This is an emergency and we have to treat it like one. **That’s why I’m pushing a new bipartisan bill called the Extreme Heat Emergency Act which simply adds extreme heat to the list of natural disaster emergencies that FEMA responds to. Extreme heat kills more people every year than any other natural disaster, and we keep hitting record high temperatures year after year. This bill would allow FEMA to provide assistance such as water and fans, mobile cooling centers, and cover medical expenses caused by heat-related illness during an extreme heat wave.** FEMA already does this for tornados, hurricanes, and floods. I believe that federal help should be available when we’re experiencing several days over 100 degree heat - especially if the power goes out like we saw in parts of the Central Valley during the recent heat wave. I’m hopeful that we can pass this legislation by the end of the year so these resources will be available by next summer - which could be even hotter with climate change. [**Will you add your name as a citizen cosponsor of my Extreme Heat Emergency Act today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68711980/423910552/1570351574?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2NiNjJiODktM2Y0NC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=67Q42ESstzQLL3AEY08P5m7SDRqQFP2m38TlhddUL2g=&emci=031d48ec-2844-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ccb62b89-3f44-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=6455652) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68711981/423910553/1570351574?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2NiNjJiODktM2Y0NC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=67Q42ESstzQLL3AEY08P5m7SDRqQFP2m38TlhddUL2g=&emci=031d48ec-2844-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ccb62b89-3f44-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=6455652) Let’s get this through Congress! Josh
---

clean_body: My new bill. | = | Peter, Right now, we’re all feeling the effects of climate change. Extreme heat is raging throughout the country, wildfires are spreading rapidly, and this past week there was a hurricane barreling towards LA for the first time in 84 years. Meanwhile, Republican presidential candidates are still claiming climate change is a hoax. But the science is crystal clear - global warming is real and we’re already seeing it’s effects. This is an emergency and we have to treat it like one. That’s why I’m pushing a new bipartisan bill called the Extreme Heat Emergency Act which simply adds extreme heat to the list of natural disaster emergencies that FEMA responds to. Extreme heat kills more people every year than any other natural disaster, and we keep hitting record high temperatures year after year. This bill would allow FEMA to provide assistance such as water and fans, mobile cooling centers, and cover medical expenses caused by heat-related illness during an extreme heat wave. FEMA already does this for tornados, hurricanes, and floods. I believe that federal help should be available when we’re experiencing several days over 100 degree heat - especially if the power goes out like we saw in parts of the Central Valley during the recent heat wave. I’m hopeful that we can pass this legislation by the end of the year so these resources will be available by next summer - which could be even hotter with climate change. Let’s get this through Congress! Josh *
