name: Team Cori
subject: Update: Court ruling on access to abortion pill Mifepristone.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
This is just the beginning of the Republicans’ plan to ban abortion care nationwide: | |
---
Peter, **A federal appeals court just ruled to limit access to the abortion pill Mifepristone.** That ruling is in limbo until the Supreme Court reviews it, but this is just the beginning of extremist Republicans’ plan to ban abortion care nationwide. Even though evidence shows that people can safely and effectively take medication abortion in their own homes, anti-abortion advocates are trying to take away our ability to get medication abortion prescribed via telehealth and to be able get pills through the mail. **Right now, accessing medication abortion at home is a lifeline for marginalized people who can’t afford to take time off work, get child care, or arrange to travel hundreds of miles to an abortion clinic.** **That’s why Rep. Cori Bush introduced the _Protecting Access to Medication Abortion Act_ , which would ensure that people seeking abortion care can always access medication abortion through telehealth and certified pharmacies, including mail-order pharmacies.** This is personal for Cori, who is a nurse and who has faced financial barriers and systemic racism when she needed an abortion. She understands that this is urgent, and she won’t let the far-right ban life-saving health care. [**Please chip in today to support Cori Bush as she does everything in her power to protect and expand life-saving abortion access.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zK0-NA896nAhN4QOUvzLnqAZuZgnLKV_ivcftBHfPO_6EOMSjpq7CTg6ZoaJwjB5ACZaPWny0R0vKILKi67Ps68vclnJLdeOdGQW43cecV6GuL6dJwpALKbKRbCJgSWgSMsJ0TSiHum2JHvxfJw1AAmTZ7ZPQ2RvQaxC8i3A8XtilDGhJ1PVdZnUSZjVYy6TBzJWoJasOhA6_WvmQtNp-sFTwf42ws5TJGDdJsXB_CLT9IL8xgvxMnk8CQKo5795Zfkr_RyuGLWQYxhlTNlBOb_KrsYoRhCcfpABJd0ba8-HTD20Cr26zIDDQI4Dn-aD4p0wmD2yyX2lVt6Mc0wWRoSjxP90euamETodSMFi-kKZn_b17NZjm6aJt_ikxWCx6nm3z3VZpHaY8OR_eZKaJ0/3z2/2NC8tZj1SdOV4fNmk8ZJGQ/h0/7_amp1f1MOjZc8UFVu2AF9rYrgmu3Q_4s5ZHjbGUoUk) **[CHIP IN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zK0-NA896nAhN4QOUvzLnqAZuZgnLKV_ivcftBHfPO_9fSHrTcKK2qkiwKDyLlD2POHv72m2RuWm6JJpzjIT4I01vSKXYh5Q0h-C8yOdWN3p0ucI1nKxT_CfqDT5sGYRc-_zJBT9DComKKBnaQq1tZI258_A5n_wVwX3YuAxjI390XIlWxWG9BThmTQrlDy-SiB6SbR7jqmLinlxH7NTvGRgu-Hzv62cY_RN4bcpg9p82mZolqZ1Lr_U0vaQSW84Jd2DJo6mNteCqYRVilwDs9bXZvdGSf-z8pc5A4iJrAxj4Lb_AxuNsmLJJY_behS6Yjw80EcCmWRaXwEsbz8o3sR0saWyG9V9JYlhltq0YbM2c4cBOFSZ8WSrzIgB9RPurWWjxKLWVdMV8pCQLl1scG/3z2/2NC8tZj1SdOV4fNmk8ZJGQ/h1/eodBMmYK41mYTHkm4O4p0l_bNDIk7jK6RvDYb9zZm_A) ** **As Cori explained in a recent roundtable discussion she led with Democrats on the House Oversight Committee, the science is clear: For over 20 years, medication abortion has proven to be safe and effective.** It now accounts for over half of all abortions in the United States. Abortion pills were necessary before the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ last year -- and they’re even more essential now. **In the year since the far-right Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , 14 states including Missouri have banned abortion care.** Republicans have since tried to lay the groundwork for a national abortion ban, including by attempting to limit access to medication abortion. In Cori’s state of Missouri, where abortion care is already out of reach for many, people are 25 times more likely to die from giving birth than from taking abortion pills. **Quite literally, medication abortion saves lives. Forced birth can be deadly, particularly for Black women, who are three times more likely than white women to die from pregnancy-related complications.** As a Black woman who’s seen racism in health care from the perspective of a patient and a nurse, Cori is leading efforts in Congress to secure reproductive justice. clean_body: This is just the beginning of the Republicans’ plan to ban abortion care nationwide: | | Peter, A federal appeals court just ruled to limit access to the abortion pill Mifepristone. That ruling is in limbo until the Supreme Court reviews it, but this is just the beginning of extremist Republicans’ plan to ban abortion care nationwide. Even though evidence shows that people can safely and effectively take medication abortion in their own homes, anti-abortion advocates are trying to take away our ability to get medication abortion prescribed via telehealth and to be able get pills through the mail. Right now, accessing medication abortion at home is a lifeline for marginalized people who can’t afford to take time off work, get child care, or arrange to travel hundreds of miles to an abortion clinic. That’s why Rep. Cori Bush introduced the Protecting Access to Medication Abortion Act , which would ensure that people seeking abortion care can always access medication abortion through telehealth and certified pharmacies, including mail-order pharmacies. This is personal for Cori, who is a nurse and who has faced financial barriers and systemic racism when she needed an abortion. She understands that this is urgent, and she won’t let the far-right ban life-saving health care. As Cori explained in a recent roundtable discussion she led with Democrats on the House Oversight Committee, the science is clear: For over 20 years, medication abortion has proven to be safe and effective. It now accounts for over half of all abortions in the United States. Abortion pills were necessary before the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade last year -- and they’re even more essential now. In the year since the far-right Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade , 14 states including Missouri have banned abortion care. Republicans have since tried to lay the groundwork for a national abortion ban, including by attempting to limit access to medication abortion. In Cori’s state of Missouri, where abortion care is already out of reach for many, people are 25 times more likely to die from giving birth than from taking abortion pills. Quite literally, medication abortion saves lives. Forced birth can be deadly, particularly for Black women, who are three times more likely than white women to die from pregnancy-related complications. As a Black woman who’s seen racism in health care from the perspective of a patient and a nurse, Cori is leading efforts in Congress to secure reproductive justice. In addition to legislation to protect access to medication abortion, Cori has introduced bills to remove disparities and barriers for those in need of abortion care, including providing grant assistance to cover expenses for abortion seekers and requiring insurance coverage to include abortion care. As unelected judges and anti-abortion lawmakers try to strip away our rights, we need Cori Bush’s leadership in Congress to protect life-saving abortion care. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thank you. The fight to protect life-saving medication like Mifepristone is far from over. In solidarity, Team Cori Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress | | Sent via . | Friend, As you know, the housing crisis is a major concern here in the northeast. NH Senate Republicans are working hard to find common-sense solutions to resolve this challenge - and we are starting to see some great progress! Please take a look at Sen. Keith Murphy's latest op-ed (below) about cutting red tape to encourage more building. Thank you, NH Senate Republicans
---
---
| |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| |
---
|
# Senator Keith Murphy: Empowering NH's home builders
---
| |
---
| WE’VE ALL heard about the housing crisis by now. New Hampshire’s rents have increased 37.5% over the past three years, according to Zillow data. That’s the eighth largest increase in the nation. Would-be homebuyers are seeing much the same, with prices up 8% year-over-year and a whopping 65% in the past six years. Rates for new mortgages are at least 3 percentage points higher than just a few short years ago, and apartment rental vacancies in New Hampshire are below 1%. The bottom line is that it’s a bad time for anyone looking for new housing. There is no easy fix to this crisis, and likely the crunch will continue for some years. However, there are steps that can be taken to alleviate some of the pressure. The most immediate and concrete is to build. The economic principles of supply and demand are universal. Whether you are a restaurant owner like myself or a home builder, if you have an increased demand, the only way to stabilize or lower prices is to increase supply. Unfortunately, there are plenty of roadblocks for builders that hold them back from creating new housing. Red tape and regulations slow down any construction project and the industry of home building is not immune. Often, the best thing that our local and state governments can do to fix problems is to simply get out of the way, and this is one of those instances. SB 78, a bill that passed through the Election Law and Municipal Affairs Committee on which I serve as vice chairman, addresses some of these challenges. This legislation takes a very innovative approach to the way the security bonds are held by town planning boards in home construction projects. Traditionally, bonds are held in full until the completion of a project. If a project is slowed while the builder waits on utility hookups or infrastructure installation, that money sits stagnant. Under SB 78, the bond would be released gradually in relation to the percentage the project is complete. If the project is 80% complete, 80% of the bond would be released. Allowing quicker return of this security frees up additional capital for the home builder. Instead of keeping money tied up to cover work that has been substantially completed, it can now be put back into use to fund the builder’s next project in a timely manner. With interest rates where they are today, allowing a builder to use their own money to begin a new project that our state desperately needs just makes sense. This is not an attention-grabbing bill that will adorn the headlines of your local paper, but it will make a real impact on the home building industry for the better. It is an innovative way to reduce the cost of creating new housing without negatively impacting the builder, the buyer or community. Here in New Hampshire, we pride ourselves on taking a different, hands-off approach to local and state government. We don’t do things just because that’s the way they’re done. We find what works and what doesn’t, and encourage the former. This legislation is a great example of doing things the New Hampshire way so that we can make it a little easier for Granite State families to find great homes. Looking to the future, I and my Republican Senate colleagues will continue to work to find ways to bring down the cost of housing through streamlining regulations and making it easier to build the units our state so desperately needs. _Senator Keith Murphy (R-Bedford) serves as vice chair of the Election Law and Municipal Affairs Committee and on the Ways and Means Committee._

name: Laura Friedman
subject: What does pool have to do with politics? 🎱
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68712754/423912368/62647395?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWUxMTQ1MGYtNDI0NC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MS40zsaUH-PXwUPRfLfJtr43gbs-rJBy61KJqyypXpA=) Here's something you may not know about me, friend.

Back in my college years, and even for a bit during my producing days, I was a semi-pro pool player. 🎱
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68712755/423912369/-1241314520?refcode=em-8.24.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWUxMTQ1MGYtNDI0NC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MS40zsaUH-PXwUPRfLfJtr43gbs-rJBy61KJqyypXpA=)
Believe it or not, some of the most important skills I developed at the pool table I still use today as a legislator. I learned that people like playing mind games when they want to win, and being one of the few women in a male-dominated sport taught me how to be strategic -- _and not be intimidated._

Today is Women's Equality Day, and as a candidate for Congress in a field of mostly male counterparts, it's not lost on me that the statistics aren't exactly in my favor. Less than 30% of our federal representatives are women. _In fact, I'd be the first woman ever elected here in CA-30._

But I've learned to channel that pressure by staying focused on what winning actually means: _delivering results._ That's why I’ve taken on some of the toughest challenges -- not because they’re hard, but because they’re important.
* I've been a champion for efforts to improve street safety, increase affordable housing stock, and protect our climate.

* I led the effort to improve transparency and keep people safer from sexual harassment and retaliation in the state assembly.

* I’ve even taken on online ticket sellers to ensure Californians can see their favorite performers without price-gouging.

[I'm running for Congress because we need proven, effective leaders in Washington that have a track record of delivering results. So today, of all days, I hope you'll join me by making a small contribution to my campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68712756/423912370/-1241314520?refcode=em-8.26.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWUxMTQ1MGYtNDI0NC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MS40zsaUH-PXwUPRfLfJtr43gbs-rJBy61KJqyypXpA=)

clean_body: | = Here's something you may not know about me, friend. Back in my college years, and even for a bit during my producing days, I was a semi-pro pool player. 🎱 = Believe it or not, some of the most important skills I developed at the pool table I still use today as a legislator. I learned that people like playing mind games when they want to win, and being one of the few women in a male-dominated sport taught me how to be strategic -- and not be intimidated. Today is Women's Equality Day, and as a candidate for Congress in a field of mostly male counterparts, it's not lost on me that the statistics aren't exactly in my favor. Less than 30% of our federal representatives are women. In fact, I'd be the first woman ever elected here in CA-30. But I've learned to channel that pressure by staying focused on what winning actually means: delivering results. That's why I’ve taken on some of the toughest challenges -- not because they’re hard, but because they’re important. I've been a champion for efforts to improve street safety, increase affordable housing stock, and protect our climate. I led the effort to improve transparency and keep people safer from sexual harassment and retaliation in the state assembly. I’ve even taken on online ticket sellers to ensure Californians can see their favorite performers without price-gouging. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, and happy Women's Equality Day! I've shown as Washington's commissioner of public lands that when we work together to tackle our problems with proper planning and strategy, every Washingtonian benefits.

_**I've shown as Washington's commissioner of public lands that when we create cross-cutting solutions to our most pressing problems, we can create jobs, put more money in more families' pockets, and boost local economies.**_

Now, I'm ready to continue creating cross-cutting solutions as Washington's next governor. By addressing our housing crisis and rising costs, protecting our land and water, and expanding healthcare access, we can deliver a brighter, more prosperous future for us all. I've shown as Washington's commissioner of public lands that when we create cross-cutting solutions to our most pressing problems, we can create jobs, put more money in more families' pockets, and boost local economies. Now, I'm ready to continue creating cross-cutting solutions as Washington's next governor. By addressing our housing crisis and rising costs, protecting our land and water, and expanding healthcare access, we can deliver a brighter, more prosperous future for us all. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Hilary Franz * | | = Paid for by Friends of Hilary Franz (D) Friends of Hilary Franz (D) PO Box 9100 Seattle, WA 98109 United States | = Email is a critical way for our campaign to stay in touch with you. body:
| | | Friend, You know the terrible names that Democrats call conservatives like us:

**_-Insurrectionist_**
** _-Election Denier_**
** _-Conspiracy Theorist_**

**With me, they don’t stop there.__**

**I’ve called terrible things that I can’t even repeat in this email, labels that no good person would ever say to another human all because I’m a black conservative who believes that the American people should come FIRST.**

I'm reaching out to you because I find myself in a truly critical situation.

My name is John James - a devoted Christian, unwavering conservative, and combat veteran. I've embarked on a grassroots campaign to restore true, America First leadership to Washington.

Having volunteered to pilot Apache helicopters in Iraq, I understand the importance of fighting for my country, no matter the odds.

I know you share my deep concern for our country's future, and I implore you to read on. This moment is pivotal for my campaign.

subject: Deco for President?

body:
#
We typically send you emails detailing our community organizing efforts and sharing policy updates, but — to celebrate International Dog Day — **today we wanted to share a quick update on Alexandria’s furriest ally in the progressive movement, Deco!**
****
Deco has been a fierce supporter of Alexandria in her fight for social, economic, and environmental justice for all since he was adopted.
From all of us, to all of you and your furry friends: Happy International Dog Day! 💕
In solidarity,
Team AOC
PS. Would you like to join Deco in supporting our movement? [Make a $5 contribution here today. clean_body: We typically send you emails detailing our community organizing efforts and sharing policy updates, but — to celebrate International Dog Day — today we wanted to share a quick update on Alexandria’s furriest ally in the progressive movement, Deco! ** Deco has been a fierce supporter of Alexandria in her fight for social, economic, and environmental justice for all since he was adopted. From all of us, to all of you and your furry friends: Happy International Dog Day! 💕 In solidarity, Team AOC PS. Would you like to join Deco in supporting our movement? | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Hi Peter —
We know the 2024 election feels like it's a long way off. But the truth is, it will be here before we know it.
And, as recent events remind us — like the former President and his cronies getting indicted in Georgia, or Wednesday's unhinged Republican Presidential Debate — the stakes couldn't be higher.
Here's what is clear: the Republican Party is the party of cutting Social Security, restricting abortion rights, denying the climate crisis, and subverting our democracy.
Electing Kirsten is one of our best chances at taking back the House — so we can focus on what actually matters. But we need the resources to build up our campaign's infrastructure and reach voters now.
We have a fundraising deadline in five days. Can we count on you to chip in now? The more we can put into electing Kirsten now, the better our chances of winning in November. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_082623_EOM_B_act]

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: Championing Women's Equality Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
Hey there, Peter. Today is Women's Equality Day, and I’m reflecting on the strides we've made toward gender equality, as well as the work that still lies ahead. Today is a great reminder of our nation's progress towards a more equitable society and renews our commitment to empowering women in all facets of life.
Women's Equality Day honors the ratification of the 19th Amendment, granting women the right to vote. While this achievement marked a pivotal moment in the history of women's rights, it highlighted the beginning of a much larger journey toward comprehensive equality. We've witnessed remarkable progress in various spheres—business, politics, education, sports—yet, we must acknowledge the remaining disparities and take action to address them.
As a father of a daughter, I'm deeply invested in the cause of women's rights and gender equality.
https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/ [https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/]
I’m committed to advocating for policies that ensure my daughter and all young women have the same opportunities as anyone. It's our collective responsibility to bridge the gender pay gap, ensure access to quality healthcare and reproductive rights, and establish an inclusive environment free from discrimination and harassment.
On this Women's Equality Day, let's celebrate the achievements of the past while recommitting ourselves to a future where our daughters and all young women have equal opportunities.
Thank you,
Wiley Nickel

https://www.facebook.com/WileyNickelNC [https://www.facebook.com/WileyNickelNC] http://twitter.com/wileynickel [http://twitter.com/wileynickel] http://www.instagram.com/wileynickelnc [http://www.instagram.com/wileynickelnc]

Fellow American,

The first GOP debate was electric.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

**God** is real.
There are **two** genders.
Human flourishing requires **fossil fuels**.
**Reverse racism** is racism.
An open border is **no border**.
**Parents** determine the education of their children.
The **nuclear family** is the greatest form of governance known to mankind.
**Capitalism** lifts people up from poverty.
There are three branches of the U.S. government, **not four**.

---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Marc Elias (via DLCC.org)
subject: Wisconsin explained
body:
For years, Republican legislators in Wisconsin have used their power to violate the state constitution, rig the legislative districts, and restrict access to the ballot by extreme partisan gerrymandering. | | |
---
| | Hi, it’s Marc Elias. I’m proud to be one of the top attorneys in the fight to defend our democracy against Republicans’ far-right agenda. Today, I’m reaching out because we need to talk about what is happening in Wisconsin. Earlier this month, a lawsuit was filed that challenges the state’s legislative districts – **this is a big step in our fight for fair elections, access to the ballot, and equal protection.** For years, Republican lawmakers in Wisconsin have used their power to violate the state constitution, rig the legislative districts, and restrict access to the ballot through extreme partisan gerrymandering. This lawsuit calls out these harmful practices and seeks to reestablish clear and fair district boundaries. This lawsuit is critical to our democratic progress; with a newly established liberal majority on the WI Supreme Court, **this is a pivotal moment for Democrats.** This is the newest battle in our fight for democracy, and _state legislatures are our last line of defense._ Democrats could secure fair maps and _finally_ build power in states like Wisconsin, but they need your help. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, on behalf of my friends at the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, to ask you to [donate a triple-matched gift of $7 to help elect Democrats to state legislatures who will stand up to Republicans’ anti-democratic attacks ahead of their end-of-month deadline. Can I count on your support today? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x7xYl1nBSu9Is2oiL4sorpBOYgdJt03FvNkKL38sdcZMyagFHZF2T-50zLOCn2QJ3xFuP7qVLdPLFYElZErPrkP0OWg9-La_4HIn2DMk0TrTNpMTromMPLapTqf0mSvx2Tp2OYJRqBQLnINJRZrH1rIJndGf2LgB7NjP4NvOkS-LGgfxoUh-u0gs29cET-U799akSzTZdXXl8f_l5tuKOJwxdV_6Jngo7vrvkRG4Srv14PNN841e3zb9kluDMINDWV9ZftVAaNkieHiOvkFdN9-70hx8q6_4691nYr5LZxjRCEvjy3diuAbJ5LSUuBk73tNGND28_9sNEdBh3S-USbknuaCFQ0x1a90R1G5EfctVAbnqXWWNTVkkRUFeGR2Vk/3z2/YlK9iWxiROmndaWt5NcIFw/h0/wgsPFFG7-8r6Wy-8PIZmGF6nbL7xo9p5Fl5IXVtitzY) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

Beyond this lawsuit, there is so much work to be done to defend our progress in states like WI and beyond. So I’m asking you to step up and own a piece of this fight with me.
[Will you chip in $7, $25, or any amount you can today to elect state Democrats who will defend against Republican attacks on our democracy, our fair elections, and our access to the ballot? subject: (signature NEEDED) thank President Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
You’ve been handpicked as one of our top supporters!
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51980?t=6&akid=10175%2E878179%2EQ7yMh5) **Listen, President Biden has been an INCREDIBLE President and defender of our democracy.** [**So you’ve been personally selected to sign our letter thanking President Biden for fighting for the American people! Please, we need 10,000 signatures by midnight to demonstrate massive support! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51980?t=7&akid=10175%2E878179%2EQ7yMh5) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51980?t=8&akid=10175%2E878179%2EQ7yMh5)
---
TO: President Biden
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear President Biden,**

**_I’m so thankful for everything you’ve done as President!_**

Over the last two and a half years, you’ve fought TIRELESSLY for the American people — defending abortion rights, confirming an incredible Supreme Court Justice, saving Social Security from GOP cuts, and creating millions of jobs.

**I know standing up to MAGA Republican attacks isn’t easy, especially now that Donald Trump is running for President again.**

So as your reelection race kicks into high gear, I wanted to show my support and thank you for being such an amazing leader for our country! [**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the nation who stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to Voter Protection Project to thank you and to keep electing incredible Democrats up and down the ballot »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51980?t=9&akid=10175%2E878179%2EQ7yMh5) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51980?t=10&akid=10175%2E878179%2EQ7yMh5)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=10175%2E878179%2EQ7yMh5). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=10175%2E878179%2EQ7yMh5).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=10175%2E878179%2EQ7yMh5) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=10175%2E878179%2EQ7yMh5). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=10175%2E878179%2EQ7yMh5)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=10175%2E878179%2EQ7yMh5)

Today we celebrate Women’s Equality Day – a commemoration of the adoption of the 19th Amendment and women gaining the right to vote.

But as we look back on the incredible achievements of the suffrage movement, we are reminded of the steep barriers to full equality that women still face in America.

We still don’t have adequate paid maternity leave in many states. We still make less on average for the jobs as men. And we are grappling with the new reality that our bodily autonomy is longer recognized at a national level.

I was proud to be elected to the House as part of a historic wave of women in 2018. I've consistently supported legislation that expands women’s access to quality, affordable health care, family planning services, and contraception. **And I’ve been a tireless proponent of codifying the right to an abortion into federal law.**

I will keep working to restore the right to choose – and for gender equality on all fronts. The work we still have to do is daunting, but I’m inspired every day by the determination of grassroots supporters like you to stay in the fight.

Our voices together remain powerful. We can and will prevail.

Sincerely,

Jennifer | **Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America.** ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68724597/423920016/-772585877?refcode=EM_C_230826WED_N_JW_FULL_6_NG_N_Biobox&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGVjMWViYS01MDQ0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jBrmxn_nrpUhpxoIRceLVFxksd3APMty8U-5Lzc4ykE=)****
---

name: Gisele Barreto Fetterman
subject: What I think about Bob Casey
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Politics can be mean, but believe me when I say that Bob Casey is truly one of the kindest people ever.
Peter,
Politics can be soooooo icky — but here in PA, we’re lucky to have two Senators who stay true to their values. I call one of them family, but today, I want to talk to you about Bob Casey.
I know it seems like our exhausting Senate race in 2022 just finished, but there’s another one! **And Peter, we**** _need_****to keep Bob Casey in the Senate fighting for Pennsylvania.**
[**So if you can, help us keep PA blue and keep moving towards progress by chipping in whatever you can to Bob Casey’s campaign.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230826-2?amount=5&refcode=em20230826-2&refcode2=504_552475_lNxC2f&akid=504%2E552475%2ElNxC2f)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230826-2?amount=5&refcode=em20230826-2&refcode2=504_552475_lNxC2f&akid=504%2E552475%2ElNxC2f)
_One of John and my double dates with Bob and Terese!_
I’m going to be honest with you. Politics can be mean, but believe me when I say that Bob Casey is truly one of the kindest people ever. ❤️ He’s been standing up for Pennsylvania’s hardworking people for his whole life, and no one knows our state like Bob. It’s why we have to keep him in Washington, to fight for us.
[**Peter, if it makes sense for you right now, please chip in a donation of any amount to help re-elect Bob before his big end-of-month deadline next week.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230826-2?amount=5&refcode=em20230826-2&refcode2=504_552475_lNxC2f&akid=504%2E552475%2ElNxC2f)
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230826-2?refcode=em20230826-2&refcode2=504_552475_lNxC2f&akid=504%2E552475%2ElNxC2f)**
With love,
❤️ Gisele
Gisele Barreto Fetterman

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=504%2E552475%2ElNxC2f)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=504%2E552475%2ElNxC2f)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

name: Blue Amp Action
subject: Take a Stand: Protect Our Democracy by Protecting Election Workers!
body:
You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/oinH9UvVGUmpBQnwg3vyqg2?unsubscribedata=9tyHpfvElWvsPzusmoPDa0Tn0GMZ1xEvPjwduqw49GnobGiusCtRMFnFVxJvLOkWezeU4OjcFMhWX3m5yuAg30vW%2BpNRACAMbIBfAhlbOl62sPWpphOIXVURU1FmbEZ%2BiZMF%2BF60v0x7nmjCErYTtfgHjKJmdrGNGS2E8ogbHqEQ0qtW2Dzb9qwktsfwFAFgSpP8ym0zgluIvx3KVEPBtUiYK5%2FE%2FYmPmQOPgg8vc3iE3i7FVgsU5EUIk7iYMuYC0tIF8mrRTetEp9fs%2FRP%2FrtJ8Nj1T8LtB8QOvr7OnB2D%2F41DpwGb77KFObSzNdkCWHYmPThTFHfgRUimF%2B1b9ADVEBaQvyjXbYCyhrxydZAY4p3vzjwNJCdg1OTXaPg1lNcqcKHMh2d7OojQoc3emgq4L9tP25DnnGr5UYd1Sf2t%2BZw33f70fBo%2B6aWVTwunn .
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/106667/images/unnamed%20%285%29.png]
The foundation of any strong democracy relies on free, fair, and accessible elections. The unsung heroes who ensure this process runs smoothly are our dedicated poll workers and officials.
Unfortunately, these heroes are now facing unprecedented threats that jeopardize both their safety and the integrity of our elections. Protect our election workers by adding your name now! [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-protect-election-workers?source=2023ElectionWorkers_BAA&referrer=group-blue-amp-action&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fyyz_ja%3Frefcode%3Dbaa_pet_protectelectionworkersja2308%26amount%3D25]
Add Your Name! [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-protect-election-workers?source=2023ElectionWorkers_BAA&referrer=group-blue-amp-action&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fyyz_ja%3Frefcode%3Dbaa_pet_protectelectionworkersja2308%26amount%3D25]
Peter,
Election workers have become the target of online and offline threats that deter them from carrying out their vital duties. These threats have reached alarming levels, driven by the "Big Lie" surrounding the 2020 presidential election. This toxic environment has transformed polling places into political battlegrounds, leading to a record number of election workers quitting their roles.
The situation is dire, and we cannot stand idly by. The safety and security of these individuals are of utmost importance, as they play a pivotal role in upholding the very essence of our democratic process. We’ve got to let them know we have their backs. Add your name now to demand we protect election workers! [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-protect-election-workers?source=2023ElectionWorkers_BAA&referrer=group-blue-amp-action&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fyyz_ja%3Frefcode%3Dbaa_pet_protectelectionworkersja2308%26amount%3D25]
ADD YOUR NAME! [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-protect-election-workers?source=2023ElectionWorkers_BAA&referrer=group-blue-amp-action&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fyyz_ja%3Frefcode%3Dbaa_pet_protectelectionworkersja2308%26amount%3D25]
Thankfully, initiatives are in motion to counter these threats and ensure the safety of election workers. U.S. Senators Amy Klobuchar and Dick Durbin have reintroduced the Election Worker Protection Act, a crucial step towards enhancing the safety of state and local election officials. This legislation proposes stronger penalties for those who threaten election workers and offers grants for safety improvements.
We must show our unwavering support for those who make our democracy possible. By signing the petition, you're sending a clear message: We stand behind our election workers, and we demand protective measures that enable them to carry out their duties without fear. [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-protect-election-workers?source=2023ElectionWorkers_BAA&referrer=group-blue-amp-action&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fyyz_ja%3Frefcode%3Dbaa_pet_protectelectionworkersja2308%26amount%3D25]
SIGN ON! [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-protect-election-workers?source=2023ElectionWorkers_BAA&referrer=group-blue-amp-action&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fyyz_ja%3Frefcode%3Dbaa_pet_protectelectionworkersja2308%26amount%3D25]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/106667/images/unnamed%20%284%29.png] Cliff Schecter
President, Blue Amp Action
Amplify Good
Follow Us
https://twitter.com/cliffschecter [https://twitter.com/cliffschecter] https://www.linkedin.com/in/cliff-schecter-0873a448/ [https://www.linkedin.com/in/cliff-schecter-0873a448/]
Blue Amp Strategies
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com [info@blueampaction.com]
About BlueAmp Action:
We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world.
We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits.
And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t.
When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.
Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.
So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia.
Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/oinH9UvVGUmpBQnwg3vyqg2?unsubscribedata=9tyHpfvElWvsPzusmoPDa0Tn0GMZ1xEvPjwduqw49GnobGiusCtRMFnFVxJvLOkWezeU4OjcFMhWX3m5yuAg30vW%2BpNRACAMbIBfAhlbOl62sPWpphOIXVURU1FmbEZ%2BiZMF%2BF60v0x7nmjCErYTtfgHjKJmdrGNGS2E8ogbHqEQ0qtW2Dzb9qwktsfwFAFgSpP8ym0zgluIvx3KVEPBtUiYK5%2FE%2FYmPmQOPgg8vc3iE3i7FVgsU5EUIk7iYMuYC0tIF8mrRTetEp9fs%2FRP%2FrtJ8Nj1T8LtB8QOvr7OnB2D%2F41DpwGb77KFObSzNdkCWHYmPThTFHfgRUimF%2B1b9ADVEBaQvyjXbYCyhrxydZAY4p3vzjwNJCdg1OTXaPg1lNcqcKHMh2d7OojQoc3emgq4L9tP25DnnGr5UYd1Sf2t%2BZw33f70fBo%2B6aWVTwunn .

Kevin McCarthy and his allies at the NRCC are strapping their frontline candidates with cash ahead of the 2024 elections.

We can't afford to fall behind if we're going to take back the House next November.

They're trying to outraise Democrats across the country in these early days to sway off Democratic challengers – **freeing up their cash to flip frontline districts like Marcy Kaptur's.**

_The Republican frontrunner in this race outraised us last quarter._ But we're not backing down without a fight.

Last election, the GOP spent millions in special interests and dark money to defeat Marcy and we came out on top. With your help, we can do it again. **[Can we count on you to contribute $5 right now to help us close the fundraising gap in these critical early body:
Peter, this one is personal. |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68726429/423920635/-572148552?sourceid=1051803&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTEzMzI0Zi01MzQ0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3r5XOMnje93vam3LRBit50rIshGK-fzFTReX4H-yaE8=&emci=ac13324f-5344-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ae13324f-5344-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Today is Women's Equality Day, celebrating the day when many (but not all) American women gained the right to vote. It's a day to celebrate... and to learn from.

We are working hard to learn from our past and build a better future. And we need your input to make that happen.

**Peter, will you share your thoughts with us about the future of EMILYs List? Please take our Priorities Survey today:**

**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68726430/423920636/-572148552?sourceid=1051803&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTEzMzI0Zi01MzQ0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3r5XOMnje93vam3LRBit50rIshGK-fzFTReX4H-yaE8=&emci=ac13324f-5344-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ae13324f-5344-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** Peter,

Today is **Women's Equality Day** , celebrating the certification of the 19th Amendment granting women* the right to vote.

You'll notice that asterisk — that's because not every woman in America was able to vote starting August 26, 1920. Women of color, many of whom were critical to the success of the suffragette movement, were not guaranteed the right to vote until **45 years later** , when the Voting Rights Act was passed in 1965.

Women are the most powerful voting bloc in American politics. All of the work we do at EMILYs List is guided by that fact. **And we are working every day, every year, every election cycle, to create a more just, diverse, and truly representative democracy by helping Democratic pro-choice women run, win, and change the world.**

American history is complicated. We are working hard to learn from our past to build a better future. And we need your input to make that happen. **So please, Peter, will you share your thoughts with us about the future of EMILYs List and your priorities for the coming years? Take our Priorities Survey now:** **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68726431/423920637/-572148552?sourceid=1051803&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTEzMzI0Zi01MzQ0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3r5XOMnje93vam3LRBit50rIshGK-fzFTReX4H-yaE8=&emci=ac13324f-5344-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ae13324f-5344-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** Thank you for your input. Toward a more perfect union,

the EMILYs List team

|
---|---|---
# EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office.

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Hunters are BLOWING UP sleeping bear cubs in dens
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1949633?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT BEAR PETITION: The grizzly bear population could be wiped out FOREVER by ruthless trophy hunters.****Grizzlies need Endangered Species Act protection in all states.[_Will you be the voice for these innocent animals by signing the petition? >>_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1949634?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)****[_ _](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1949634?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** As you read this Friend, grizzly bears are being hunted, brutally **KILLED** and their bodies displayed as souvenirs—**and it’s all completely LEGAL.** Vicious trophy hunters are even going as far as **blowing up harmless mama bears and cubs in their dens!** _Where can these vulnerable bears find safety and shelter if not in their own dens?_ Innocent grizzly bears do not understand state boundaries or when hunting season begins. They roam freely amongst the land, as they naturally do. They cannot tell the difference between bait and available food to feed themselves and their cubs. This makes them vulnerable to the barbaric hunt, violence and weapons that could _**KILL**_ them and leave their cubs _**STARVING**_ and exposed to further harm. Not only are grizzlies facing _a shrinking habitat, loss of critical food sources, and many impacts of climate change_ —but also **leg snares, dynamite, and shotguns!** There have been numerous discoveries of bloody carcasses of grizzlies with some being shot _**more than 20 times!**_ With only fewer than 2,000 grizzlies remaining in the lower 48 states, if we do not act **FAST** we could risk losing one of our nation’s most treasured species. [**Please Friend, without your help, grizzly bears are left vulnerable to the heinous practices by cruel trophy hunters. Sign the petition to take a step further in saving these innocent mammals from inhumane bear hunts >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1949635?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1949636?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
There’s more to this, Friend. Right now, far-right lawmakers like Rep. Lauren Boebert are doubling down on harmful Trump-era policies by aggressively attempting to **roll back life-saving Endangered Species Act (ESA) grizzly protections even further.** With Republican lawmakers and trophy hunting lobbyists advancing some of the most aggressive anti-bear laws ever, the grizzly bear population would drop closer to _**EXTINCTION.**_
**[We cannot allow the fate of these helpless bears to be left in the hands of the money hungry GOP and hunting lobbyists. Grizzlies cannot afford another attack or death. If just 1 of every 5 people reading this email signs their name, we can help protect our precious grizzlies from merciless trophy hunters!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1949637?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1949636?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thank you for taking action to protect grizzly bears!
Friends of the Earth**
|

Friend,
Crooked Joe Biden and the radical Democrats desperately hoped President Trump’s mugshot in Georgia would destroy our movement.

Ted Cruz Fooled by a Clear Troll Job on Twitter After Hurricane Hilary
Hi, it’s Roland Gutierrez, the Democratic TX State Senator running for U.S. Senate against Ted Cruz.
My opponent had his wits tested this week when he came across a clear troll job from a Barstool bro. He responded to a picture on Twitter that showed a shark on what appeared to be a flooded road.
The tweet joked that the photo was taken in Los Angeles, which was getting slammed by record rainfall this week.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]
“Holy crap,” Ted Cruz posted in reference to the tweet. Cruz was then roasted in the replies for his naiveté.
It’s not surprising that he was easily fooled by the trolling picture. Ted Cruz continues to be an embarrassment to our state. After all, this is the same Ted Cruz that abandoned Texas in the middle of a winter storm and fled to Mexico, leaving 800 people to die.
Ted Cruz’s Twitter obsession does nothing to help Texas families – and it’s time he was sent packing. Will you pitch in $10 or more to help me send Ted Cruz into political retirement once and for all? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]

Thanks for your support,
Roland Gutierrez

## Why Chris Christie:

Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.

body:
| | | Peter, **The clock is ticking down fast...**

We’re counting down to our end-of-month deadline and we can’t afford to come up short. **[Here’s why:](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=c2722ac6f9104974b6620e9c9db9a53e&_e=8Eyu384G69AkZYc1KbHbQGUN_Y5OppTh-mwGtyyMX7o5nTJA7xRQ0xILqlu9lgd8pYNpksR8nfgIzsHXUAP9rff3TCAXkeTOEwvTE5jwe4m4KxtGGNYW7EvE5Xpw55k8sccGTbEAFopXu7t7-lt1_sioBwcSC8VUSyz9FPgIQe4vDbdQu5MQDTMOJ_qFc8ss6YofFfCv8eUJ-w9yW2L0HxLWALQdwzB3i0DffNVr1GYRu0-IrgGy4AdOj9EKhSzpABNGc0zx61dDOWwHiyAsxQeR7j2x-NYroBdE4MzSzEnLso0t8lcH2Bsc8q3U2N5fkdcE0P8PSe-ZFpQ_PfFYf7luRX8SXu-izmzkljrVkZw%3D)**
1. Multiple Democrats have entered this race against me _._
2. The ActBlue fundraising machine is targeting Florida, and they’re getting ready to **pour MILLIONS** into our race.
3. Control of the Senate **could come down to Florida** , and Democrats think they can turn Florida BLUE.

**If we’re going to win, we must build our war chest. Florida has ALWAYS been in play, and next year is no exception.**

This campaign wouldn’t be possible without you, and I am so grateful for all of you.

Your continued support is what fuels our fight, and YOU are helping RESCUE AMERICA from woke Democrats in Washington.

**[Consider chipping into our campaign so we can meet our end-of-month deadline and DEFEND FLORIDA!](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=c2722ac6f9104974b6620e9c9db9a53e&_e=8Eyu384G69AkZYc1KbHbQGUN_Y5OppTh-mwGtyyMX7o5nTJA7xRQ0xILqlu9lgd8pYNpksR8nfgIzsHXUAP9rff3TCAXkeTOEwvTE5jwe4m4KxtGGNYW7EvE5Xpw55k8sccGTbEAFopXu7t7-lt1_sioBwcSC8VUSyz9FPgIQe4vDbdQu5MQDTMOJ_qFc8ss6YofFfCv8eUJ-w9yW2L0HzT-D5Ui0Qgm4CGxCQlXbBCDNIzrEVtcL3i_9kgWS9hFfDfT4bZ5lsbuQaVxiCorGdMyF1Hrbs-N5OZAuJuZwVpid3HnAZfIxJCqfizfpWXT2I2o1e0jfOho0gxL3Elb7etT_7P07EQi7XRyohyYThY%3D)**

body:
| This headline says it all.

As “one of the few remaining swing states,” all eyes are on Wisconsin this election. Republicans from across the country flocked to Milwaukee ahead of the GOP’s debate this week to make it abundantly clear that they intend to flip Wisconsin red — and this was just the start of it. body:
They're trying to intimidate the American people...

They're trying to intimidate the American people...
| | | [ ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3bea39aa0d494bffa0cae7c389e137c1&_e=xDYkUKK-g71zleCjOzJcdndnMzSlSQ0tfPmzAkEDkMUCIBob3Wds3P_PNwjwm1a5YKCvyrXLL829pNBiY6onzG4uoDaEx87-DTHgG0D7XLGY6qKoEv7jQIMXJM6mhyciiZGzUbyssTGnp6yMNB5xV565gzgJIkOK0UrpEmG9Z8A8djlViSUdGsO-JIqj3S_HrZFo99W173gkI8Ehp8aHkDmnmfS5GmqCmR6jNjvRNk5Lg5oQT5vCxonQK1Hmh7dD5oms0csjTWAUdR0R0w-KTYuFKgAbC_8I2_yYtMPL2agAdvz4gfFGJcwkQFJC1WY4cguRZB22zWcguRGrlhlXpU4actjfO3DBFpjxSh7JztxldgfO6ZI4D9wBEJbe6ZYeRxSdzpHYGCoLzWm_PznvFm_CHcaEBc_XBZ-a16HHDTU%3D)

Friend,
This is truly a sad day for America.
First, Crooked Joe and his accomplices indicted my father as an innocent man _four_ times to try and eliminate their chief political rival.
And now, they've officially ARRESTED him and turned it into a made-for-TV spectacle.
Why? Because they want to ensure that every screen in America today reminds you of what these witch hunts are really all about: _fear. _
The fear that if you call out the broken establishment, cast off the political ruling class, and stand up for the forgotten men and women of our country, then you too could be indicted, arrested, or even imprisoned.
_This is how far they will go to try and**INTIMIDATE** you out of voting for the one candidate who will always put our country - and YOU - first. _
It's truly sickening to see what has become of the freest nation on earth.
But while these witch-hunt crazed radicals believe they're scaring voters away from our movement, the reality is they've only made us that much STRONGER.
They've revealed to the American people the TRUE extent of their Third World tyranny.
_And by this time tomorrow, our movement will be TWICE as strong and more UNITED than ever before!_
**Which is why I want to show my father a list of ALL the patriots who stood by his side while he was being unjustly arrested and made a contribution to SAVE America.**
**[Please make a contribution of ANY amount- _truly, even just $1_ - to peacefully DEFEND our movement from the never-ending witch hunts and have YOUR NAME added to the list of supporters that I'm going to share with my father.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3bea39aa0d494bffa0cae7c389e137c1&_e=xDYkUKK-g71zleCjOzJcdndnMzSlSQ0tfPmzAkEDkMUCIBob3Wds3P_PNwjwm1a5YKCvyrXLL829pNBiY6onzG4uoDaEx87-DTHgG0D7XLGY6qKoEv7jQIMXJM6mhyciiZGzUbyssTGnp6yMNB5xV565gzgJIkOK0UrpEmG9Z8A8djlViSUdGsO-JIqj3S_HrZFo99W173gkI8Ehp8aHkDmnmfS5GmqCmR6jNjvRNk5Lg5oQT5vCxonQK1Hmh7dD5oms0csjTWAUdR0R0w-KTSJ_fkWzoEtXVBl9KgVGdV8kHuC75NiKJAu9N_z5ULDG8vO0SwfmYFrp6xiNrXH7etm8_xoZ14vWlv4WmtGmjQpKD9pQW1POnB3ge4Jud5lLjGoS9kDt5U1De-L9Mlw_zx8SPGLD_Uxk12Ag-4nTZ5o%3D)**

name: Marco
subject: The fight against gerrymandering has reached a crescendo…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
|
---

In recent headlines from Wisconsin, the fight against gerrymandering has reached a crescendo. Voters, impassioned by the pursuit of fairness in representation, are challenging the gerrymandered legislative maps drawn by the Wisconsin legislature that have stifled their voices for far too long.

It's a moment that inspires hope and galvanizes action. This is the narrative unfolding before us, and your support is vital to support work that will make this vision a reality.
[**Why does this matter?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68727279/423923503/1991296860?refcode=20230825_AOTL_F_WI_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI5NWQ3MGU0LTViNDQtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Ooq5vbDwBG9dNlP0kmrDP6muNhhzFhLQmW6rN-siZJM=) [**Gerrymandering is not just an abstract concept; it profoundly impacts people's lives. It distorts political representation, undermines democracy, and perpetuates partisan division. Communities are fractured, voices silenced, and trust eroded. But states like Wisconsin are proving that change is possible.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68727280/423923504/1991296860?refcode=20230825_AOTL_F_WI_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI5NWQ3MGU0LTViNDQtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Ooq5vbDwBG9dNlP0kmrDP6muNhhzFhLQmW6rN-siZJM=)

name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: A small price to pay...
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
What if you never had to worry about Senator Sinema siding with hedge fund managers in key votes, or holding Democrats' agenda hostage?
#

Peter -
$3.
If you knew a single $3 donation meant you never had to worry about Senator Sinema siding with hedge fund managers in key votes, or holding Democrats' agenda hostage, wouldn't it be worth it?
What if you knew contributing $3 donation meant you never had to worry about Senator Sinema siding with hedge fund managers in key votes, or holding Democrats' agenda hostage, wouldn't it be worth it?
And what if you knew a $3 meant you never had to worry about Senator Kari Lake coming to the floor of the Senate and claiming "globalists" introduced COVID to the world to stop Donald Trump -- wouldn't that be $3 well spent?
We know $3 may not seem like it can do all those things... especially in an expensive race like this one will be.
But by the time you get to this part in the email, a few people have chipped-in their $3. Now they hope you'll do the same. Because it all adds up, and that's how we'll win this race... together.
[**Can you please contribute $3, or whatever you can afford today, to Ruben Gallego's campaign for Senate? Help us catch up on our August fundraising goals before it's too late.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug23.NWxa9e&refcode=em230826-2-f&t=1&akid=1025%2E734936%2EONljod)

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: What a night!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Did you see the debate?
[Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=4b7eda7a8acc443ea9103dd99733b8a3&_t=PoKjXCWzw0p69QuQKoTqyW4ADunAt72EiA7eJTYB7nK6oOiQ9bA7utYgWQUnq_rZmJoXj5znM2at-5EAzxdIWapsgpnncjw7dpmd1MqV_3s%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=4b7eda7a8acc443ea9103dd99733b8a3&_t=PoKjXCWzw0p69QuQKoTqyW4ADunAt72EiA7eJTYB7nK6oOiQ9bA7utYgWQUnq_rZmJoXj5znM2at-5EAzxdIWapsgpnncjw7dpmd1MqV_3s%3D)

| [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=4b7eda7a8acc443ea9103dd99733b8a3&_e=WU5j_aKkewwxcLuMBqvGDkXfM7NDPa3BCDZN0YfMg-ZHSmdF-Nd1hfww1piRePZ9UY-Ls3vDPCZuIukLtmInYsqAF9XHkjG2PFI0cATmPHccqGlwJWBVRFNZFm5ScQ2vyeb-LC7_6ecGa_FbDvfMO2vGP87AX60Oog0O40gNKqW6ovRg-pph9keF9xz0BIvQrZQKfzoUpUnonSiASgirdbDJXRHkKNmvSFUI4z7d11EMRdSxgHJ4ZT7PMuqxvrw-dHsOXJ9Kp2B_fPzakC7sYlV0tFiEs4TxGkp8hisr_0GG7NfhpR-1p2qCEeaEo7EKhwIGjKwGmNNU8uYLPqFpiOXYttvnpNN-uqF6dhjvF2sTGhiAlOPLJ1zp-K4L-7Il7HH_SKPU-FSzV3VXhpOqlg%3D%3D)
Fellow American,

When I stepped off the debate stage, I could feel electricity in the air. _This campaign has built tremendous momentum and we aren't letting up for a minute._

For those of you who have been with me since the beginning, you know how big this victory is. We started this campaign back in late February polling at 0.0%. My vision is for an America more unified by our founding ideals than torn apart by our perceived differences.

|
**God** is real.
There are **two** genders.
Human flourishing requires **fossil fuels**.
**Reverse racism** is racism.
An open border is **no border**.
**Parents** determine the education of their children.
The **nuclear family** is the greatest form of governance known to mankind.
**Capitalism** lifts people up from poverty.
There are three branches of the U.S. government, **not four**.
The **U.S. Constitution** is the strongest guarantor of freedoms in history.
| [** JOIN OUR MOVEMENT **](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=4b7eda7a8acc443ea9103dd99733b8a3&_e=WU5j_aKkewwxcLuMBqvGDkXfM7NDPa3BCDZN0YfMg-ZHSmdF-Nd1hfww1piRePZ9UY-Ls3vDPCZuIukLtmInYsqAF9XHkjG2PFI0cATmPHccqGlwJWBVRFNZFm5ScQ2vyeb-LC7_6ecGa_FbDvfMO2vGP87AX60Oog0O40gNKqW6ovRg-pph9keF9xz0BIvQrZQKfzoUpUnonSiASgirdbDJXRHkKNmvSFUI4z7d11HSsyNoD63Kn-idAK2GadBDUwkdKVL1q5JAkLPWQrXR6CYtxlqdIm3I-nz4EFbK8Vs_i6anCVlj2eBbzfy3AQ1w2K2bhmoIAca6pckrTOajxwvvkb44WbQebBdT6dNYYdF7eoHfK0r7Iet0nRtNvYtiZB6fEJKiF6xygkL_lBg9sA%3D%3D)
---

My Republican opponents offered a lot of great points tonight but here's why my campaign is different:
* I'm going to revolutionize the way our government is run. _The people who we elect to run the government are NOT the ones who actually run the government_. It's the managerial class in the Deep State. You cannot reform these agencies. The only answer is to **SHUT THEM DOWN** , and I am the only presidential candidate who has the plan on how to actually do it.
* We have got to change the conversation. Stop talking about Biden & start talking about what we actually stand for as Republicans. Spouting off poll-tested platitudes about Biden makes us sound like partisan hacks. And that's exactly why it's going to take an outsider from a new generation to get the job done.
* I don't want a national divorce, and other candidates are pushing us toward the brink of that division. I'm running to lead us to a national revival. If we can revive that, then nobody in the world - not a nation, not a corporation, not a virus - will defeat us.

**[Fellow American, I hope you are ready to join me and fight for the future of America. There are 20 weeks until the first primary election. Chip in $20 today and together, let's make America our first priority.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=4b7eda7a8acc443ea9103dd99733b8a3&_e=WU5j_aKkewwxcLuMBqvGDkXfM7NDPa3BCDZN0YfMg-ZHSmdF-Nd1hfww1piRePZ9UY-Ls3vDPCZuIukLtmInYsqAF9XHkjG2PFI0cATmPHccqGlwJWBVRFNZFm5ScQ2vyeb-LC7_6ecGa_FbDvfMO2vGP87AX60Oog0O40gNKqW6ovRg-pph9keF9xz0BIvQrZQKfzoUpUnonSiASgirdbDJXRHkKNmvSFUI4z7d11EuOc3G6kTWIsaDpCFxTfgH8a9FkdcwoAn4reMEnYyTB-7VEeNE3xBTQrMMt6cfsKL9BPq1IJtPYxRiixyc5GSpfvyrFGA25LhXwl3URje9_NMybyXC6jcsanyYhqEdxsNnWLz52VnQ5yYcdKkSlUJg-tdnOlGknHVNBaYajEcH3g%3D%3D)**

_Fellow American - are you ready for the revolution?_

America First,

[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=4b7eda7a8acc443ea9103dd99733b8a3&_e=WU5j_aKkewwxcLuMBqvGDkXfM7NDPa3BCDZN0YfMg-ZHSmdF-Nd1hfww1piRePZ9UY-Ls3vDPCZuIukLtmInYsqAF9XHkjG2PFI0cATmPHccqGlwJWBVRFNZFm5ScQ2vyeb-LC7_6ecGa_FbDvfMO2vGP87AX60Oog0O40gNKqW6ovRg-pph9keF9xz0BIvQrZQKfzoUpUnonSiASgirdbDJXRHkKNmvSFUI4z7d11HkqQSqGjCwWgthMDcbGfGm3EPQHW6EFHwY_YAtKyxVkYhQFVjCUpZyuRvnQ1lbeUQFEio6RUc0fQovLapIT6SPveTbJyCp37rlUeJBD6gx76OUQ1KCYdPgpzwAOsgbnsdiqIf3F7PdhfaWJx3b_Mt1kO40Jl04b8STh2Z41sBqvg%3D%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** JOIN OUR MOVEMENT ->**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=4b7eda7a8acc443ea9103dd99733b8a3&_e=WU5j_aKkewwxcLuMBqvGDkXfM7NDPa3BCDZN0YfMg-ZHSmdF-Nd1hfww1piRePZ9UY-Ls3vDPCZuIukLtmInYsqAF9XHkjG2PFI0cATmPHccqGlwJWBVRFNZFm5ScQ2vyeb-LC7_6ecGa_FbDvfMO2vGP87AX60Oog0O40gNKqW6ovRg-pph9keF9xz0BIvQrZQKfzoUpUnonSiASgirdbDJXRHkKNmvSFUI4z7d11ErP7Rn3J5-S40vE92No37oHdDUKl7LjBUcfkRFZV98Ifc0BqjxDkMVHGjlW8ppqQbonje2FLmF7o_43jJaEVEvb6ONfEqJitM48rK9qe9mCHPYOHZzdjU4m0bLGNogaqVAxUjXzZ1miIeN9mcrGVkqUn0YHMjoq_3ei1yOO6T_pg%3D%3D)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: Did you see the debate? | | Fellow American, When I stepped off the debate stage, I could feel electricity in the air. This campaign has built tremendous momentum and we aren't letting up for a minute. For those of you who have been with me since the beginning, you know how big this victory is. We started this campaign back in late February polling at 0.0%. My vision is for an America more unified by our founding ideals than torn apart by our perceived differences. | God is real. There are two genders. Human flourishing requires fossil fuels. Reverse racism is racism. An open border is no border. Parents determine the education of their children. The nuclear family is the greatest form of governance known to mankind. Capitalism lifts people up from poverty. There are three branches of the U.S. government, not four. The U.S. Constitution is the strongest guarantor of freedoms in history. | My Republican opponents offered a lot of great points tonight but here's why my campaign is different: I'm going to revolutionize the way our government is run. The people who we elect to run the government are NOT the ones who actually run the government. It's the managerial class in the Deep State. You cannot reform these agencies. The only answer is to SHUT THEM DOWN , and I am the only presidential candidate who has the plan on how to actually do it. We have got to change the conversation. Stop talking about Biden & start talking about what we actually stand for as Republicans. Spouting off poll-tested platitudes about Biden makes us sound like partisan hacks. And that's exactly why it's going to take an outsider from a new generation to get the job done. I don't want a national divorce, and other candidates are pushing us toward the brink of that division. I'm running to lead us to a national revival. If we can revive that, then nobody in the world - not a nation, not a corporation, not a virus - will defeat us. Fellow American - are you ready for the revolution? name: Jon Tester
subject: I’ll be honest
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STOP GUN VIOLENCE PAC
body:
My opponents will try to turn me into someone I'm not, because they can’t beat who I am.

| I'll be honest, Peter —

Fundraising is one of the worst parts of this job, **but just a few moments from now I’ll have to ask you to make a donation.**

Give me a chance to explain: I’m not asking this often because I like it. I do it because national Republicans and out-of-state super PACs are pledging to spend outrageous amounts of money to attack my character and **the only chance we have to respond is by collecting grassroots donations from a whole lot of people.**

_Peter, my opponents will try to turn me into someone I'm not, because they can’t beat who I am._

I’m a third-generation farmer, the Senate’s only working dirt farmer, and I’ll never stop fighting for the hardworking people that call Montana home.

**Since we officially launched my reelection campaign, tens of thousands of people all over the country have chipped in to support us.** That’s something I’m proud of, and it means that I’ll have a fighting chance to stand up to the millions of dollars the GOP will spend against me.

**But we can’t slow down, not even for a minute, because experts are already saying that this will be the most expensive election in Montana’s history.**

[_**So with all eyes on our race, I have to ask, can I count on you to make a split donation between my campaign and Stop Gun Violence PAC right now to help us reach our end-of-month goal in 5 days? This is important. clean_body: My opponents will try to turn me into someone I'm not, because they can’t beat who I am. | I'll be honest, Peter — Fundraising is one of the worst parts of this job, but just a few moments from now I’ll have to ask you to make a donation. Give me a chance to explain: I’m not asking this often because I like it. I do it because national Republicans and out-of-state super PACs are pledging to spend outrageous amounts of money to attack my character and the only chance we have to respond is by collecting grassroots donations from a whole lot of people. Peter, my opponents will try to turn me into someone I'm not, because they can’t beat who I am. I’m a third-generation farmer, the Senate’s only working dirt farmer, and I’ll never stop fighting for the hardworking people that call Montana home. Since we officially launched my reelection campaign, tens of thousands of people all over the country have chipped in to support us. That’s something I’m proud of, and it means that I’ll have a fighting chance to stand up to the millions of dollars the GOP will spend against me. But we can’t slow down, not even for a minute, because experts are already saying that this will be the most expensive election in Montana’s history. = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for everything you do for our campaign. We’ve built a great team in Montana that relies on grassroots donations to keep us in the fight. Your support really makes a huge difference. I hope you know that. name: CAPT HUNG CAO
subject: Punching terrorists in the face
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
| | | [](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=38b544c4b5814b2ab8cdcc1d94bb1ac6&_e=IEfUaYTmMAcRFVCfeIb_vfhaZbIeQH8lcKeywtT6r2TtcxXd0D-p3DR-WNLk6HP05eIj4pUknqaBeVThtmFbEZ3cd7nwyyTR4dCco_T9MTVyhD_6xjEXhWsjWRYLVHQ6z3QaA2KjPao7bbpwZ42oM05hMiyVoUyIrnCM31v9fsL1Pp4UndG-5SNn3SaEGhmYTegz3cHmshFvr40lcVGzfRWSiKCXLMLbMTG-tMW16vPTp7OahW5EibmbjDcimNqVZM9jb_51vXhILBne3eaSffooh0HkRl4ZSxXMUbmVv2kxYa6wogA4CZSyot4Y_f-Sdkp8OwAA04C8r1rxs7FBJu3JLSkDynamjrc7_C-QFvM%3D)
---
Peter, I’ll say it: I’m not afraid to punch a terrorist in the face.

My name is Hung Cao, and I served as a Captain in the Navy for 25 years. I served in some of the most dangerous corners of the world.
I dove in dangerous waters, defused bombs, and time and time again I came face to face with people who wanted to destroy our country and everything it stands for.

**Trust me when I say: there are people in the world who are ready to swoop in and DEMOLISH our freedom.**

There’s nothing I’m afraid of, but I’m not going to lie, I worry a lot about the future of our country under the radical Left.

People like Joe Biden want to hide and silence America’s real heroes and replace them with woke figureheads to distract our country from his family’s corruption.

**I didn** ’**t watch our servicemembers make the ultimate sacrifice just for Joe Biden to make a mockery of the country they died for.**

It’s time to get our country back on track. Not just for our military heroes, but for every American who believes that we are truly the greatest country on Earth.

**[I want YOU on my team. If you think you’re up for the challenge, join us today to TAKE BACK our country from the Democrats who want to destroy it.](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=38b544c4b5814b2ab8cdcc1d94bb1ac6&_e=IEfUaYTmMAcRFVCfeIb_vfhaZbIeQH8lcKeywtT6r2TtcxXd0D-p3DR-WNLk6HP05eIj4pUknqaBeVThtmFbEZ3cd7nwyyTR4dCco_T9MTVyhD_6xjEXhWsjWRYLVHQ6z3QaA2KjPao7bbpwZ42oM05hMiyVoUyIrnCM31v9fsL1Pp4UndG-5SNn3SaEGhmYTegz3cHmshFvr40lcVGzfVFuo12ed8kTZjjqYxoemcbFAhNQGgkImUTeoA3pp0H_su1NRDsZRVAjViL5oBCciYmTZGpEHj_bGEjmY7_bVz2IoS_9COQyCgRtoWi2DDCodLAWDb6gGks8YKrFuA8wCPXS7raVgONqP5Jk1j4-J_w%3D)**

[**JOIN THE TEAM**](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=38b544c4b5814b2ab8cdcc1d94bb1ac6&_e=IEfUaYTmMAcRFVCfeIb_vfhaZbIeQH8lcKeywtT6r2TtcxXd0D-p3DR-WNLk6HP05eIj4pUknqaBeVThtmFbEZ3cd7nwyyTR4dCco_T9MTVyhD_6xjEXhWsjWRYLVHQ6z3QaA2KjPao7bbpwZ42oM05hMiyVoUyIrnCM31v9fsL1Pp4UndG-5SNn3SaEGhmYTegz3cHmshFvr40lcVGzffKM6CLJNhkbYmSSleMPcgRlnfj8vJ4nIr3ELUdUNGF_9TIeYxEPKkVbu3fUsyXMzQrwv5jfCp58gyPlER5VQJHWPRIDp2c6pzXrq0Cdt_nn2UA2daSCFC_CKs0uXOSmByG50cifP8wuMpFgBJ0BgSg%3D)

clean_body: | | | Peter, I’ll say it: I’m not afraid to punch a terrorist in the face. My name is Hung Cao, and I served as a Captain in the Navy for 25 years. I served in some of the most dangerous corners of the world. I dove in dangerous waters, defused bombs, and time and time again I came face to face with people who wanted to destroy our country and everything it stands for. Trust me when I say: there are people in the world who are ready to swoop in and DEMOLISH our freedom. There’s nothing I’m afraid of, but I’m not going to lie, I worry a lot about the future of our country under the radical Left. People like Joe Biden want to hide and silence America’s real heroes and replace them with woke figureheads to distract our country from his family’s corruption. I didn ’t watch our servicemembers make the ultimate sacrifice just for Joe Biden to make a mockery of the country they died for. It’s time to get our country back on track. Not just for our military heroes, but for every American who believes that we are truly the greatest country on Earth. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET) Please mail checks made out to "Hung Cao for Virginia" to this address: PO Box 652 Purcellville VA 20134 | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia | | Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
