body:
What you missed this week. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-ayktyky-trhiujldw-yk/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ayktyky-trhiujldw-r/)
### ** Welcome to the Weekend Wrap Up! **

### **Here are the top articles that CaucusRoom members shared.**
* **[These 14 cities](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ayktyky-trhiujldw-y/)** want to ban meat, dairy, and private vehicles.
* Biden is playing **[political games](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ayktyky-trhiujldw-j/)** at the border.
* Military **[lowering the bar](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ayktyky-trhiujldw-t/)**.
* Chicago asks gangs **[not to shoot people](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ayktyky-trhiujldw-i/)** during the day.
* Larry Elder **[threatened legal action](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ayktyky-trhiujldw-d/)** ahead of the debate.
* **[Poll Results](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ayktyky-trhiujldw-h/)** : What is your most important issue?
* Biden is **[restricting oil and gas production](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ayktyky-trhiujldw-k/)** in the Gulf.
* Why is Joe **[dropping Chinese companies](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ayktyky-trhiujldw-u/)** from the blacklist?
* The border **[gates are welded open](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ayktyky-trhiujldw-o/)** in Arizona.
* What the **[media doesn't want you to know](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ayktyky-trhiujldw-x/)** about COVID.
* **[DOJ sues SpaceX](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ayktyky-trhiujldw-m/) **for only hiring US Citizens.
* Watch the **[GOP Debate](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ayktyky-trhiujldw-c/)**.
* Watch the **[Trump and Tucker](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ayktyky-trhiujldw-q/)** interview.
* Trump returned to ~~Twitter~~ X and **[posted this](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ayktyky-trhiujldw-a/)**.
* **[Let's rock](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ayktyky-trhiujldw-f/)!**

### **Biden's Hit List**
We've recently learned of a bunch more things that people enjoy that the Biden administration is coming for. Yet another **[household appliance](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ayktyky-trhiujldw-z/)** , a favorite **[pastime](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ayktyky-trhiujldw-v/), **and my **[favorite hobby](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ayktyky-trhiujldw-e/)**!
### **COVID is Back**
**[Two school districts](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ayktyky-trhiujldw-s/)** , one in Texas and one in Kentucky, have shut down because of COVID-19. _Here we go again_. **The Cause of the Maui Fire** Maui County sued Hawaiian Electric Company, saying **[the power company negligently failed to shut off power the during high winds](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ayktyky-trhiujldw-g/)** and dry conditions that fueled the wildfire that tore through Lahaina. body:
I wanted to remind us of the fight ahead.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68728057/423926408/-849735382?refcode=EM_FR_230826WomensEquality_SB_90DO_5_NG_N&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDFkYjA3Mi02NDQ0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=muga3uXNEG7qZ_yz-UVFg9uBjxnyCiBvN7XNGl4YBlg=) Peter,

As Communications Task Force Co-Chair of the Democratic Women’s Caucus, I wanted to take this **Women's Equality Day** to remind us of the fight ahead.

When the Supreme Court struck down Roe v. Wade last year, Republican legislatures seized this opportunity to restrict women's rights.

From banning birth control and contraceptive medicine to complete abortion bans, we saw Republican extremism take us backward one vote at a time.

**We fought back in the 2022 midterms, with women handily defeating the GOP's predicted red wave.** _Now, we're ready to do it again in 2024 as we elect a pro-choice majority to Congress to restore our reproductive freedom._

clean_body: Catch Chris this weekend-| | | | | America got to see Chris Christie shine on the debate stage, folks! I wanted to make sure you saw his schedule for the Sunday shows tomorrow so you can hear how the debate went from the man himself: SUNDAY, AUGUST 27th at 9:00 AM ET ABC THIS WEEK SUNDAY, AUGUST 27th at 10:40 AM ET CBS FACE THE NATION But the road doesn't stop there. We are just getting started and we have a lot more policy to discuss to show the American people that Chris is the man for the job. We want to hear from you! We look forward to hearing from you, Maria | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---

subject: Who will you choose, Peter?

body:
Fraud + coward Josh Hawley vs. 13-year Marine vet Lucas Kunce.
#
Josh Hawley is the corrupt politician who raised his fist in support of rioters outside the U.S. Capitol on January 6, 2021 — then ran like a coward the moment things got real.
Lucas Kunce is the 13-year Marine veteran, Democrat, and economic justice advocate building a grassroots campaign to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate.
**It’s time to choose your fighter, Peter.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35849?refcode=em20230826-3633&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3633%2E614464%2E-nOxDp)
**[ELECT LUCAS KUNCE: CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35849?refcode=em20230826-3633&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3633%2E614464%2E-nOxDp)**
**Missouri’s U.S. Senate race is one of our best and only chances to flip a GOP-held Senate seat in 2024** — and Lucas Kunce is gaining momentum every day.
From outraising Hawley’s campaign quarter after quarter to earning endorsements from statewide labor organizations like the Missouri AFL-CIO + the Missouri Fire Fighters, Lucas has proved that this grassroots movement to defeat Josh Hawley will be a serious force to be reckoned with in this election cycle.
But after a slew of approval polls found Hawley’s numbers tanking among Missourians, national GOP insiders and corporate mega-donors stepped in to prop up his scattered campaign. **They’ve already spent more than $1 MILLION to make Hawley look strong and fund attacks against Lucas — and they aren’t going to stop anytime soon.**
That’s why we need to be prepared every day between now and November 5, 2024. We need to continue fighting back against their desperate attacks AND getting Lucas’ unifying vision for Missouri in front of voters. And we need your support to make it happen. **So we’re coming directly to you, Peter.**
**[Will you help Missourians choose their fighter in 2024 by adding a donation of $10, $25, or whatever you can afford today? Lucas isn’t taking a cent from corporate PACs in this race, so we’re counting on help from real people like you every step of the way.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35849?refcode=em20230826-3633&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3633%2E614464%2E-nOxDp)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35850?refcode=em20230826-3633&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=3633%2E614464%2E-nOxDp) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35850?refcode=em20230826-3633&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=3633%2E614464%2E-nOxDp) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35850?refcode=em20230826-3633&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=3633%2E614464%2E-nOxDp) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35850?refcode=em20230826-3633&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=3633%2E614464%2E-nOxDp) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35850?refcode=em20230826-3633&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=3633%2E614464%2E-nOxDp) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35850?refcode=em20230826-3633&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=3633%2E614464%2E-nOxDp) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35849?refcode=em20230826-3633&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=3633%2E614464%2E-nOxDp)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: With our fundraising deadline in five days, I have to ask
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| We will need the resources to continue countering the Republican attacks against me, particularly those from Donald Trump and GOP House Speaker Kevin McCarthy.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=3566%2E5257348%2EwWG1Qa)
Derek, in just five days, our campaign will reach our August end-of-month fundraising deadline for this FEC reporting period.
I am eager to move this campaign forward. My team and I have been on the road, sharing our positive vision for California and our country, and the steps we can take in the U.S. Senate to bring real progress. In a state as big and populous as California, that takes a lot of resources.
Just this week, I’ve been to Los Angeles and San Diego, Calexico and Imperial Beach, San Francisco, Ventura and Santa Barbara, to Santa Ynez and San Luis Obispo, to Santa Cruz and Monterey, to Pacifica and Half Moon Bay, to Los Gatos and San Jose. All of this travel is vital to understanding the challenges facing all Californians and what I can do to help. But it isn’t cheap, and I need your help to keep reaching out.
And we will also need the resources to continue countering the Republican attacks against me, particularly those from Donald Trump and GOP House Speaker Kevin McCarthy.
Doing both — reaching voters _and_ responding to the constant MAGA attacks — requires an all-hands-on-deck effort.
**That’s why I’m reaching out to you, Derek.**
While other candidates can ask right-wing groups or MAGA millionaires to cut them checks, we are building a true grassroots campaign. We are not taking a dime of corporate PAC money, so a donation of just $3, $10, or $25 from folks like you makes a big difference.
**[Now with our fundraising deadline right around the corner, I have to ask: Will you contribute any amount to our campaign right now to help reach our August fundraising goal so we can file the strongest possible report to the FEC?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=aug2023_abs_em.G4DTRv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230826_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=3566%2E5257348%2EwWG1Qa)**

clean_body: | We will need the resources to continue countering the Republican attacks against me, particularly those from Donald Trump and GOP House Speaker Kevin McCarthy. Derek, in just five days, our campaign will reach our August end-of-month fundraising deadline for this FEC reporting period. I am eager to move this campaign forward. My team and I have been on the road, sharing our positive vision for California and our country, and the steps we can take in the U.S. Senate to bring real progress. In a state as big and populous as California, that takes a lot of resources. Just this week, I’ve been to Los Angeles and San Diego, Calexico and Imperial Beach, San Francisco, Ventura and Santa Barbara, to Santa Ynez and San Luis Obispo, to Santa Cruz and Monterey, to Pacifica and Half Moon Bay, to Los Gatos and San Jose. All of this travel is vital to understanding the challenges facing all Californians and what I can do to help. But it isn’t cheap, and I need your help to keep reaching out. And we will also need the resources to continue countering the Republican attacks against me, particularly those from Donald Trump and GOP House Speaker Kevin McCarthy. Doing both — reaching voters and responding to the constant MAGA attacks — requires an all-hands-on-deck effort. That’s why I’m reaching out to you, Derek. While other candidates can ask right-wing groups or MAGA millionaires to cut them checks, we are building a true grassroots campaign. We are not taking a dime of corporate PAC money, so a donation of just $3, $10, or $25 from folks like you makes a big difference. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | Thank you for your support, — Adam | | 135 E.
